clean_body: Have you had enough yet, Peter? I know that I have. While innocent Israelis were slaughtered by Hamas terrorists, far too many individuals on U.S. soil cheered them on. Some waved terrorist flags. Others called for the destruction of our ally, Israel. And some even walked free on American university campuses - spreading hate and defending Hamas. Let me be clear: Anyone who supports Hamas, a designated terrorist organization, has NO place in the United States. That's why I'm launching an urgent petition demanding that every Hamas supporter be immediately identified and deported. This isn't about politics. This is about national security, American values, and basic human decency. No country that loves freedom should tolerate those who stand with terrorists. And once you've signed, I'm asking you to go one step further. We need 10,000 signatures by midnight. Yours in freedom, Elise Stefanik Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

Peter,
I have exciting news: **I’m running to be Michigan’s next U.S. senator.**
**[If you’re ready to send a fighter to the Senate, will you split a donation of $10 between me and State Democrats Committee to become a founding donor of our campaign?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/87921?refcode=em20250418-8886&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=8886%2E614464%2E6yloxy)**

---
I never set out to be a politician. I wanted to be a doctor — and became one. I studied medicine and public health and became the youngest health official in a major U.S. city at 30.
But I learned something pretty quickly: while a doctor can prescribe medicine to help sick people get better, you can’t prescribe away poverty. You can’t cure what corporate greed does to us in a political system that’s rigged to put profits over people. It's no longer about left versus right — it's about the very top against the rest of us.
That’s why I’m running.
When I ran in 2018, I kept saying something that people didn’t want to believe at the time: Donald Trump, himself, wasn’t the disease. He was just the symptom of the disease.
What’s the disease? Our corrupted politics. Billionaires and mega-corporations are doing more than poisoning our air and water. They’re poisoning our _democracy._ They use their power to jack up prices, screwing over workers, and driving our costs through the roof. Then, they use their profits to buy access to politicians, leaving our political system too compromised to stop them.
That’s the disease that Donald Trump is a symptom of. **And our campaign – you, me, our vision for change – is the antidote.**
Things aren’t going to get better until we take our country back from the billionaires and corporations who are rigging our economy and our politics. And let’s be honest. Right now, the truth is, there aren’t enough leaders in the Senate who are willing to stand up and fight. But it’s not just about fighting back.
_It’s about what we fight for._
Fighting for us is what I’ve done my entire career — whether it was to erase $700 million in medical debt, to test every Detroit school for lead after the Flint water crisis, or to hold corporate polluters accountable.
Together, we'll take our fight to Washington. We’ll refuse the terms set by the oligarchs, raise the minimum wage, and fight to bring down costs, protect Social Security and Medicaid for every Michigander, and champion Medicare for All to guarantee every American affordable, accessible healthcare.
**This is a campaign to change our politics, not just win an election.** But first, we need to come out on top in this competitive race — **and I can’t do it alone.**
**[Will you split a donation of $10, or any amount, between me and State Democrats Committee today? We’re refusing every penny from corporate PACs because this campaign belongs to you, not the billionaires.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/87921?refcode=em20250418-8886&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=11&akid=8886%2E614464%2E6yloxy)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/87922?refcode=em20250418-8886&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=12&akid=8886%2E614464%2E6yloxy) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/87922?refcode=em20250418-8886&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=13&akid=8886%2E614464%2E6yloxy) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/87922?refcode=em20250418-8886&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=14&akid=8886%2E614464%2E6yloxy) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/87922?refcode=em20250418-8886&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=15&akid=8886%2E614464%2E6yloxy) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/87922?refcode=em20250418-8886&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=16&akid=8886%2E614464%2E6yloxy) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/87922?refcode=em20250418-8886&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=17&akid=8886%2E614464%2E6yloxy) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/87921?refcode=em20250418-8886&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=18&akid=8886%2E614464%2E6yloxy)

name: David Hogg
subject: This disagreement isn’t personal
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
I responded directly to some of the criticism we’ve been hearing.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250418-2&t=1&akid=2009%2E587540%2EIaQbqe)
Peter, I went on CBS News to discuss our huge new effort to replace ineffective, out-of-touch Democrats with young progressive champions in the 2026 primaries.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250418-2?refcode=em20250418-2009&:amount=5&refcode2=2009_587540_IaQbqe&akid=2009%2E587540%2EIaQbqe)
I responded directly to some of the criticism we’ve been hearing about our plans.
Old guard Democrats have been speaking out, saying that we’re wasting our time challenging Democrats and that we should only focus on unseating Republicans.
First of all, just take a look at the results of the last election. Many of these same establishment figures are the same ones who brought us to where we are today.
This isn’t personal – it’s a strategic disagreement. We believe that every Democrat should be standing up and fighting Trump and the MAGA agenda with everything they’ve got, but too many of them are simply failing to meet the moment right now.
This isn’t “out with the old and in with the new.” It’s about replacing the ineffective politicians with leaders who will fight like hell for our democracy against Trumpism.
I also want to be very clear about something: **Not every older politician needs to be replaced.** There are plenty of examples of leaders who have been fighting on the front lines for years, like Rep. Nancy Pelosi, who aren’t afraid to take on Trump.
But there are just as many older Democrats who are too comfortable in their safe blue seats, who aren’t standing up to fight at this pivotal moment for our country.
Right now, the Democratic Party has a _27% approval rating_. **We have to change.** And the establishment figures criticizing our plan do not have one of their own.
**[If you’re with me and you’re ready to see the next generation of progressive leaders take the reins from ineffective, out-of-touch politicians on both sides of the aisle, please make a $5 contribution now to stand with us in this fight.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250418-2?refcode=em20250418-2009&amount=5&refcode2=2009_587540_IaQbqe&akid=2009%2E587540%2EIaQbqe)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250418-2?amount=5&refcode=em20250418-2009&refcode2=2009_587540_IaQbqe&akid=2009%2E587540%2EIaQbqe)**
Thank you,
David Hogg
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250418-2&t=2&refcode2=2009_587540_IaQbqe&akid=2009%2E587540%2EIaQbqe)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=2009%2E587540%2EIaQbqe)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=2009%2E587540%2EIaQbqe)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve

Washington, DC 20003

PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE.COM, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE

name: Winsome Earle-Sears
subject: My situation is in your hands, Friend.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
I wrote this email to give you an update

| | | | | | | [](http://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zgmcj71tlt4c7c7hp5e36oka14v96j09le2mpkcg_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c1im6o74cph2bs)
---
Our future rests in your hands, friend. I wrote this email to give you an update and to make a plea from the heart. _This is a humble from the heart, so _please_ read it all the way through._In 2021, my team and I put together a historic victory to help flip every one of Virginia's highest offices RED! Ever since taking office as Lieutenant Governor, I have been notching big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every one of my fellow Virginians.Now, I'm running for Governor so that we can keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history once again.**Unfortunately, I 'm facing a few _SERIOUS_ challenges right now:**
---
**While I was in the Virginia legislative session, I was _legally_ barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign. **But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, was fundraising _**BIG TIME**_ while I've been working hard in our capital. **Seriously,_a Soros-backed, far-Left group dumped $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a single thing I could do to respond!_**
---
Now Spanberger has a _**GIGANTIC**_ fundraising advantage, friend. Polls show that my race is tied, but Spanberger has a _serious_ cash advantage. Look, if we can't make up the difference, our conservative mission __**will**__ be cut short. **Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a faithful Christian, a mother, and a Marine; __please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign!__**
---
[ DONATE TO SUPPORT WINSOME >>](http://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zu7bvnopaevjnachiv2dm18l8ulsi45ootb0g6lg_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c1im6o74cph2bs)
---
I am not exaggerating one bit when I tell you this: **without your support, we will fall even _further_ behind. **The Democrat elitists will log a win and the Commonwealth will regress down a path to _irreversible socialism!_ I wouldn't ask you to stay in this fight if I didn't think the battle was worth it. And friend, I _**know**_ we will win if we hold strong and fight this together. **[I'm not asking you to write a big check; all I'm asking is that you send in a few dollars to support me and my team in this CRITICAL battle!](http://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z3l6lr5qfh13u0uq6fej18pbasr2seeq28dnnrig_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c1im6o74cph2bs)**

name: Monica De La Cruz
subject: John 3:16: “For God so loved the world that he gave his one and only Son, that whoever believes in him shall not perish but have eternal life.”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Monica for Congress
body:
As we observe Holy Week and give thanks for the blessings in our lives

As we observe Holy Week and give thanks for the blessings in our lives, I wanted to take a moment to share with you a verse that has always brought me comfort and strength.
_In John 3:16, the Bible reminds us:_
"For God so loved the world that He gave His one and only Son, that whoever believes in Him shall not perish but have eternal life."
These words are a powerful reminder of the Lord's unwavering love for us, and the promise of eternal life that comes with faith in Him. Despite our flaws and mistakes, God's love and redemption are always available to us.
This is Monica De La Cruz - as we celebrate our nation's founding and the principles that have guided us so far, we must acknowledge the integral role that faith has played in shaping America. [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zj7ehnfij04f6p9oafbcpvbfmfjq1d6md3rhvhh8_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c1im6o72c1h2bs)From our earliest days, God's hand has been at work, guiding our nation toward greatness. **And I firmly believe that He is not finished yet. If you agree, I 'm asking that you add your name next to mine. **[ADD YOUR NAME >>
](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z1g325clj405l3p66b0mi20nfdi3qkhp183ds0r8_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c1im6o72c1h2bs)Remember, in a world that increasingly seeks to marginalize faith and push God to the back burner, it's critical that we stand firm in our convictions.
Our nation needs God now more than ever, and it's up to us to ensure that His voice continues to be heard. So as you reflect on the true meaning of Holy Week, I urge you to join me in prayer for our nation's future.
_May we remain steadfast in our commitment to faith and freedom, and may God continue to bless America._[ ADD YOUR NAME >>
](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z1ccjq9n4nnbfkp5uct49eqmr96epfaq3qvc2pag_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c1im6o72c1h2bs)- Monica De La Cruz

* * *
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zj5ssj0455a6bb922aucg8omtig4958b874ocas0_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c1im6o72c1h2bs)Election experts just declared Monica De La Cruz's House race as one of the most competitive in the country. The Democrats and a top Liberal Super PAC are already running dishonest attack ads against her.
[**As a powerful response, we need every single Conservative to go on record supporting Monica for must-win TX-15.**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z36jjrfvrvde2l02c3fintbdk23mi3i0391jgvjo_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c1im6o72c1h2bs)

name: John James
subject: fwd: This is our first big test.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John James for MI 8050 Wolfson Lane, Grand Blanc, MI 48439
body:
What happens tonight could define our race for a long time.

| | | Co-pilot— What happens tonight could define our race for a long time. We cannot afford to fall behind with all we are facing. **[I’m humbly asking you, if you are able, can I count on you to help me reach my first major goal of my campaign?](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zbkbuaod6mf1s0utbhshp9no80iak4n97d8k8qc8_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c1im6o74cph2bs)** Your Friend,John
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zt708h75sfui9uh1892bovr0p6ne351rgih2jv90_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c1im6o74cph2bs)
---
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **John James**
Date: Mon, Apr 14, 2025
Subject: This is our first big test.
---
Friend, Our first **_REAL TEST_ **of strength is approaching. We’re hours away from the **FIRST mid-month fundraising deadline** of my campaign for Governor. I need to level with you. The Democrats will be looking for any weakness to exploit. **This is what they want to see: **
* They want to see that the America First movement is dying in Michigan.
* They want to see that they are on track to secure 4 MORE YEARS of their socialist corruption.
* They want to see us fail so they can breathe a sigh of relief.

**_I’m asking you to show them_**** _just how wrong they are._** This mission needs the full support of the America First grassroots movement if we’re going to have a chance to win this. **If you believe in this campaign,****now’s the time to step up****.** **[We can’t fall behind.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z8trvo5phhs7dnnpml9lul9cs9f9uuomgpbqarb0_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c1im6o74cph2bs)**
---
[**DEADLINE APPROACHING**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zqua0bq526tfdr6db66crgd6jnmvr9vu4dis9qog_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c1im6o74cph2bs)
---
Thank you for your support. Let’s fly,
John James
---

name: Eric Burlison
subject: Christ is King. Do you agree?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Burlison for Congress
body:
I won’t back down from standing for Christ in Congress.

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zocb8d2crn8d388lrs9ptdngefquefgvln2d3h5g_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c1im6o71cph2bs)

**
**
**Patriot, --Congressman Eric Burlison here. **

I don't say this lightly. I say it because I believe it with every fiber of my being:

**Christ is King.

**

In a culture that mocks truth, in a world that celebrates confusion, this simple truth makes the elites tremble.

The woke Left is trying to erase Christianity from public life.

They hate our values.

They despise our faith.

They want to see Christians _silenced_ --in schools, in culture, and yes, in Congress.

But **I will never bow.

**
Not to the mob.

Not to the lies.

And certainly not to a radical agenda trying to drive God out of America.

I'm here to say enough is enough.

👉 **There are TWO genders.
****
**👉**Christian values BUILT this nation.
****
**👉**We will NOT be bullied into silence.

**

subject: Conservatives like you need to step up in the next hour

body:
we must turn the tide

Friend,

Democrats are on the move.

Jon Ossoff set a fundraising record in Georgia. Democrats outraised Republicans 10:1 and 3:1 in special elections.

If they keep outraising us, they have a better chance of taking back the Senate. And if they take back the Senate, it will be even more difficult to keep prices low, the border secure, and President Trump's agenda moving.

name: Gary Sinise
subject: Celebrating the 20th Anniversary of the National Memorial Day Parade
body:
It’s Gary Sinise here... I’m grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event.

It's Gary Sinise here... I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event. It's Gary Sinise here... I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event.
| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zrl29a4595780v5nb6ii8rarqduc46l0aslk6vso_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c1imepr2c3h2bs)
---
Friend, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 __and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY - but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. I've served as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. nearly every year since American Veterans Center revived it in 2005. **Now, I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event.** This year will be a remembrance like no other, as we commemorate the 80th anniversary of victory in World War II and the 250th birthdays of the U.S. Army, Navy, and Marine Corps. **[Friend, the National Memorial Day Parade is ENTIRELY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z2el3o03oot4955m2ou24tu0csg4m8m0n1qbccb8_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c1imepr2c3h2bs)**
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zk7mut02slfdsn6m05tdfip1t0pkhdmvenu0ggv0_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c1imepr2c3h2bs)
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zu75uusbua4dv86aom6cn4771eg72jvt5kbrk688_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c1imepr2c3h2bs)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, _the entire parade_ costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that 's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ **But I want to reiterate that American Veterans Center does not take ANY federal funding for this event. It is funded _entirely_ by private citizens like you who want to honor those who have sacrificed so much for our country.** Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever.

* Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.

* Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom.

[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zpk2ctree1l4apoi4tbl1622b4tjoevf31svthpg_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c1imepr2c3h2bs)[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z00iocalvrtaojpvjaegpo5o0ok1ncj6jgg1me2o_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c1imepr2c3h2bs) If you've been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best possible ways you could do it. _And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get._ You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C., for the parade is difficult. WWII veterans were a key part of the first parade when it was revived in 2005, as they have been every year since for the last 20 years. _But this may be the last year we have the opportunity to have these brave men and women with us for the parade._** ** **That's why we are making a concerted effort to ensure these veterans are at this year's National Memorial Day Parade to honor them one last time. ** So this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of victory in Europe and Japan to end World War II - and the 250th anniversaries of the Army, Navy, and Marine Corps - I encourage you to help us honor these brave veterans while we still have them with us.
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zksufu2n1hvstj3n2c65ujdk2heeump6snluk4u8_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c1imepr2c3h2bs)
---
And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day - not just this momentous year of military milestones, but every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._ _**[Friend, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please - if you're able, make a gift to fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now during its 20th anniversary.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zl4ofi2jhk5p50u3qrg657k7fjgnh4rv0khpte8o_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c1imepr2c3h2bs)**_ Sincerely, Gary SiniseHonorary Grand MarshalNational Memorial Day Parade
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zmc7ggoab4b66p87fleeor1ovn8nnp15smm6mobo_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c1imepr2c3h2bs)
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ztjv7vn1g9g1hcurspogq3ilota2vkdmpa5kcgf0_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c1imepr2c3h2bs)
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. (C) American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201
---

Pop Acta Media | Your America
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zi58d547pkvr7l9thksoqa54oltfhsfsmk9l3c4g_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkjrrasjk6mqj4t5m6gpq7d9neprqastmelp3cthieip3adt7skqu2c3neior3d5medjm05plmgqb3ct66uqr695lshgmcp34cdge48d245p25oh4ctgmao35ctjm4o724no)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zuoljcne29dmqb3tinjdn598463cgv1rm97ci6p8_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c1imepr2c3h2bs)_

[](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2znhfes1kv1skuclsecok5ujgnrshvuh62ioh48jg_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr1clg6apr7c9ge49fg)

name: Tim Scott
subject: Democrats are already outraising us, Friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
we must turn the tide

Friend,

Democrats are on the move.

Jon Ossoff set a fundraising record in Georgia. Democrats outraised Republicans 10:1 and 3:1 in special elections.

If they keep outraising us, they have a better chance of taking back the Senate. And if they take back the Senate, it will be even more difficult to keep prices low, the border secure, and President Trump's agenda moving.

**[That's why I'm asking conservatives like you to step up in the next hour. Let's act before it's too late.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2ziromej12p1gnbjeau5kkv0ji5tq5sa922952ltg_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c1hm0ob2clh2bs)**

Thank you,

name: Hillsdale College via ICYMI News
subject: Your 2025 Hillsdale College Calendar
body:
It is, therefore, completely unaccountable to “we the people.”.

This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1siukt69fdhqr0bq7l80nr6nsqfu19eio9a3id0_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c1hm0ob6c9h2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

I'm reaching out to you today because I'd like to send you your **2025 Hillsdale College calendar**.

I know, I know. It's a little early to be thinking about 2025. But since you're someone who cares about liberty, I wanted to make sure you had this chance to get the 2025 calendar.

**Claim your 2025 Hillsdale College calendar before February 28 by clicking on this secure link:**

[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/2025calendar**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zthpnek1ihb3eoldveg7i0js96jrv9p33lusof9o_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c1hm0ob6c9h2bs)

As you know, we live in an era of increasing bureaucratic despotism. You've seen it, and you understand. More and more, we are ruled by an administrative state that operates without the say of our elected representatives.

It is, therefore, completely **unaccountable** to "we the people."

This collapse of the separation of powers has spread far beyond the federal level into our states, our cities, and maybe even where you live!

One particularly disturbing example is in our K-12 schools...

At these schools, swarms of administrators impose dangerous ideologies and actively undermine parents.

In higher education--especially at taxpayer-funded state universities--bloated administrations push ideologies that teach young Americans to disrespect or even hate their country.

But thanks to our supporters, we remain free of this corrupting influence. We stay true to our mission...

...to provide "sound learning" that preserves "the blessings of civil and religious liberty."

Indeed, as the crisis in our nation has deepened in recent years, we have redoubled our efforts to extend this mission nationwide. But we've only been able to do so thanks to supporters like you.

**Just in the last year, our dedicated supporters have helped to ...**
* **Teach 4 million Americans in Hillsdale 's _free_ online courses**, including "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution," "The American Left: From Liberalism to Despotism," and our newest course, "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism."

* **Distribute hundreds of thousands of free copies of the Constitution** to citizens nationwide--especially younger Americans, especially thousands of K-12 students.

* **Provide an American classical education** to young students nationwide through K-12 education programs, returning excellence and proper civics instruction to K-12 classrooms.

* **Expand the circulation of _Imprimis_** , Hillsdale's monthly digest of liberty, to more than 6.7 million households and businesses.

I hope you'll claim your **2025 Hillsdale College calendar** so that when you use it next year, you'll remember how you can advance the important work of defending liberty through education.

Remember, your support is especially crucial because we refuse every penny of government funding--even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. NOT. ONE. PENNY--to remain INDEPENDENT!

Your generosity, and that of tens of thousands of people like you, reaches and teaches millions of Americans nationwide. You'll help enroll millions more Americans in free online courses, expand the readership of _Imprimis_ , and restore excellence to K-12 education.

**Please show your support today by making your best tax-deductible gift of $50, $75, or $150 --or the best gift you can--by clicking the secure link below:**

[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/2025calendar**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2lrv0meeoecrd18p02rlp0l2tp4m50r3dtn4730_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c1hm0ob6c9h2bs)

And when you do, you'll claim your **2025 Hillsdale College calendar**. But you must act before February 28.

Thank you for being a steadfast Hillsdale supporter. Your generosity is needed now more than ever.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. **Claim your 2025 Hillsdale College calendar before February 28 at the secure link below:**

[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/2025calendar**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2za7bm1vhscig9ifc3h5rk3btdic0p8ft1j5rcfh8_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c1hm0ob6c9h2bs)

When you do, you will defend liberty and help us accomplish our mission year after year. **Everything we accomplish is only possible due to your continued generosity, so thank you for your support of our mission!**
---
| |
---

Pop Acta Media | ICYMI News
---
_PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zugt7vggmfj9c8lmhl7bpd7cj31oqp8k66qcjrrg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkir39tdkmeqjetjjkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8ob6chi61o3246h22sh2s8i6eob5c1hm0ob6c9h2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z75sojk06o16e514ppdlkn0lqoa8pj9v4crdhs28_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c1hm0ob6c9h2bs)_

body:
What happens tonight could define our race for a long time.

| | | Co-pilot— What happens tonight could define our race for a long time. We cannot afford to fall behind with all we are facing. **[I’m humbly asking you, if you are able, can I count on you to help me reach my first major goal of my campaign?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4otv1hsuq3k90vb7qfn3mr703rop2brhdqr4aco_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c1hm0ob2chh2bs)** Your Friend,John

---
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **John James**
Date: Mon, Apr 14, 2025
Subject: This is our first big test.
---
Friend, Our first **_REAL TEST_ **of strength is approaching. We’re hours away from the **FIRST mid-month fundraising deadline** of my campaign for Governor. I need to level with you. The Democrats will be looking for any weakness to exploit. **This is what they want to see: **
* They want to see that the America First movement is dying in Michigan.
* They want to see that they are on track to secure 4 MORE YEARS of their socialist corruption.
* They want to see us fail so they can breathe a sigh of relief.

**_I’m asking you to show them_**** _just how wrong they are._** This mission needs the full support of the America First grassroots movement if we’re going to have a chance to win this. **If you believe in this campaign,****now’s the time to step up****.** **[We can’t fall behind.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zajpump7beggb2hirienqshkrk04pevtj859d1n8_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c1hm0ob2chh2bs)**

Thank you for your support. Let’s fly,
John James

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Empower your child with timeless biblical values
body:
Do you ever despair that Jesus will never return

| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z2tpkqpddqga1gca9jmhulblqd51knnlf8mc0st0_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c1hm0ob2chh2bs)
---
Hello Friend,

Despite court rulings in Louisiana and Oklahoma that make the teaching of the Bible and the 10 Commandments mandatory in public schools and universities, we still live in a time when the foundational teachings of the Ten Commandments are no longer emphasized in our public schools and daily lives. As a result, our children are growing up without these essential, God-honoring rules for living.

In this culture of moral confusion, the Ten Commandments provide clear, simple answers about what it means to live a righteous life. Teaching these commandments to children not only instills a sense of security and purpose but also fosters emotional resilience, intellectual acuity, and ethical integrity. The Ten Commandments uphold traditional values and celebrate the family unit as foundational to society, helping children navigate life's challenges with confidence and grace.
---
| | That's why I'm excited to introduce my brand new kids book, _The 10 Commandments for Kids_ book. This book offers kids ten Bible lessons about God's simple rules for living, with each chapter explaining one commandment, discussion questions, applications, and prayers to say together. It's a trustworthy resource for children to read on their own, during church services, or as part of vacation Bible school studies.
---
| [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2ziholst0i6r491b78aer9a78unptvrvia4bn3ueo_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c1hm0ob2chh2bs)
---
| | Additionally, for the adults in your life, I've written,_The 10: How to Live and Love in a World That Has Lost Its Way_. This book will refresh your understanding and application of the Ten Commandments, showing how living by these principles can improve our personal lives, relationships, churches, and communities.

**I encourage you to point your children or grandchildren towards Jesus Christ.**

For a gift of any amount to support Pathway to Victory, I will send you both books: [https://secure.ptv.org/the-10-commandments-for-kids-generous-gift-1](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2znkau8vc8efhvsm3gbsb6hn4mhkatgc6l6o72noo_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c1hm0ob2chh2bs)

Your generosity enables _Pathway to Victory_ to share bold biblical truths with a broken world. Together, we will make a difference and bring people closer to Christ.

Thank you for standing with us and sharing the gospel of Jesus Christ.

Sharing the Truth of God's Word,

Dr. Robert Jeffress
---

Pop Acta Media | Updates for Great Americans
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z7madhnjjk7dt9o500ji8bt2m6jehq0ee3msgtn8_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c1hm0ob2chh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pqas3h6gonadjj6up7ecjl6gon8ddl69qbcd1jmppqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4c5j68p37cth2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zn91jcoq8ea38kjfu2rbfa9qqra25pjd8ij9e14o_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c1hm0ob2chh2bs)_

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Empower your child with timeless biblical values
body:
Do you ever despair that Jesus will never return

| | | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2ztn1gt09akmvkpcpsvpk1rb6dbul75aoou45r240_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c1hm8pj6cdh2bs)
---
Hello Friend,

Despite court rulings in Louisiana and Oklahoma that make the teaching of the Bible and the 10 Commandments mandatory in public schools and universities, we still live in a time when the foundational teachings of the Ten Commandments are no longer emphasized in our public schools and daily lives. As a result, our children are growing up without these essential, God-honoring rules for living.

In this culture of moral confusion, the Ten Commandments provide clear, simple answers about what it means to live a righteous life. Teaching these commandments to children not only instills a sense of security and purpose but also fosters emotional resilience, intellectual acuity, and ethical integrity. The Ten Commandments uphold traditional values and celebrate the family unit as foundational to society, helping children navigate life's challenges with confidence and grace.
---
| | That's why I'm excited to introduce my brand new kids book, _The 10 Commandments for Kids_ book. This book offers kids ten Bible lessons about God's simple rules for living, with each chapter explaining one commandment, discussion questions, applications, and prayers to say together. It's a trustworthy resource for children to read on their own, during church services, or as part of vacation Bible school studies.
---
| [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z78kf4v24mm799h3g5pkun9hqbpchrr5og06p8ko_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c1hm8pj6cdh2bs)
---
| | Additionally, for the adults in your life, I've written,_The 10: How to Live and Love in a World That Has Lost Its Way_. This book will refresh your understanding and application of the Ten Commandments, showing how living by these principles can improve our personal lives, relationships, churches, and communities.

**I encourage you to point your children or grandchildren towards Jesus Christ.**

For a gift of any amount to support Pathway to Victory, I will send you both books: [https://secure.ptv.org/the-10-commandments-for-kids-generous-gift-1](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z4sthm91g1mgmme3bm8hrhe1anifje2lln1k58co_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c1hm8pj6cdh2bs)

Your generosity enables _Pathway to Victory_ to share bold biblical truths with a broken world. Together, we will make a difference and bring people closer to Christ.

Thank you for standing with us and sharing the gospel of Jesus Christ.

Sharing the Truth of God's Word,

Dr. Robert Jeffress
---

Pop Acta Media | First Look News
---

name: Kimberly Begg
subject: YETI tried to cancel us
body:
That’s right, YETI is canceling conservative women.

| | |
---
| | [](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zsd4ogrbo2g4fns8a8vephcgjrb1dt8v5hq8pdig_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c1hm8pj6clh2bs)
---
| | Fellow Patriot, **[I need you to stand with me because woke corporations are censoring conservatives...and this time they’re targeting women.](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zqjetig1fj0afp22dcn2nvss556a6icpfp297vc8_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c1hm8pj6clh2bs)** **That’s right, YETI is canceling conservative women.**[](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zjp1n2nk5kppqk88vq0kjdmc5tj6vhip44lalurg_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c1hm8pj6clh2bs)
---
| | Here’s what happened...our non-profit organization has a custom YETI mug that we give to guests, supporters, and staff as a reminder of what we’re fighting for every day. When we were running low, we put in another order to restock. Everything seemed to be going smoothly; we received email confirmation, and our _$1,608 payment was processed_. But then our order was suddenly **canceled** without warning.
---
| [](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z0haaqu0ri9ie8inegq7a2n8sjk4gql26mjgfp90_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c1hm8pj6clh2bs)
---
| | We reached out to YETI and the manager told us outright that **_YETI would not write the phrase “Conservative Women” on a product_**. **[Friend, we can’t let corporate America continue to attack and silence conservatives like us any longer. We must fight back.](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zhfh4jbnu9680havcdik8go423k2s4jq5a5n8t00_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c1hm8pj6clh2bs)** My name is Kimberly Begg and I’m the President of the Clare Boothe Luce Center for Conservative Women. For more than 30 years, the Luce Center has supported young women in embracing their conservative values and contributing to a stronger, freer America. YETI claims they can’t provide “political” products; but as a 501C(3) non-profit organization, by law we are NOT a political entity. We’re an educational organization that helps young women become strong, conservative leaders through programs like internships, national student summits, campus lectures, firearms training, and so much more. They just don’t want to see girls and young women stand strong for faith and family. And their “non-political” stance doesn’t stop them from working with clearly left-wing organizations like _**The Venture Out Project**_ , an “ _LGBTQ organization_ ” that takes LGBTQ adults on hiking trips and “ _overnight adventures_ ” with “ _queer and transgender_ ” youth...yikes. In fact, _**The Venture Out Project**_ isn’t just a customer of YETI, they’re part of their “**Partnership Program** ,” showing how deeply YETI is invested in promoting radical left-wing causes. My friend, we can’t let them get away with this blatant double standard. **[So today, I’m asking you to stand alongside the Luce Center with your generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more.](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z6b3i3u0jvetbkd78efv7lp18k6pf4hgd9psgghg_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c1hm8pj6clh2bs) ** This isn’t about a mug. It’s about the radical left attacking the values – like faith, family, and freedom – that make our country great. For years, conservatives have been de-platformed, canceled, and ruined by the rabid left-wing radicals who wage a relentless attack – simply because we don’t align with liberal ideology. And it won’t stop until we take a stand. I’m not asking you to boycott YETI, although I would certainly understand not wanting to give them your business... [**Instead, I’m asking you to make a POSITIVE change through your generous tax-deductible donation to the Luce Center. ** ](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2znjrs39o7hvfibcolfqspb24cgg1o1eja2eo7qd8_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c1hm8pj6clh2bs) You’ll be part of a tidal wave of conservative support that shows left-wing companies like YETI we WILL NOT stand for the double-standards, the targeting, or the canceling any longer. And **[**if you give a gift of $200 or more**](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z2ie7ddnsalls9241pua2b9h3on4l29d1fsjjssg_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c1hm8pj6clh2bs)** , as a ‘thank you’ we would love to send you one of our _NEW_ mugs designed by a brand that _unapologetically supports conservative women_. The time to act is now and your support is more critical than ever before.In Friendship & Freedom,
---
Kimberly BeggPresident
---
| |
---
|
---
| | P.S. Friend, this isn’t about a mug. It’s about the radical left attacking the values – like faith, family, and freedom – that make our country great. [**Join the Luce Center in fighting back against cancelation of conservative values by making a tax-deductible donation today**](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z9qk6r460vpn5cin51vtcksat5tgd3b52kkrsi2g_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c1hm8pj6clh2bs). And **[if you give a gift of $200 or more](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zr3r45lbm84023nq7lvrrmgg7cfrjeve1srl6dfg_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c1hm8pj6clh2bs)** , as a ‘thank you’ we would love to send you one of our _NEW_ mugs designed by a brand that _unapologetically_ supports conservative women.
---
[ **DONATE**](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z4dq8d4rglmr8couei0iup0phdbc1d4bdijf6ieo_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c1hm8pj6clh2bs)

And their “non-political” stance doesn’t stop them from working with clearly left-wing organizations like The Venture Out Project , an “ LGBTQ organization ” that takes LGBTQ adults on hiking trips and “ overnight adventures ” with “ queer and transgender ” youth...yikes. In fact, The Venture Out Project isn’t just a customer of YETI, they’re part of their “Partnership Program ,” showing how deeply YETI is invested in promoting radical left-wing causes. My friend, we can’t let them get away with this blatant double standard. This isn’t about a mug. It’s about the radical left attacking the values – like faith, family, and freedom – that make our country great. For years, conservatives have been de-platformed, canceled, and ruined by the rabid left-wing radicals who wage a relentless attack – simply because we don’t align with liberal ideology. And it won’t stop until we take a stand. I’m not asking you to boycott YETI, although I would certainly understand not wanting to give them your business... You’ll be part of a tidal wave of conservative support that shows left-wing companies like YETI we WILL NOT stand for the double-standards, the targeting, or the canceling any longer. And , as a ‘thank you’ we would love to send you one of our NEW mugs designed by a brand that unapologetically supports conservative women. The time to act is now and your support is more critical than ever before.In Friendship & Freedom, Kimberly BeggPresident | | | | | P.S. Friend, this isn’t about a mug. It’s about the radical left attacking the values – like faith, family, and freedom – that make our country great. . And , as a ‘thank you’ we would love to send you one of our NEW mugs designed by a brand that unapologetically supports conservative women. Clare Boothe Luce Center for Conservative Women, 112 Elden St., Suite P, Herndon, VA Pop Acta Media | Your America PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

| | |
---
| |
# _Budget Update_
**We have just a few more days of the 2025 Legislative Session.** This past week, the Indiana Senate Democrats offered over 60 amendments to the State Budget, [HB 1001](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=0b016549afb90e13f778c9259e0a93928a45b76ae6fa316d0f7af3ad804b00444cbb7f146c396da17fcab9d424a5519fe8c1bff21cd393c7 "HB 1001"). Over five hours, my colleagues and I presented amendments that prioritize the health and wellness of our state, support public education in our state and empower working Hoosiers. Here are some of the ideas we were proud to champion on behalf of the folks we represent: **🏘 ️Empowering Working Hoosiers🏘️**
* Freezing property taxes for veterans and seniors
* Sales tax exemptions for menstrual products and adult diapers
* Sales tax holidays for school shopping
* Increased funding for affordable workforce housing

**🎒 Supporting Public Education🎒**
* Ensuring our teachers are making at least $60,000 per year
* Expanding our Secured Safety Grant
* Holding schools that receive vouchers dollar accountable
* Addressing school counselor ratios in our state

**🥼 Prioritizing Health and Wellness🥼**
* Requiring Medicaid to cover Doula services
* Increasing Community Mental Health funding
* Funding cancer research
* Investing in birth control access

The Republican supermajority voted down every single one of the amendments above, **plus many more**. All of these were aimed at improving the lives of all those who call this state home and we will continue advocating for these ideas and fighting for you. **We know the stakes are high, and we will continue doing everything within our power to meet this moment.** **Make sure you are following my social media channels for daily updates about session and our District 46 community. **
---
#
* * *
---
| | |
## _Budget Forecast _
This week we received a concerning update that our state is bringing in **less money than expected**. In fact, we are facing a $2.4 billion shortfall for this upcoming budget.

The Indiana Senate Democrats have taken charge and are offering solutions to help ensure we are not making major cuts to essential services over the next week to make up the difference.

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: Your 2025 Hillsdale College Calendar
body:
It is, therefore, completely unaccountable to “we the people.”.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdabe990v5tknpmurfph1lv9sivlkk7n09810rqo_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c1hm2o32clh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

I'm reaching out to you today because I'd like to send you your **2025 Hillsdale College calendar**.

I know, I know. It's a little early to be thinking about 2025. But since you're someone who cares about liberty, I wanted to make sure you had this chance to get the 2025 calendar.

**Claim your 2025 Hillsdale College calendar before February 28 by clicking on this secure link:**

[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/2025calendar**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdcd36825cgd4c7rqg2i3ak5b4r9ejog8r857akg_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c1hm2o32clh2bs)

As you know, we live in an era of increasing bureaucratic despotism. You've seen it, and you understand. More and more, we are ruled by an administrative state that operates without the say of our elected representatives.

It is, therefore, completely **unaccountable** to "we the people."

This collapse of the separation of powers has spread far beyond the federal level into our states, our cities, and maybe even where you live!

One particularly disturbing example is in our K-12 schools...

At these schools, swarms of administrators impose dangerous ideologies and actively undermine parents.

In higher education--especially at taxpayer-funded state universities--bloated administrations push ideologies that teach young Americans to disrespect or even hate their country.

But thanks to our supporters, we remain free of this corrupting influence. We stay true to our mission...

...to provide "sound learning" that preserves "the blessings of civil and religious liberty."

Indeed, as the crisis in our nation has deepened in recent years, we have redoubled our efforts to extend this mission nationwide. But we've only been able to do so thanks to supporters like you.

**Just in the last year, our dedicated supporters have helped to ...**
* **Teach 4 million Americans in Hillsdale 's _free_ online courses**, including "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution," "The American Left: From Liberalism to Despotism," and our newest course, "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism."

* **Distribute hundreds of thousands of free copies of the Constitution** to citizens nationwide--especially younger Americans, especially thousands of K-12 students.

* **Provide an American classical education** to young students nationwide through K-12 education programs, returning excellence and proper civics instruction to K-12 classrooms.

* **Expand the circulation of _Imprimis_** , Hillsdale's monthly digest of liberty, to more than 6.7 million households and businesses.

I hope you'll claim your **2025 Hillsdale College calendar** so that when you use it next year, you'll remember how you can advance the important work of defending liberty through education.

Remember, your support is especially crucial because we refuse every penny of government funding--even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. NOT. ONE. PENNY--to remain INDEPENDENT!

Your generosity, and that of tens of thousands of people like you, reaches and teaches millions of Americans nationwide. You'll help enroll millions more Americans in free online courses, expand the readership of _Imprimis_ , and restore excellence to K-12 education.

**Please show your support today by making your best tax-deductible gift of $50, $75, or $150 --or the best gift you can--by clicking the secure link below:**

[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/2025calendar**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zc8osqmc1e4e5im40lcofeb15m5hha6fkdo1le90_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c1hm2o32clh2bs)

And when you do, you'll claim your **2025 Hillsdale College calendar**. But you must act before February 28.

Thank you for being a steadfast Hillsdale supporter. Your generosity is needed now more than ever.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. **Claim your 2025 Hillsdale College calendar before February 28 at the secure link below:**

[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/2025calendar**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zo2o5du2ca10bsjmioupq1rsud6saprtaau3bsbg_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c1hm2o32clh2bs)

When you do, you will defend liberty and help us accomplish our mission year after year. **Everything we accomplish is only possible due to your continued generosity, so thank you for your support of our mission!**
---
| |
---

Pop Acta Media | 1600 Daily
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Tim Scott
subject: Democrats are on the move
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
we must turn the tide

Friend,

Democrats are on the move.

Jon Ossoff set a fundraising record in Georgia. Democrats outraised Republicans 10:1 and 3:1 in special elections.

If they keep outraising us, they have a better chance of taking back the Senate. And if they take back the Senate, it will be even more difficult to keep prices low, the border secure, and President Trump's agenda moving.

**[That's why I'm asking conservatives like you to step up in the next hour. Let's act before it's too late.](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zq62jtcrc4covnm4k2ff5djvshmi4u7ssms30qa8_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c1hm2p76c1h2bs)**

Thank you,
[](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zm94cimvjde8ngrr62ccf400urkg80r709c5qm18_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c1hm2p76c1h2bs)
Tim Scott
NRSC Chairman

name: Gary Sinise
subject: Celebrating the 20th Anniversary of the National Memorial Day Parade
body:
'
It’s Gary Sinise here... I’m grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event.

It's Gary Sinise here... I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event. It's Gary Sinise here... I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event.
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zn8omj84ujfaa0161j6g7gen3p61gh27g3dbt4do_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c1hm2p76c9h2bs)
---
Friend, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 __and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY - but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. I've served as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. nearly every year since American Veterans Center revived it in 2005. **Now, I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event.** This year will be a remembrance like no other, as we commemorate the 80th anniversary of victory in World War II and the 250th birthdays of the U.S. Army, Navy, and Marine Corps. **[Friend, the National Memorial Day Parade is ENTIRELY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ziu1qtm0rijcflar110ed91v8ahcclk2dpotppeg_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c1hm2p76c9h2bs)**
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zd1o3fq95pcj5s69h0k9r6tfq8s6eh30eu7tvvu8_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c1hm2p76c9h2bs)
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6ec7q6kptq61ogbmvr98e3n01evkr58ld9kehc0_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c1hm2p76c9h2bs)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, _the entire parade_ costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that 's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ **But I want to reiterate that American Veterans Center does not take ANY federal funding for this event. It is funded _entirely_ by private citizens like you who want to honor those who have sacrificed so much for our country.** Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever.

* Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.

* Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom.

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7s6g6li0c41h5rh7049sc0ocmk0asfb18b48v4o_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c1hm2p76c9h2bs)[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7068g25rdeca5e5jpekf14jgvss6umstdnmev98_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c1hm2p76c9h2bs) If you've been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best possible ways you could do it. _And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get._ You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C., for the parade is difficult. WWII veterans were a key part of the first parade when it was revived in 2005, as they have been every year since for the last 20 years. _But this may be the last year we have the opportunity to have these brave men and women with us for the parade._** ** **That's why we are making a concerted effort to ensure these veterans are at this year's National Memorial Day Parade to honor them one last time. ** So this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of victory in Europe and Japan to end World War II - and the 250th anniversaries of the Army, Navy, and Marine Corps - I encourage you to help us honor these brave veterans while we still have them with us.
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zt5qbe1m7h84dtepl5nnsb20nnvenq60nr6movko_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c1hm2p76c9h2bs)
---
And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day - not just this momentous year of military milestones, but every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._ _**[Friend, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please - if you're able, make a gift to fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now during its 20th anniversary.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7c43ccrdukn6bbl776hu1d52eoenkl7cfcg0c68_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c1hm2p76c9h2bs)**_ Sincerely, Gary SiniseHonorary Grand MarshalNational Memorial Day Parade
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7uk8jhi8c07bphgpn22vr0tpog12i4de32na9p8_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c1hm2p76c9h2bs)
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4p9bg8s932gdj48lbdhjfmmqvb5f6t4cvfl0mtg_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c1hm2p76c9h2bs)
---

A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. (C) American Veterans Center

name: Patriot Alerts
subject: New GOP bill: Make Easter Monday a national holiday.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
We need your input before the holiday weekend.

| | | [](https://trk.emails.troydowning._ocXRc80Gg)
---
Big news from Capitol Hill: **Republicans just introduced a bill to make Easter Monday a federal holiday.** It’s a bold, unapologetic stand for _**FAITH & FAMILY.**_After years of watching the Left strip away our values _**like canceling Christmas symbols, mocking people of faith, and promoting woke garbage**_ , it’s time to stand together as “One Nation, Under God.” Easter Monday is a sacred time for millions of families and deserves proper recognition. This bill sends a powerful message, but you already know what’s coming:_**-The media elites will be laughing.**_
_**-The Left will call it “insensitive.”**_
_**-And woke Democrats will do everything they can to KILL this bill.**_ Peter, will you speak up before they shut it down? This is your chance to show GOP leaders where you stand.[**Do you support making Easter Monday a federal holiday? Send in your rapid response before 8 P.M. >>**](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---

---
Stand for faith. Stand for family. Stand for America. Thank you for your support.**-Patriot Alerts (via Team Downing)**

body:
Interim IRS commissioner Gary Shapley has been ousted from the role [just two days after taking it](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOpCAUhZ8GOwwgOmNBsY3dbLulQbyMdwfBcHGIb79xX-HvTnKSk_N9f17zy2LA-P5tdzDFpzlCpQClQJ4xE232A-dxEpWMH6ALdoh2VkL1XGgux3m1GK5ZN6vxAAq6Box86F70Dzl0zWZ6533nn891EFYr2S2j1dpJvYyjH6R2DZp7TWg5SiEGIdp-cKtTHqB_Qj8sgmkBK5aU278JY9nAhyt9Ibcu7U0wWykHse4XUxNTU621dQvdFHfP1HRHpqa3zRenzR4BLr6dsUDmC64Qed2QSoAlpAqZp7NwSxwzcZf2HYkwRcgcQop8P-nD1NRksx4VQ0AaHkyL924x_L9TfuTwa9S_AAAA__9Tt4nl), the victim of an internal struggle between Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent and White House advisor Elon Musk.

# Saturday, April 19, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1775, the [American Revolutionary War](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGO8yAUBODT4A4LMCZ2QfE37vK3W1ov5hG_DQYLSCzffpVob7D1N5qR5us6X4ECxft_2NBWn-aIRwlYK-aZcikrPPC5P0upmR5YTtwwwqyE6rnQXI6zAwrnrBtnPaLCrkErL7oX_UWarlmtRzeA6cygtfOLBik7kF6Po1MjqsE0ZN9tQstRCmGEaHuzuEV5xH7A3twE0wId1ZTb70SxrujDmV6Y2yVtTbBrrXth3T-mJqam4zjalUpN-Xw7U1NdqXAHJ6fIf4WpCfZMgcvxE0AOG2ZaIPKMrxSelVLkN7xTLE22bj8oBCrmwrS4b0DhM13_9NfLqp8AAAD__155ga0) began when 700 British troops marched into Lexington to find 77 armed minutemen, led by Captain John Parker, waiting for them. The sight and sound of birds filling the air is a sure sign that spring is here. Today, we showcase some of [the best bird photographs of the year](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkMGOnSAYhZ8Gd9wAgo4LFk0ad9NtlwYvB_07KAbwWt--mfsKXZ-TL1--35_Tp6NI-_LLbbA1pGnHVSJqRZ4ol7K6L5zHWUrN9IVyY8PuJiWU4UJzOUzeUbwn3XgbAIW2gZW9NsL0smub1UIoqWcF2c4Kg9atnmc1dH3Ah4fuTUP2mya0HKQQnRAP0z39UwXAfMB0s2BawFNN-fEn0V5XhHinF_LjmbYm2rXWo7D2B1MjU-N1XY-YXsDfI6ZM-_L9YmpcXIzIhMLUKI3S2jA1znBnpXBGTptbUHjIaeN1BZ8pe36sqaYlu2NF5im8hxsuc3e57Atrx8MtYO1P2WTrj4tipNL1TItlcxTffvW_or6s-hcAAP__RPaNsg) in our _Et Cetera_ section. It's well worth checking out! We're sponsored today by [Dr. Steven Gundry](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkEtqwzAURVcjz2KevrYGGhSCM0oopZChkaOnWI38QZJjsvuSbqHjezkHzvXcn22IYb5f7ISm-KWfcc8RS8HUh5TzaB-4rVvOJYUH5hdOONueAZMHEAeqe2dDfPWicsYjMuQVGtoICbKhilej4VpSibpF9Bpx8GqwnDmn1dCCbLmrgnnTQFBNARRALdXN3ZhHlC1KNQARgC6UJdU_S5jLiD6-liem-rZMVTRjKWsm_IOwjrBu3_d6cmnF8p4J675OzeVyJKzj5-b79Hl933i3BUf4seGCMJW3gRJ-VBx0lYxb9xBjyKohAu6TDfHPU_4V52nYbwAAAP__C3513w).

## IRS Head Ousted After Just Two Days
Interim IRS commissioner Gary Shapley has been ousted from the role [just two days after taking it](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOpCAUhZ8GOwwgOmNBsY3dbLulQbyMdwfBcHGIb79xX-HvTnKSk_N9f17zy2LA-P5tdzDFpzlCpQClQJ4xE232A-dxEpWMH6ALdoh2VkL1XGgux3m1GK5ZN6vxAAq6Box86F70Dzl0zWZ6533nn891EFYr2S2j1dpJvYyjH6R2DZp7TWg5SiEGIdp-cKtTHqB_Qj8sgmkBK5aU278JY9nAhyt9Ibcu7U0wWykHse4XUxNTU621dQvdFHfP1HRHpqa3zRenzR4BLr6dsUDmC64Qed2QSoAlpAqZp7NwSxwzcZf2HYkwRcgcQop8P-nD1NRksx4VQ0AaHkyL924x_L9TfuTwa9S_AAAA__9Tt4nl), the victim of an internal struggle between Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent and White House advisor Elon Musk.

Musk backed Shapley for the job, and sources say he bypassed Bessent in getting Shapley the post. Bessent took issue with the appointment, according to reports, and [sought President Trump’s approval](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLuO2zAURL-G6mhQfHldsHCwUOc0KVIKNHlp3ywfAi-9gv8-UH4h3QCDGRyc37f15jFjffz0BdxIba2wU4YxoK_YiZ7-C17bi2h0_AJ6Q4HqVymk4ULz-bJGj_m96im6BCBBTeDmszbCnGerpqdTItxtTPPlbrxRQWmdTLQhJR-NEXae0B1vQs-XWQgrxMnYEINMAOYDjL0LpgVEHK2f_jSs4wkpv9s39FNoZcruOcZGTF2ZXJhc9n0_FapHx-QClb-IyWVrGQeGIz6OaS1QB5PL6K-ycR8LVqTR_cBWeYct-wDEfRhYHxw78dBKQSJsFTqTi-_8ep0_wwfcmFpawMjU549DI-z0C_o2dRe3HXNGsmemxaN4zP-Ax39Z_nbybwAAAP__ClmVEw) to undo the decision.

Shapley is the second interim IRS chief for the administration. He was appointed to replace former interim head Melanie Krause, who resigned over political differences with the White House. Deputy Treasury Secretary Michael Faulkender will now serve as acting head of the IRS while President Trump’s choice for the job, Billy Long, awaits Senate confirmation.
## U.S. Missile Strike Hits Yemeni Oil Port
The U.S. military [hit a Yemeni oil terminal](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2OqzAUBOCnMV3Q8S-hcHEbutx2S2TgOJyNwch2YvH2K_YVthtppE-a-XqMD0eB9ud_t6EtPo471hywFEwjpZxX98L38c65JHphPnHD3Y0ChL6BuvF-XByFc1TNYj2iQNmg5Z3SoDtuZLNa8KIH7tBrZxRMyiyuU-7ey05yPXFoyF4aKN5zAAPQajMvs_CI-o7aTMAU4EIlpvY70l5W9OGMH0ztHLcm2LWUIzP5j4mBiaHW2k7TfHVMDNcYJgaXCs0BrziHsz6l1OYOsUl2OSqFQNl0TMFzcxR-1fKnKz5W_AQAAP__hi1yOg) in a missile strike early Friday morning in one of the biggest U.S. attacks yet against Houthi rebels. Yemeni officials claimed more than 70 were killed in the attack on the Ras Isa oil terminal, which serves as an essential fueling hub sustaining Houthi attacks on shipping in the Red Sea. The attack reflects the ongoing U.S. campaign against the terror group’s infrastructure, following Houthi [attacks on American vessels](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOhCAYBOCn0U7zg4JaUFxjt9deaUB-lv8WxQC7xre_7OXe4OpJZvLN1225aQq03z_1hqq4uOx45oClYFoo5ez1A5_HM-eS6IH5wg13vXDgooG-YdNiNYVr6WurHCLHrkbFhl6AGJjsaq8kc8M0WWY6J4wUZsCBcWfEYA2MI9M1qXcb9GxiABKgFXK1K3eIYkQhDVQ9oKUSU_sdaS8eXbjiC1O7xq0Oypdy5Kr7qPhc8fk8z_bSPsZ3WvH5zan47OOzeMrNGjRtTcJ8xD2ToUDlav5sjb5r2nNpQIDkshtl68sW6qTscVIIlOVQ9XDfNIXf7fKvw16K_wQAAP__uVGBeQ) and missile strikes targeting Israel.
## List: How Americans Spend $19 Trillion
A report on [U.S. consumer spending](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DvO4yAUxfHV4A4LMI-koJjGXaad0iJwHd8JDwtwLO9-lNnC1_90jvT_81geDiPm12-XwPa1LBnOFqF3qAvW1jb3hmM_WusV39AuSJDdIphQlEnK70twGK9FDsGuAAKmASw3UjFluJ6GzXJlgr7BOilYJyOegT-lYcZ7rph3kx7QfteY5HfOmGZsVNoHL1YAdQOln4xIBgF7qePfgrlvsMarfKCOvqQh2q33vZHpFxEzEfN5nuMH2-Gidzt2F7H1LyRidgkqetcov9NeMUYsmfqS25GgUvAll3RRzLRkoH5ztRMxD9WG_fzipg2R7JUcxv_P_Ue5Plb8CwAA__8eRIGp) showed Americans spent nearly $19 trillion on goods and services, with housing, utilities, and health care topping the list. The Bureau of Labor Statistics used 2023 personal consumption data to determine spending on over a dozen categories.

Food and accommodations ranked fourth, followed by entertainment and transportation. U.S. households spent $3.3 trillion on housing and utilities, $3.1 trillion on health care, and $1.4 trillion on groceries. The data also revealed economic trends: spending on health care and housing is rising, while expenditures on clothing and food have declined. [See the full report here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DvO4yAUxfHV4A4LMI-koJjGXaad0iJwHd8JDwtwLO9-lNnC1_90jvT_81geDiPm12-XwPa1LBnOFqF3qAvW1jb3hmM_WusV39AuSJDdIphQlEnK70twGK9FDsGuAAKmASw3UjFluJ6GzXJlgr7BOilYJyOegT-lYcZ7rph3kx7QfteY5HfOmGZsVNoHL1YAdQOln4xIBgF7qePfgrlvsMarfKCOvqQh2q33vZHpFxEzEfN5nuMH2-Gidzt2F7H1LyRidgkqetcov9NeMUYsmfqS25GgUvAll3RRzLRkoH5ztRMxD9WG_fzipg2R7JUcxv_P_Ue5Plb8CwAA__8eRIGp).

**➤ The White House **on Friday replaced the federal Covid-19 website with a page detailing the origins of the pandemic as a Chinese lab leak mismanaged by former health officials, including Dr. Anthony Fauci. clean_body: Interim IRS commissioner Gary Shapley has been ousted from the role , the victim of an internal struggle between Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent and White House advisor Elon Musk. | | | | | | Saturday, April 19, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1775, the began when 700 British troops marched into Lexington to find 77 armed minutemen, led by Captain John Parker, waiting for them. The sight and sound of birds filling the air is a sure sign that spring is here. Today, we showcase some of in our Et Cetera section. It's well worth checking out! We're sponsored today by . | IRS Head Ousted After Just Two Days Interim IRS commissioner Gary Shapley has been ousted from the role , the victim of an internal struggle between Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent and White House advisor Elon Musk. Musk backed Shapley for the job, and sources say he bypassed Bessent in getting Shapley the post. Bessent took issue with the appointment, according to reports, and to undo the decision. Shapley is the second interim IRS chief for the administration. He was appointed to replace former interim head Melanie Krause, who resigned over political differences with the White House. Deputy Treasury Secretary Michael Faulkender will now serve as acting head of the IRS while President Trump’s choice for the job, Billy Long, awaits Senate confirmation. U.S. Missile Strike Hits Yemeni Oil Port The U.S. military in a missile strike early Friday morning in one of the biggest U.S. attacks yet against Houthi rebels. Yemeni officials claimed more than 70 were killed in the attack on the Ras Isa oil terminal, which serves as an essential fueling hub sustaining Houthi attacks on shipping in the Red Sea. The attack reflects the ongoing U.S. campaign against the terror group’s infrastructure, following Houthi and missile strikes targeting Israel. List: How Americans Spend $19 Trillion A report on showed Americans spent nearly $19 trillion on goods and services, with housing, utilities, and health care topping the list. The Bureau of Labor Statistics used 2023 personal consumption data to determine spending on over a dozen categories. Food and accommodations ranked fourth, followed by entertainment and transportation. U.S. households spent $3.3 trillion on housing and utilities, $3.1 trillion on health care, and $1.4 trillion on groceries. The data also revealed economic trends: spending on health care and housing is rising, while expenditures on clothing and food have declined. . | ➤ The White House on Friday replaced the federal Covid-19 website with a page detailing the origins of the pandemic as a Chinese lab leak mismanaged by former health officials, including Dr. Anthony Fauci. An image of the preemptive pardon given to Fauci by President Biden is shown on the page. () ➤ A federal judge temporarily blocked the Trump administration's push for mass layoffs at the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau, scheduling a hearing on the issue for April 28. () ➤ The government released about 10,000 pages of records related to the 1968 assassination of Sen. Robert F. Kennedy, including handwritten notes by the gunman, Sirhan Sirhan. () ➤ A member of Minnesota Gov. Tim Walz's administration has been caught on camera allegedly vandalizing parked Tesla vehicles with his keys. Police arrested him on suspicion of causing an estimated $20,000 in damage. () | Cereal for breakfast? It might be doing more harm than good... For years, big food companies told us cereal was a healthy way to start the day. But now, one top doctor is sounding the alarm... “It turns out, most cereals are packed with hidden sugars that can cause weight gain, low energy, and irregular bowel movements,” he says. In this short video, Dr. Steven Gundry reveals what’s really in your morning bowl of cereal — and what to eat instead. | ➤The NCAA just approved a series of rule changes, including one that calls for in-game punishments for college football teams who fake injuries. () ➤ The Stanley Cup Playoffs begin tonight with matchups in both Winnipeg and Dallas. The Maple Leafs, Golden Knights, and Jets topped CBS’ pre-playoff power rankings. | | Dear Fellow American,

I'm glad you opened my email today! I have something urgent to ask you that will shape the future of our families, communities, and country.

[**Will you take our National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT)?**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/uUI4oB9fMJc0tkkRsM0iMA~~/AARclBA~/1gCegeTCXDoZAoUuMqCkNjGhnrbRPDLTDFqQykWZl6q5eygBZZgWJ0L8CLbmO3dYny8BpvbkucQRFmDZtprXPauXLQ8kvOtqNYmeQlldIFE7eVaQEVEaLAOFADOreeOcPQWhAVrVhnQCLVthzQnMmKJDF2j2IQ5iKnN-qbUR2clRmvgH92mJcbZeN6axfwI01WnBr5qQe2Mle4kBX3ZMccwLo9xRcc47SSTEaE9lZrz8PM0x-ABtV33wzhkZ9G-phXbiFiJsMr47eEMLtyZdlqc49SOSoprUbFOuw0n537o~)

Your participation will help us understand and address many Americans' concerns about CRT's influence on our society.

This survey will only take just a few minutes.

But in those few minutes, you'll help us gather important insights to defend America's founding principles of liberty...

...and ensure a bright future for our children and grandchildren.

**You can share your thoughts on CRT in the National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory Survey here:**

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/uUI4oB9fMJc0tkkRsM0iMA~~/AARclBA~/1gCegeTCXDoZAoUuMqCkNjGhnrbRPDLTDFqQykWZl6q5eygBZZgWJ0L8CLbmO3dYny8BpvbkucQRFmDZtprXPauXLQ8kvOtqNYmeQlldIFE7eVaQEVEaLAOFADOreeOcPQWhAVrVhnQCLVthzQnMmKJDF2j2IQ5iKnN-qbUR2clRmvgH92mJcbZeN6axfwI01WnBr5qQe2Mle4kBX3ZMccwLo9xRcc47SSTEaE9lZrz8PM0x-ABtV33wzhkZ9G-phXbiFiJsMr47eEMLtyZdlqc49SOSoprUbFOuw0n537o~)

Sharing your opinion is an important way you'll combat the spread of CRT in our schools and workplaces. Together, we can preserve the constitutional and free-enterprise principles that made our nation so great and so free.

Thanks in advance! I look forward to seeing your response.

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

name: History Facts
subject: This legendary mail service only lasted 18 months
body:
On April 3, 1860, a pair of riders took off from their respective starting points of St. Joseph, Missouri, and Sacramento, California, with the goal of delivering a backpack of mail to the other city within 10 days.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc69ofsne1xhrvrbthiuyg4xn3174so1dfxe8ta3g3y6l23lm61e0z9r2st6ihl5pgsed3ze1ypq60g6t036e6aa2igio7yl60mvwqg3kjocukofb2vz8en5ayoqn1900m2oskcurv9vw7vol11&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suynhj&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [The Pony Express only lasted a year and a half.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suynhj&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [U.S. History](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suynhj&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suynhj&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| O n April 3, 1860, a pair of riders [took off](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suynhj&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) from their respective starting points of St. Joseph, Missouri, and Sacramento, California, with the goal of delivering a backpack of mail to the other city within 10 days. The route stretched across the Midwestern plains and Western deserts and mountains, the riders stopping for fresh horses every 10 to 15 miles before handing off to another rider after a few stops.
---
The mailbags reached their destinations on April 14, just past the 10-day goal but fast enough to demonstrate that the Central Overland California & Pikes Peak Express Company, aka the Pony Express, could deliver mail at a speed that bested existing services by weeks.
The Pony Express was [founded](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suynhj&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) by businessmen William Russell, William Waddell, and Alexander Majors, who hoped to secure an exclusive mail contract from the federal government with their new service. For a while they succeeded, despite expensive rates and the disruption caused by various conflicts between Indigenous peoples and settlers.
California grew accustomed to faster communication with Eastern cities, while [riders](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suynhj&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) came to be treated like celebrities. The high point for the service came in November 1860, when the Pony Express relayed the news of Abraham Lincoln's presidential election from Fort Kearny, Nebraska, to Fort Churchill, Nevada, in a whopping five days.
But for all the hoopla surrounding the enterprise, the Pony Express had a short shelf life. The telegraph already stretched from the East Coast to the Mississippi River by the time the first two riders galloped off, and by June of 1860, Congress had authorized the subsidization of a coast-to-coast telegraph system.
Meanwhile, Russell, Waddell, and Majors faced mounting operating losses that forced them to cede control of the service's western division by the spring of 1861. The completion of the transcontinental telegraph line that October marked the official demise of the Pony Express, ending the service that blazed in and out of existence yet left an indelible imprint as an emblem of the Old West.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suynhj&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suynhj&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---

## Buffalo Bill falsely claimed to be a Pony Express rider.
Already famous by way of the dime novels that glorified life on the American frontier, William "Buffalo Bill" Cody published an 1879 autobiography that [boasted](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suynhj&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) about his two years of service in the Pony Express, highlighted by one particularly impressive 322-mile run. A few years later, he dramatized his life experiences for the famed "Buffalo Bill’s Wild West Show," which featured a reenactment of the Pony Express as part of its thrilling opening act. Of course, Cody was never shy about embellishing stories for the sake of entertainment, and it seems his tenure with the Pony Express was a distortion of the truth. Although he did work as a deliveryman in an earlier enterprise, a teenaged Cody was [attending school](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suynhj&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) in Leavenworth, Kansas, during the time the Pony Express was operating. Nevertheless, the deception worked out well for both entities: Buffalo Bill could claim a connection to the celebrated mail service, while his long-running show ensured the legend of the Pony Express, and other touchpoints of frontier life, would endure for generations to come.
