clean_body: On April 3, 1860, a pair of riders took off from their respective starting points of St. Joseph, Missouri, and Sacramento, California, with the goal of delivering a backpack of mail to the other city within 10 days. | O n April 3, 1860, a pair of riders from their respective starting points of St. Joseph, Missouri, and Sacramento, California, with the goal of delivering a backpack of mail to the other city within 10 days. The route stretched across the Midwestern plains and Western deserts and mountains, the riders stopping for fresh horses every 10 to 15 miles before handing off to another rider after a few stops. The mailbags reached their destinations on April 14, just past the 10-day goal but fast enough to demonstrate that the Central Overland California & Pikes Peak Express Company, aka the Pony Express, could deliver mail at a speed that bested existing services by weeks. The Pony Express was by businessmen William Russell, William Waddell, and Alexander Majors, who hoped to secure an exclusive mail contract from the federal government with their new service. For a while they succeeded, despite expensive rates and the disruption caused by various conflicts between Indigenous peoples and settlers. California grew accustomed to faster communication with Eastern cities, while came to be treated like celebrities. The high point for the service came in November 1860, when the Pony Express relayed the news of Abraham Lincoln's presidential election from Fort Kearny, Nebraska, to Fort Churchill, Nevada, in a whopping five days. But for all the hoopla surrounding the enterprise, the Pony Express had a short shelf life. The telegraph already stretched from the East Coast to the Mississippi River by the time the first two riders galloped off, and by June of 1860, Congress had authorized the subsidization of a coast-to-coast telegraph system. Meanwhile, Russell, Waddell, and Majors faced mounting operating losses that forced them to cede control of the service's western division by the spring of 1861. The completion of the transcontinental telegraph line that October marked the official demise of the Pony Express, ending the service that blazed in and out of existence yet left an indelible imprint as an emblem of the Old West. | By clicking a link in this email, you're agreeing to our and . Thank you for supporting our advertisers! | By the Numbers | | Miles covered on the Pony Express route 1,966 | | Maximum weight (in pounds) of a Pony Express rider 125 | Maximum weight (in pounds) of a Pony Express rider 125 | | Alleged age of the Pony Express' youngest rider 11 | | Bags of mail reportedly lost by the Pony Express 1 | Bags of mail reportedly lost by the Pony Express 1 | | | Did you know? ---|---|--- Buffalo Bill falsely claimed to be a Pony Express rider. Already famous by way of the dime novels that glorified life on the American frontier, William "Buffalo Bill" Cody published an 1879 autobiography that about his two years of service in the Pony Express, highlighted by one particularly impressive 322-mile run. A few years later, he dramatized his life experiences for the famed "Buffalo Bill’s Wild West Show," which featured a reenactment of the Pony Express as part of its thrilling opening act. Of course, Cody was never shy about embellishing stories for the sake of entertainment, and it seems his tenure with the Pony Express was a distortion of the truth. Although he did work as a deliveryman in an earlier enterprise, a teenaged Cody was in Leavenworth, Kansas, during the time the Pony Express was operating. Nevertheless, the deception worked out well for both entities: Buffalo Bill could claim a connection to the celebrated mail service, while his long-running show ensured the legend of the Pony Express, and other touchpoints of frontier life, would endure for generations to come. ## Slain Teen’s Dad Disrupts Press Conference
A press conference held by the family of Karmelo Anthony, the 17-year-old accused of killing Austin Metcalf, also 17, was thrown into chaos [when the murdered boy's father](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkcGOpCAQhp8Gb2UQsYUDh56deJu97GGPBqFUMggGGO1--42-wt4qqeSr-r__79f4pZ13YfmtN1TlNccx4Jk9loJpPGPyNqGJyc4urwVfOm9uSXpklHVAOTRytNr598grqyZqZVOhanre0QflXV-tqpWTNBNjs7FCMIMCTWeolJO1ehbYVU5dMMob2TSUdrwWwsquFZbxB5e0N4RTtK7EVJcV7x9m_44HptrErfJqLWXPpH0SNhA2nOdZbzlcO8IGDPCTCRuuUIQN93wjYE-YM5gYZkwYDIILoH9ycQE2LEb7Gb6dv9SAxSP6AzO4UCKYVccM130oSZtv2BAL5KKnyYWFsEEneD6bT_Hxy5J2iMZZ0n5-XI7xzH8w7VVSdj8veH70hNNl087fYcr_VXAo9i8AAP__TMue3Q) showed up. Jeff Metcalf, Austin's dad, was escorted out of the press conference [under threat of criminal trespass](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2SgyAUhZ8GOxwgEKSg2MYu227pIFwjswgZuInx7XfMK2x7f775zvm5TTcXU8z3b7eBxfdSpgx7S4AIddpLTaGCLzUssa0Ib9e2eK9uEkwoyiTlZgoupmOSXbAzC4Z3YLmWil2ZVLpbrTZqViCNCto5w4FrD1rJYNzFzFwMXbQnjEluOGdMyX4YglGXIQh5lYZpTySDELHUHlf4OCzpKC-ovS9bl-yK-Gjk8kXESMS473vv53amOPdEjJ8XIsZzRMTong1jphugd2lpdHG4QqXQfKkIgZYn0l9XN0iFuoxrycd5tMV00BNBfckLVMgeiBi7asNjjynFdtVEsvvmYvqI4f_qfFnxFwAA__9-yoz1). Its host, Dominique Alexander, said Metcalf’s presence showed “disrespect." The press conference was meant to address allegations that more than $450,000 raised for Anthony’s family has been spent improperly, and to allow Anthony’s mother, Kayla Hayes, to read a prepared statement. Both Alexander and Hayes later insisted that Anthony’s family had not spent any of the money raised, with Hayes adding that her family is living in fear of violent threats.
## Texas Grad Schools Among Best in Nation
_U.S. News & World Report_ recently ranked the [best graduate schools](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGO6yAYBODTQGcL8I8xBcVr0uW1WyJifmwkHCIgIbn9yrnC1iN9mpmfq726mOJ9--8ONO0dsr1jrwlbw2J7LskXXHPxIda94dvVI27FWcGEHBgMXFvvYvpYoN7cmNecouEKJJsZSEV3MwUlF4mT9lyqMDuBEOQ8oUKQQitNozkxBlxzzpiEcVm8ltPiBcygmVoJMPSx5TK2Hb8dQvrkF5ZxzQdNZm_tUcn0j4gLEZfe-_is54gzJuJyw9qGrTj_dA2Huu45p0qL8Y8eU4p1VgTYdriYvl772wsvI34DAAD__6dqcZI) in the country, and the state of Texas is well represented. The University of Texas at Austin took the [highest rankings](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2O6yAUhJ_G7rDgGP9QUNzGXW67pQWcYxstNhGQOHn7Vax9g-2mGH36Zr5u88344I_1v9lJl9cS54POHKgUSvMZU8BELiZcfN4KvUze_ZrMDBw6xiUTakbjw3uWNWrLUYmatBhkx3suu6HetFKDBbEAgAM7yoW3UjgA27fYW6ew9voD41IoITjvZDOOqLp2RJC9VHxwleSEvsTUlI0uhyW845NS4-JeB72Vcs9V-6-CqYLpPM8GTQgmR5sp_dYqmD67KpguAFuTwYcpxLLbYgyZJXN8EzKzx2NlZSNmKRfmjys_MgMQoh2EqJPG--lD8LkfKsnX3fhwiZS_3ffU8BMAAP__GlOFOw) in the state across multiple categories, reaching the top 10 overall for its education and engineering schools and scoring No. 14 and No. 16 for its law and business schools, respectively. Looking at individual programs, UT Austin offers the No. 1 accounting program and the No. 1 petroleum engineering program in the country. Texas A&M also made the top 100 in all four major categories, ranking at No. 15 for its engineering school.
## World Record Fish Caught in Texas
Kentucky fisherman Art Weston made the most of a trip to Texas earlier this month, catching the world’s [largest freshwater fish](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGO5CAQRU-Ds2oBjY0dEGxCNptuaNFQttGUoQXM9Pj2K7uPMHFJr977_z7mDxcppvWv29G0nyXPCV-VsDUs8ysXCgV9LmGJdWv44-oe1-JmyWUPXIGY5uAiHbPqgnnwMIkOjdCq5wNXve42o3EMQqOUy4DBCz9IFcR98IPQU3hMvIvmhHElJiE479VtHMPU38cg1aAmrj1THENsudzahpfDQkf-xnLzee_IbK09K7v_YdIyadPxzLWdJybtSWbScsWkFZpJ-1Xh7GPSurQSFiCXQgWKn0gHXL3wDgYNS84NHuhqg6XkHa7fQO4TISaguCD4zRFhWmNawbvmN2jlC0G8iXHLOTBpu2LC8xWJYh00U3zdXaTLvv1u828j_wcAAP__IZqW2g) ever using ultra-light tackle. Weston landed a 7-feet-3-inch [153-pound alligator gar](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2SpDAMRk8Dmbr8RwMBwSZks-mGlNo2RjUCd9maYfr2W80eYXPV0_fen4_lA4npSL9xj5P8rHk54lk5isSynLlwKNHnElaqm8QfrDulgotRpgPlQI9LQOLX4towPVQYdRsn3btO3ZXr-nabXOetfTi76lU5pWy_Ojs-vH8ErVerVUvTG6acHrVWqnO3YQhjZ4dg3N2NqveNUzGQ5HKTLV4bVn7l71huPu8tT5vIszb2V2Pmxszned7qTrLVfBAeO6b3WWPmumMReNs1ZsYjcSzgUfwWK-jOwjN_HQGQmRJKLpCwAB1wPYSTZIMvloLAlDYBQf_JEZg-I7-gRhE6EuCbD1c2-NcN9KDG4e6ca8zclik8T2Kmeu8bp9KOxJeF_F_778n8DQAA___EGZtD) after a two-mile, nearly four-hour chase across Lake Livingston, calling it “the most challenging catch” of his life. With the catch, which he called “a true 1% likelihood,” Weston added [another world record](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOqzAQRb8GOiPjGGwKF69Jl9duiRw8htEOOLJHcfL3qyWfsN0Uo3PvuV-3-eaR8Fj_-x0cv2KaD6iFgBnyXFOmkGFJOUQsG8PLlx3X7Gcl1SCkFv00B4_0nnUb3F2GqW_B9UYPcpR6MO3mtNH32MfRg7ncZVDKaivNaIMd4zINS4vuFyZ1P_W9lIPurA3TcLFB6VFP0iyNlhCQU-54g7NDpHd6Qu6WtLfkNuZHaS7_GnVt1LXW2sX0quB5-7w06koYofCb4LyfeKyF0yHIf4M4icIT4eo5ZbH6LE5x8TEXhAe02YVHRSIso2m0XHePdObz31Z7OvUTAAD__1_IhCg) to the 40-plus he already owns.

Jeff Metcalf, Austin's dad, was escorted out of the press conference . Its host, Dominique Alexander, said Metcalf’s presence showed “disrespect." The press conference was meant to address allegations that more than $450,000 raised for Anthony’s family has been spent improperly, and to allow Anthony’s mother, Kayla Hayes, to read a prepared statement. Both Alexander and Hayes later insisted that Anthony’s family had not spent any of the money raised, with Hayes adding that her family is living in fear of violent threats. Texas Grad Schools Among Best in Nation U.S. News & World Report recently ranked the in the country, and the state of Texas is well represented. The University of Texas at Austin took the in the state across multiple categories, reaching the top 10 overall for its education and engineering schools and scoring No. 14 and No. 16 for its law and business schools, respectively. Looking at individual programs, UT Austin offers the No. 1 accounting program and the No. 1 petroleum engineering program in the country. Texas A&M also made the top 100 in all four major categories, ranking at No. 15 for its engineering school. World Record Fish Caught in Texas Kentucky fisherman Art Weston made the most of a trip to Texas earlier this month, catching the world’s ever using ultra-light tackle. Weston landed a 7-feet-3-inch after a two-mile, nearly four-hour chase across Lake Livingston, calling it “the most challenging catch” of his life. With the catch, which he called “a true 1% likelihood,” Weston added to the 40-plus he already owns. | Experience the health benefits of . We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T618bd63d-b4bb-41f0-b11c-5371c42311f0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

|
# ICYMI: Ohio will have a Special Senate Election!
---
[](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3059fcba-3ab9-433f-be14-5c0eddd3eb16/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
| Peter, we must act NOW to flip a key seat blue. Ohio will have a special election to replace VP Vance — giving Democrats the chance to flip his seat and _end the MAGA majority_. Ohio is rich with strong, working-class Democrats like Sherrod Brown, so we need to get to work right away to help them win! [Can you help flip this critical seat by pitching in $20 or more to our Ohio Senate Fund ahead of our daily fundraising goal at 11:59 PM? We need to raise $10,000 today so we need you on our team.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8b2db6a6-63a2-41e0-aea3-0efa90d23c40/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [PITCH IN $20 →](https://default.salsalabs.org/T87652e35-f726-4cdc-87ec-97e2b1550f17/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [PITCH IN MORE →](https://default.salsalabs.org/T863b5f76-558e-4bca-bfc6-add3fd2574ac/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| It's now or never, Peter. We have a real chance to elect a working-class leader who will fight for our rights in the Senate. But the GOP is going to spend MILLIONS to protect their _ultra-thin_ Senate majority. We need Democrats to come together and ensure Ohio has a BIG grassroots movement to combat their attacks. [We need to start preparing RIGHT NOW. Will you step up and donate $20 or more to our Ohio Senate Fund so we can win back our Senate majority? Time is running out to hit our $10,000 daily fundraising goal, so please don't delay.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2556ec86-84ca-4f82-ae67-0bef6220dca9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [CHIP IN $20 →](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4960ab83-c63f-4061-8d96-4a1fe380fa73/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [CHIP IN MORE →](https://default.salsalabs.org/T28e383c6-6a16-4920-aca0-5556172bfe4f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| **Blue Amp Action PAC**
PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208

---
| | |
---
| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T81589bf1-d216-4619-ac28-8e775301a33f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=19579%2E878179%2EXpgnf9). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=19579%2E878179%2EXpgnf9).**

name: Douglas Carswell
subject: Would you like to come work for a winning team?
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/werehiring?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| _**If you're not in front of our Saturday email, you're behind.**_
---
| Dear Friend, **The Mississippi Center for Public Policy is on a mission to change our state for the better, one win at time.** A small team, we punch way above our weight, leading efforts to eliminate the income tax, expand school choice and secure major free-market victories. Would you like to come to work with us? We are hiring a **Chief Development Officer** to lead our fundraising strategy and help grow our impact across Mississippi and beyond. This is a critical leadership role that will help secure the resources we need to fuel the next chapter of reform. If you—or someone you know—has a passion for conservative values, a talent for building meaningful relationships, and the drive to make a difference, we want to hear from you! **Come and be part of a winning team! Click on the link below – and please share this email if you know someone that might be interested ......**
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=f80cfadd2d&e=5703353baa)
---
| [Click here to view the full job description and apply!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=a36d47a9c4&e=5703353baa "Click here to view the full job description and apply!")
---
| Thank you for standing with us in the fight for a freer Mississippi.
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=c0ae6a7a2f&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---
| | _ _

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013

---|---
Peter — Donald Trump says he’s “not joking” about running for a third term.
**Let’s be clear: the U.S. Constitution forbids it.** The 22nd Amendment states that no president can serve more than two terms. But Trump doesn’t care about rules. He only cares about power.
First, he stacked the government with extreme loyalists.
Then, he has purged tens of thousands of federal workers while he tries to gut critical programs like Medicare and Medicaid.
Now, he’s testing the waters for an illegal power grab.
This is how democracy dies, Peter. Trump and his MAGA allies are already looking for loopholes to dismantle term limits. **We must fight back.**
We need to show the country where the American people stand. Our official poll closes at midnight, and we need 500 responses to send a message loud and clear:
**Should Trump be allowed to run for a third term?** | **[YES](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106110992/540467114/1494179065?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZlMTFiMjJmLTFlMWQtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=IQMiT9-AtcpXqy2MkrvdN-ap8Samovn310I21YTYUbA=&emci=52118e8d-6b1c-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=6e11b22f-1e1d-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=16951753)** | **[NO](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106111007/540467118/1494179065?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZlMTFiMjJmLTFlMWQtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=IQMiT9-AtcpXqy2MkrvdN-ap8Samovn310I21YTYUbA=&emci=52118e8d-6b1c-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=6e11b22f-1e1d-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=16951753)**
---|---

Let’s be clear: the U.S. Constitution forbids it. The 22nd Amendment states that no president can serve more than two terms. But Trump doesn’t care about rules. He only cares about power. First, he stacked the government with extreme loyalists. Then, he has purged tens of thousands of federal workers while he tries to gut critical programs like Medicare and Medicaid. Now, he’s testing the waters for an illegal power grab. This is how democracy dies, Peter. Trump and his MAGA allies are already looking for loopholes to dismantle term limits. We must fight back. We need to show the country where the American people stand. | | In what Rolling Stone calls “an open assault on free elections,” anti-voter extremists have launched a multi-pronged attack on our democracy: **1\. The U.S. House of Representatives just passed the SAVE Act, which could disenfranchise tens of millions of Americans** — especially low-income people, seniors, rural voters, and communities of color — by forcing voters to prove their citizenship with costly documents like passports and birth certificates. It’s a modern poll tax, and it isn’t subtle. Forget dog whistles — this is a siren. 2\. If the SAVE Act becomes law, we could see more mass voter purges without appropriate guardrails.
It would also effectively end mail-in and online voter registration as well as third-party registration drives.
And it would target:
* Black and Latino voters, who disproportionately register to vote through third-party registration efforts
* Young voters, who are less likely to have the documents to prove citizenship required by the bill
* As many as 69 million women nationwide who’ve changed their names and can’t use their birth certificate to prove their citizenship

**Our leaders should be protecting the freedom to vote, not trying to cling to power by restricting it.**

name: Florida Update
subject: “The most memorable gun fight” in state history
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

**Alert: Florida Governor Ron DeSantis is allying with the NRA to try and repeal major gun safety legislation. Help us speak out before it’s too late:**
[**Will you donate to Giffords PAC right now? Your donation will be put to work to pass commonsense legislation and save lives.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-apr25.x-ZdIQ&refcode=em250419-1-b&t=1&akid=10325%2E3935704%2EX7Nhn8)
**[DONATE](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-apr25.x-ZdIQ&refcode=em250419-1-b&t=2&akid=10325%2E3935704%2EX7Nhn8)**
Friends,
After the Marjory Stoneman Douglas High School shooting in 2018 that left 17 dead, our nation faced a reckoning.
Our communities said thoughts and prayers weren’t enough. Hundreds of thousands of students rallied for gun safety across the country.
Because of that advocacy, elected officials felt the pressure and acted. That year, lawmakers passed critical legislation to curb the gun violence epidemic — including in Florida.
**But now, seven years after the tragedy, Florida Governor Ron DeSantis and the gun lobby are going all-in to reverse all of the progress we’ve made.**
In his recent State of the State Address, Ron DeSantis made loosening gun laws in Florida one of his top priorities — and he’s lobbying his allies in the legislature to get it done.
If Ron DeSantis gets his way, the minimum age to buy a gun would go from 21 to 18.
If Ron DeSantis gets his way, Florida would reopen loopholes in its background check laws, allowing dangerous people to buy guns.
If Ron DeSantis gets his way, Florida's red flag law would be eliminated — making it even more difficult to deem someone a danger and temporarily remove their firearms.
[**We have worked too hard to let Donald Trump, Ron DeSantis, and their allies turn back the clock on our progress. Help us raise our voices: Rush in a donation right now to fuel our work towards a future free from gun violence.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-apr25.x-ZdIQ&refcode=em250419-1-b&t=3&akid=10325%2E3935704%2EX7Nhn8)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-apr25.D1xNsr&amount=3&refcode=em250419-1-b&t=22&akid=10325%2E3935704%2EX7Nhn8)**

If Ron DeSantis gets his way, the minimum age to buy a gun would go from 21 to 18. If Ron DeSantis gets his way, Florida would reopen loopholes in its background check laws, allowing dangerous people to buy guns. If Ron DeSantis gets his way, Florida's red flag law would be eliminated — making it even more difficult to deem someone a danger and temporarily remove their firearms. Trump has stated, “The homegrowns are next.”

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106111495/540468475/1806897946?refcode=EM_F_250419report_N_TSB_90DO_5_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODExYjIyZi0xZTFkLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NjjPKNWZarWLhCdD4Ix2AG6vUukjN78QG1afpCGgv8o=) Peter,

The GOP’s goal is clear: They want to roll backvoting rights and undermine our democracy. But we won’t back down without a fight. We need all hands on deck! name: Gary Sinise
subject: 20 years of the National Memorial Day Parade
body:
A final chance to honor WWII veterans on Memorial Day
It's Gary Sinise here... I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event. It's Gary Sinise here... I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event.
| | | [](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=6c44277c19f44fa4810cdc3c66581a0b&_e=oF_NQ45j8hvAW1sGh8fCc8CZ82E_2uJW2EOCq7RrGLo__OnlW4M_1pq1mGC14tkiE1JPTYZVGy-VrAO9HnKQ3pJAH44-NB9-glG5Y2hi6W423bUN0WX73govH4RYbWKymSXAcYK1zSf1g0tj_qMArV3S4TDmpxaY9lB9tQPhssfjb-I-CrrFgAOzdRGTwAVaH6iAOW2ZSqBjJwwEfptQWeqdjmqPkLTQZ2WxFMMO6Av4YkExqnF0MFjdbGRKorswroqDEPDt5mSgp681EsL6p4jVzYYTg2P7yCwX-zCHiiCaVfdqi3I3PGutPe2FRf5U)
---
Friend, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 __and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY - but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. I've served as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. nearly every year since American Veterans Center revived it in 2005. **Now, I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event.** This year will be a remembrance like no other, as we commemorate the 80th anniversary of victory in World War II and the 250th birthdays of the U.S. Army, Navy, and Marine Corps. **[Friend, the National Memorial Day Parade is ENTIRELY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=6c44277c19f44fa4810cdc3c66581a0b&_e=oF_NQ45j8hvAW1sGh8fCc8CZ82E_2uJW2EOCq7RrGLo__OnlW4M_1pq1mGC14tkiE1JPTYZVGy-VrAO9HnKQ3pJAH44-NB9-glG5Y2hi6W423bUN0WX73govH4RYbWKymSXAcYK1zSf1g0tj_qMArV3S4TDmpxaY9lB9tQPhssfe5V8jT-8M9n0G3GLrPqWYJSko2sGE8Mva1ummRgsE1bsT3qM1cpuLjGNgDh-BLMNDG-ZVpf5sDeiZfiV-PSe7uB8DR9zme1NhJQUT-Jdz6FCuIuA1C2GPKMWLvzYX63SoSlAxCAPNJx1IGNYRgWCJ)**
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=6c44277c19f44fa4810cdc3c66581a0b&_e=oF_NQ45j8hvAW1sGh8fCc8CZ82E_2uJW2EOCq7RrGLo__OnlW4M_1pq1mGC14tkiE1JPTYZVGy-VrAO9HnKQ3pJAH44-NB9-glG5Y2hi6W423bUN0WX73govH4RYbWKymSXAcYK1zSf1g0tj_qMArV3S4TDmpxaY9lB9tQPhssf7Kio4cke4G8hA0rJzTxH8soOmhG9rp6-xg_ex8jURXFNnei24QBl9_5e-C4cU-K24dole3DfkXbAEnoAI1UEy1BR1luV5_hlspoGzMcJfrr7506K1-PtE7ENDBaSagKtdp2zygoS-v9U4tKveFVWA)
---
[](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=6c44277c19f44fa4810cdc3c66581a0b&_e=oF_NQ45j8hvAW1sGh8fCc8CZ82E_2uJW2EOCq7RrGLo__OnlW4M_1pq1mGC14tkiE1JPTYZVGy-VrAO9HnKQ3pJAH44-NB9-glG5Y2hi6W423bUN0WX73govH4RYbWKymSXAcYK1zSf1g0tj_qMArV3S4TDmpxaY9lB9tQPhssdSPWA-pXoqDIPXbVfmS0IYFE9WxcT2ZVFRHSnEOobL2meFh3xmDbl824PLl2vp3pI2kS3FqpHXiSM-X3DFeL-6uuEZxZ0L1rouPuA44zO8Th_h2Vy1q83vJRRWpKLis9ZQNdeEzJm6I0t90Uum7LuG)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, _the entire parade_ costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that 's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ **But I want to reiterate that American Veterans Center does not take ANY federal funding for this event. It is funded _entirely_ by private citizens like you who want to honor those who have sacrificed so much for our country.** Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever.

* Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.

* Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom.

[](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=6c44277c19f44fa4810cdc3c66581a0b&_e=oF_NQ45j8hvAW1sGh8fCc8CZ82E_2uJW2EOCq7RrGLo__OnlW4M_1pq1mGC14tkieimiBT5LLi-lvreRKbDX60MiJBhxxSghaW2OJcPvKCgXlXxIJcrWjQo8jVLjWIzRLtqn-3hgYzvsLI0dfRRpvWGZFsk_S2v0bkHq-jZBb0XD9NVCL2YjCSlWa7wB8qGxnG2drhVP1nT4DvXuXfwyYgQsvIf_fLmWmjQF4CRndBWkBKKDzUgZ3G45IMEOeoQrcT2KZ1PbKC9mmYkJrKwqwaajWUBxo6_l92R_WI9UKn8%3D)[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=6c44277c19f44fa4810cdc3c66581a0b&_e=oF_NQ45j8hvAW1sGh8fCc8CZ82E_2uJW2EOCq7RrGLo__OnlW4M_1pq1mGC14tkiE1JPTYZVGy-VrAO9HnKQ3pJAH44-NB9-glG5Y2hi6W423bUN0WX73govH4RYbWKymSXAcYK1zSf1g0tj_qMArV3S4TDmpxaY9lB9tQPhsseXeFaA7H8YSaQdZf1d1tVgACDfGiY5AD-eY3Z8-fX0xfdAvBQ3AUI_6wxl0pIBs6jR73rN1EvqqCd5G0nAxilgFGtY42HpJu6GJM6sG3c3W8DEmMWd075Ekgj32q4TCh6OIaquUEINH2uiUF8XxLQT) If you've been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best possible ways you could do it. _And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get._ You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C., for the parade is difficult. WWII veterans were a key part of the first parade when it was revived in 2005, as they have been every year since for the last 20 years. _But this may be the last year we have the opportunity to have these brave men and women with us for the parade._** ** **That's why we are making a concerted effort to ensure these veterans are at this year's National Memorial Day Parade to honor them one last time. ** So this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of victory in Europe and Japan to end World War II - and the 250th anniversaries of the Army, Navy, and Marine Corps - I encourage you to help us honor these brave veterans while we still have them with us.
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=6c44277c19f44fa4810cdc3c66581a0b&_e=oF_NQ45j8hvAW1sGh8fCc8CZ82E_2uJW2EOCq7RrGLo__OnlW4M_1pq1mGC14tkiE1JPTYZVGy-VrAO9HnKQ3pJAH44-NB9-glG5Y2hi6W423bUN0WX73govH4RYbWKymSXAcYK1zSf1g0tj_qMArV3S4TDmpxaY9lB9tQPhssemIXrIhb3GF19vOOY3kZzlwjSWgCKIHP-AgVeqaL_VHMuGpX5VOZJG906zonxZ1lGZD6gA1a9ZSy2BwxjxMw3OKkyn4wRzTp1S2eD0U5BF0Ke1EsIGpP5aYyfmfiUZRN7nJ17hPh2W5ZPUmQ0Qe69e)
---
And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day - not just this momentous year of military milestones, but every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._ _**[Friend, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please - if you're able, make a gift to fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now during its 20th anniversary.](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=6c44277c19f44fa4810cdc3c66581a0b&_e=oF_NQ45j8hvAW1sGh8fCc8CZ82E_2uJW2EOCq7RrGLo__OnlW4M_1pq1mGC14tkiE1JPTYZVGy-VrAO9HnKQ3pJAH44-NB9-glG5Y2hi6W423bUN0WX73govH4RYbWKymSXAcYK1zSf1g0tj_qMArV3S4TDmpxaY9lB9tQPhssfaMm08D5ojkKpf4ub8AGF_98B3ziKH5J2vdYqizjhZwCYyAagXDV3-ktVNnZORqj5pvNG61h8fHLKLmlnH_aIyzeJm1zKWEslhjSZY6Ad11RyAWSR_a1A592NslKh8IzYQV7hRpv6PweaDMm6j5OPH)**_ Sincerely, Gary SiniseHonorary Grand MarshalNational Memorial Day Parade
---
[](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=6c44277c19f44fa4810cdc3c66581a0b&_e=oF_NQ45j8hvAW1sGh8fCc8CZ82E_2uJW2EOCq7RrGLo__OnlW4M_1pq1mGC14tkiE1JPTYZVGy-VrAO9HnKQ3pJAH44-NB9-glG5Y2hi6W423bUN0WX73govH4RYbWKymSXAcYK1zSf1g0tj_qMArV3S4TDmpxaY9lB9tQPhssdLGDB0ej6a83hD24-swxqjya1-Hb7e9G7p3169Y6ojLEIZWDga2KuUaGMj40e7XFpeZcBDh7vD_qclIN46y7XBFkec6fB7joRutlg0GGJPbVu4xr-4VdThu6Np3lDGw5ZRhwWUGnGp9iWTdLlJjUXv)
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=6c44277c19f44fa4810cdc3c66581a0b&_e=oF_NQ45j8hvAW1sGh8fCc8CZ82E_2uJW2EOCq7RrGLo__OnlW4M_1pq1mGC14tkiE1JPTYZVGy-VrAO9HnKQ3pJAH44-NB9-glG5Y2hi6W423bUN0WX73govH4RYbWKymSXAcYK1zSf1g0tj_qMArV3S4TDmpxaY9lB9tQPhssdLRUpWc4lRJfYiBu1idZ3sHacbs7e-n6JW81Kg5shPUrTKY8w7bW9kfhH4KfYqqPQHYISTTsjweUzaVriRquKesChtI9EtOnx8dIU-JNLWmkI5FrZhHb56A6kuKPu75FzJG5NVJe1SkqFF9eLXMvLH)
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. (C) American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201

---|---|---
The Trump administration was given a legal victory last week when an immigration judge ruled the United States met the burden to deport Mahmoud Khalil, an anti-Israel activist who has played a significant role in the protests happening at Columbia University.
Khalil and his defenders say the Trump administration is violating his right to free speech and is targeting him for being outspoken about Gaza.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..UoE1cr7x3dyRkHqWeS8v6dotKPXfDWaOchfYQFBSXM0?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=161611786)
Khalil's dislike not just for the United States, but all of current western civilization is evidenced by **[a statement](https://substack.com/redirect/22fe8641-a66a-4873-9a3d-6accabab62f5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** by the group he was involved in at Columbia. Columbia United Apartheid Divest (CUAD) had a statement that read, "We are Westerners fighting for the total eradication of Western civilization" and requested "instruction from militants in the Global South."
Such a statement goes beyond being against Israel's war against Hamas, it is an explicit endorsement of the goals radical Islamists have for the West.

# Apple's Starlink Update Sparks Huge Earning Opportunity
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d5bca965-33fe-4a1d-8969-e92e3ca018e6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Apple just secretly added Starlink satellite support to iPhones through iOS 18.3.
One of the biggest potential winners? **[Mode Mobile.](https://substack.com/redirect/d5bca965-33fe-4a1d-8969-e92e3ca018e6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
Mode's EarnPhone already reaches +45M users that have earned over $325M, and that's before global satellite coverage. With SpaceX eliminating "dead zones" worldwide, Mode's earning technology can now reach billions more in unbanked and rural populations worldwide.
Their global expansion is perfectly timed, and you still have a chance to **[invest in their pre-IPO offering at just $0.26/share](https://substack.com/redirect/d5bca965-33fe-4a1d-8969-e92e3ca018e6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[.](https://substack.com/redirect/d5bca965-33fe-4a1d-8969-e92e3ca018e6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Mode's recent 32,481% revenue growth and their newly reserved Nasdaq ticker $MODE puts them one step closer to a potential IPO.
**⏰[Time is running out to invest at $0.26/share - price changes in two weeks.](https://substack.com/redirect/d5bca965-33fe-4a1d-8969-e92e3ca018e6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/d5bca965-33fe-4a1d-8969-e92e3ca018e6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
_**(Continued)**_
Khalil is not a U.S. citizen. He is an Algerian citizen, born in Syria, who came to the U.S. and received a green card. Defenders of Khalil have been pointing to how he has not been charged with any criminal wrongdoing as proof of his "political persecution." But that's the thing, he does not need to be charged with a crime in order to lose his green card. Voicing support for a terrorist organization, like Hamas, is a reason the federal government can revoke a green card.
The punishment for Khalil violating the terms of being able to stay in the U.S. is in line with not being charged with a crime: He is not being sent to a prison in El Salvador, he's simply being sent back home. He can continue to hate the U.S., but he can't do it while enjoying the benefits of living in the U.S.
**[The New York Times did note](https://substack.com/redirect/42294091-d930-45ad-9d38-645f759e2c69?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** the Department of Homeland Security says they have evidence that Khalil willfully failed to disclose he worked for UNRWA, which has lost U.S. funding because of its close ties to Hamas, when he applied to be a permanent resident.
The U.S. has tolerated foreigners who not merely criticize it, but actively wish for its downfall and take steps to see it through for far too long.
The Trump administration is right to tell _**guests**_ of our nation that you can live here, but you can not take action to undermine its security and stability. You can not be part of mass disruptions at our universities, for example. No serious nation can tolerate such behavior.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..UoE1cr7x3dyRkHqWeS8v6dotKPXfDWaOchfYQFBSXM0?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=161611786)
Another egregious example of "Why was he allowed into our country?" is that of former Cornell University student, Momodou Taal.
Taal, a dual citizen of the United Kingdom and the Gambia, sued the Trump administration to try to stop his deportation after his student visa was revoked.
When a judge ruled not to pause the deportation, Taal decided to self-deport. Prior to getting his visa, Taal **[openly called for the destruction of the U.S. "empire,"](https://substack.com/redirect/9c2a361b-83d4-4251-9847-cc597c515b83?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** according to screenshots of his social media posts. But when he got the visa, he expressed joy at being able to study in the country he hated so much.
The Khalil and Taal cases are a classic example of far-leftists using American ideals to manipulate the public.
As soon as they face the consequences for their actions, they cry about how "This isn't the America I know!" despite openly calling for its downfall moments before.
Antifa operates very much the same way, like at the federal courthouse in Portland, Oregon in 2020. Antifa militants attacked federal officers in their "war" against the government for weeks, but they then cried to the media how the federal government committed "war crimes" when tear gas was used and their rights were violated when rioters were arrested.
Our country has enough problems with citizens working to trigger the destruction of the U.S. as we know it today. While it has flaws like any other nation, the last thing we need is to import even more people who seek to undermine our country from within.
If we are unable to keep those people out, then we are headed towards the same future as western Europe.

name: Lily Tang Williams
subject: I never got to use a toilet seat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lily4Congress Committee
body:
I owe my life to the United States of America| | | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=d3df829d21c3435f863006e72712ac31&_e=Y0Fh0uva_TIHr2xxYv9sj6aVeWbRiNKKn5cQfgeiIG48ZNSo2rMx5h3j3o52WT97oCGyHy2qFYI2_FOEac8C4d9AA1bM7Uiu77UtCUuoMdUrkNH7DTk5YFeIpYRvoTumKbrCG9yGskzp0BLlZ-qzigiVfWR1YsNeGN_MYrvyfJtnSO0LQlclKWHExubAMl7tpIeTrXiEzoilIhy3hAhQuMJ-eG_Ii3LOlhYh1ElH5KfNpw4_CmATWGKEqhNCksx0gwR8juTkl6yDXrryHVWyWNSdorb4mROHYjSDFhELsMDyYUY6X04b60OWj1NHhjIoHjgeOMe-WQFD9yjMM1uILxsZSDXmkUZ6rfdHVBc26Wyhuc7qy68bEwu3QD52pvlKsHuzRw6Pg8fZEMZCupg7-A%3D%3D)
---
I never got to use a toilet seat. Instead, we had to share a hole in the ground with 8 other families. I was raised on food rationing coupons in the Sichuan province of China during Mao’s Cultural Revolution. I was only a child, yet I worshiped him like a God. I had no other choice. I was brainwashed. We all were. Eventually, I was able to escape from China and flee to the United States.
---
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=d3df829d21c3435f863006e72712ac31&_e=Y0Fh0uva_TIHr2xxYv9sj6aVeWbRiNKKn5cQfgeiIG48ZNSo2rMx5h3j3o52WT97oCGyHy2qFYI2_FOEac8C4d9AA1bM7Uiu77UtCUuoMdUrkNH7DTk5YFeIpYRvoTumKbrCG9yGskzp0BLlZ-qzigiVfWR1YsNeGN_MYrvyfJtnSO0LQlclKWHExubAMl7tpIeTrXiEzoilIhy3hAhQuMJ-eG_Ii3LOlhYh1ElH5KfNpw4_CmATWGKEqhNCksx0hUW-cFfMysfMkR70jFjIaUYMRHMnQ9biDwxvCGSSsCIBS4UVvMVQmfNsm40V26EX9J-CgSVGB1ms8Zp2GrGNP9ocW5v1JLwvRWL7A-6-SiBp0C1Lg_cY3alIRWE8LwEvqWHDUx1VTkvBLDBiZq0X3Q%3D%3D)
---
I spent the next 20 years uninstalling everything Mao’s regime had programmed into my brain, only to discover the very same evil was now being promoted in America and celebrated by the radical left. Then it hit me. I wasn’t just a product of the American Dream - I was also a survivor of Communist rule. **[My name is Lily Tang Williams, and I’m the Republican running for Congress in New Hampshire's 2nd Congressional District.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=d3df829d21c3435f863006e72712ac31&_e=Y0Fh0uva_TIHr2xxYv9sj6aVeWbRiNKKn5cQfgeiIG48ZNSo2rMx5h3j3o52WT97oCGyHy2qFYI2_FOEac8C4d9AA1bM7Uiu77UtCUuoMdUrkNH7DTk5YFeIpYRvoTumKbrCG9yGskzp0BLlZ-qzigiVfWR1YsNeGN_MYrvyfJtnSO0LQlclKWHExubAMl7tpIeTrXiEzoilIhy3hAhQuMJ-eG_Ii3LOlhYh1ElH5KfNpw4_CmATWGKEqhNCksx0a55yfVueI1Rl5k87O4GUlIO5f3khy5FuEj1-NNhcbSkFecRKTJ00rdm2_qz9FXUGuUfZu7w67JDtSZk2lqO36Nj8OYvxBf-687NiNsDDm2ED8FExSCXfsly_DNKriJlb3S0eD26r-W_d2SCGGTXIIQ%3D%3D)**
---
[**SUPPORT LILY'S CAMPAIGN**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=d3df829d21c3435f863006e72712ac31&_e=Y0Fh0uva_TIHr2xxYv9sj6aVeWbRiNKKn5cQfgeiIG48ZNSo2rMx5h3j3o52WT97oCGyHy2qFYI2_FOEac8C4d9AA1bM7Uiu77UtCUuoMdUrkNH7DTk5YFeIpYRvoTumKbrCG9yGskzp0BLlZ-qzigiVfWR1YsNeGN_MYrvyfJtnSO0LQlclKWHExubAMl7tpIeTrXiEzoilIhy3hAhQuMJ-eG_Ii3LOlhYh1ElH5KfNpw4_CmATWGKEqhNCksx0q9VADHvdgYns1zteuzBUr4tNsN68F0cTUG92S_ygbSWHxgiT_UOQnpI5XVrEZH8BE6v9LZHPu43hzdv4WZw3Ddn-OQ9egKGSuCguHMFmvLCca91tzIZuJ9Dgiqi56dxD30CZoNDNnO_bR2S44V2hug%3D%3D)
---
My story, my voice, and my campaign endanger everything the Democrats have built their party on - _I don’t fit their mold_. **[And now they’re preparing to spend millions to browbeat me into silence& end my candidacy.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=d3df829d21c3435f863006e72712ac31&_e=Y0Fh0uva_TIHr2xxYv9sj6aVeWbRiNKKn5cQfgeiIG48ZNSo2rMx5h3j3o52WT97oCGyHy2qFYI2_FOEac8C4d9AA1bM7Uiu77UtCUuoMdUrkNH7DTk5YFeIpYRvoTumKbrCG9yGskzp0BLlZ-qzigiVfWR1YsNeGN_MYrvyfJtnSO0LQlclKWHExubAMl7tpIeTrXiEzoilIhy3hAhQuMJ-eG_Ii3LOlhYh1ElH5KfNpw4_CmATWGKEqhNCksx0P0A0jM6tMXVSHTn_QEUb-26zLH-Au7Msk-n--xlgl4nKFSSpTS4nrYBmQ_wQT6vTFYzBXyHcoy0S2wOqCViFpsj86uo3Qy8PEmYaeb75H4JjzeqMYE1yX0-rFINj809bLnxQe3EBnmTU9Po85sVHNw%3D%3D)** That’s why I’m humbly asking for your help today. My candidacy & our country truly do depend on it. I hope you’ll do what you can to save both today. Help me make history, Patriot.
---
[**DONATE $5 TO LILY**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=d3df829d21c3435f863006e72712ac31&_e=Y0Fh0uva_TIHr2xxYv9sj6aVeWbRiNKKn5cQfgeiIG48ZNSo2rMx5h3j3o52WT97oCGyHy2qFYI2_FOEac8C4d9AA1bM7Uiu77UtCUuoMdUrkNH7DTk5YFeIpYRvoTumKbrCG9yGskzp0BLlZ-qzigiVfWR1YsNeGN_MYrvyfJtnSO0LQlclKWHExubAMl7tpIeTrXiEzoilIhy3hAhQuMJ-eG_Ii3LOlhYh1ElH5KfNpw4_CmATWGKEqhNCksx0VDjRS9is4C7knPDbBevmJsXo-kkIPsjE9brl-te68YkvcQQYsM15SSQzTUcHqm0n0YJE_MxtzN68FKbBQ-y69q6Tb3HCbGWTYF1zKYZnzWWJX0iER0dINUKHBT7Zf4w13xBlUAfIJNrxefzEIL_opw%3D%3D)

body:

Fellow American,
---
The other night I sat down to put my thoughts to paper.
---
I didn’t want to fill your email with a lengthy message, so I’ve scanned my letter to a secure page for you to read.
---
**_What I’m about to say will SHOCK you to your core, but I need you to hear it all the same..._**
---
_**BRACE YOURSELF and then please read the letter I wrote for you in full:**_

## Will Tariffs Take a Toll on the GOP in Midterms?
As President Donald Trump moves at a feverish pace in imposing tariffs and undoing much of his predecessor’s legacy, a question has emerged: How will voters react to these bold actions when midterm elections arrive in 2026? The Daily Signal asked a number of top consultants to congressional candidates across the country that question. Trump has [...] [Read more](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/JlhfG6-Bjb22x3jTh68veei_Tic8ndJgKQtAvdsgQffSGxS8HWW1jAmbM2nhb465W8yvBJN2DubK8bnrtpeR5RRDjpEq9AVJaRmazm2n-8z2NMWd4casiMGZ4OUZjo5sBzbDlYxUpRT9B6No5cP_dPTzuxbZCT-0f7WSsyFMlsKCEPxpzdlcGztx8W2jKVUV34OchuRYGO0zzuB31o3t8_3Py6l3kI_kEXS8THpO3QNAl-sdVGtDNYq7pzZetaY3cBpkRhYqTXJTW8Se8By8U_dPuwlbHKMYc-XrJBxc6yFpfTLm8ltGQZHfYpMzHMdc53pC2C2Bv1Q/IMglPknTGkDmDksjFBzs3N_KzVOhqiaZ/8)

## 30 Years Later the Scars Remain From the Oklahoma City Bombing – RedState
On April 19, 1995, 30 years ago today, the Alfred P. Murrah Federal Building in Oklahoma City became the target of the deadliest act of domestic terrorism in U.S. history. At 9:02 a.m., a Ryder truck packed with explosives detonated, killing 167 people, injuring 684, and reducing much of the building to rubble. The [...] [Read more](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/xN9WrhfajF13B8jn_R8-glvaGHPk4dYFD9QqXK1Nzt0aUUf_e4f1QdldLDkD6_LTWnXyX2lDPlhEOdE-TFlZfim51TfLzwr9y41bdg53-mmill3EgkRw8DGgKXyvj-0D9f76AkDYC5rzTHN5NvXhIeSZbfU9aNGkgBJMqFGl1rGxGw7F6gey7KSOzeDLKVx1AKkHt9TkFsZuDgQFOc9GREA-rXHL7iXSAzO7RHe3kns2_oS8Dr5jvkxcA5mJbkM51UF0FO2WVnrY0lBOMgti9YR9UWM8Dh9GKwtqBIdPbtrE4HHUNByBka0mz1Y1MqIMfG2HmZhBALhRxYPZXc-eXBFNuDSh0cW_CC_98t28xes/QCeJQhNETDI4vvBAvkdjDJmgZ-TE_fvb/8)

## Several Democrats Can’t Answer Why They Want ‘Non-Citizens to Vote in US Elections’
DAILY CALLER NEWS FOUNDATION—Several Democrat lawmakers refused to answer why they voted against a measure to ensure that non-citizens cannot vote in U.S. elections in footage exclusively obtained by the Daily Caller News Foundation. Only four Democrat lawmakers joined Republicans to pass the Safeguard American Voter Eligibility Act, which would require states to obtain proof of citizenship [...] [Read more](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/7erELkFAPpXqRH0sqjZOipQx9N822QlFu2NE1PI0zJX-IVRTBW67Jtqb5sNB1U4Sm11pCTED-pGS7m57I4A5oooy3onTh_wsuJdOKCOirHWSvrCoDUB48Zh0Cr6OXEZDfAn2zIUfydsQsQg4kF6XbqAXeK14ig4uVUr-6rwSjonCbaJXhJ4-HL7v22mNrpBzjJk4DblJSvXNYdx18ZXDreXzU-VYxoXF9FUvE9hvBRpxIs8xVIaQWX4LgTXFCGVU-28AKbxq0Y7_hx-fGxVgIjwj-SfDt2drEgAIKbHXQQqPddSFXlutuKcihoYeeRbSrqu1AibeVzGKrZHlaxW1PKABlKOd5ZbjKXUvWNAIpHUotZ-JmnDBPjM/tLsbSHoXpSiGxbMJzUMpEsJDNmJEsri7/8)

Hi Peter,

Did you know that Virginia is the last state in the South to have full access to reproductive healthcare?

That is why our awesome partner organization called **Roe Your Vote Virginia** is working to pass a constitutional amendment to enshrine abortion access into the state’s constitution, and we want to help make that happen.

During the 2023 General Assembly elections, Roe Your Vote Virginia led the fight to elect pro-choice candidates and advance reproductive freedom in their state. In 2025, we’re working together to protect Virginia’s pro-choice majority in the General Assembly and enshrine abortion access once and for all.

[**Help us as we support pro-choice, pro-WOMEN women candidates running for office in Virginia by pitching in a split $20.25 or more contribution between Her Bold Move and Roe Your Vote Virginia today.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106122629/540498176/-1243516685?refcode=EM_F_250418RYV_N_THBM_IN_8_NG_N_L1&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY1M2YyMDkyLTI2MWQtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=kUad6L3LQKRtCi7ulOvVfSWRd6-DeVXSQT7TWcJKtvg=)

The first step to passing a constitutional amendment to protect abortion access has already happened: The General Assembly voted on Senate Joint Resolution No. 247 (SJ 247) and House Joint Resolution No. 1 (HJ 1). Now we’re onto step two: This November, Virginia voters will head to the polls to elect a Governor, Lt. Governor, Attorney General, and the entire House of Delegates. **The outcome of these elections will be critical in determining the future of reproductive rights in the state – and a possible healthcare access point for women across the entire southern region of America.**

Here is why this is so important: If pro-choice leadership remains in control of the House of Delegates, they will take another vote on these bills. If they pass a second time, the amendment will proceed to the final stage, where voters will have the opportunity to vote on the amendment in November 2026.

Without this protection, reproductive rights remain vulnerable to shifting political landscapes and the whims of elected officials who could impose restrictions or outright bans on abortion. We must ensure there are pro-choice women in the room when this vote is happening.

[**Check back in next week as we’ll be announcing the first wave of our shared candidates in this partnership. In the meantime, help fund the important work we’ll be doing together by pitching in a split $20.25 or more contribution today!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106122645/540498206/-1243516685?refcode=EM_F_250418RYV_N_THBM_IN_8_NG_N_L2&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY1M2YyMDkyLTI2MWQtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=kUad6L3LQKRtCi7ulOvVfSWRd6-DeVXSQT7TWcJKtvg=)

Thank you,

Team Her Bold Move

name: Amanda K. Edwards
subject: Our kids deserve fully funded schools
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Amanda Edwards for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ake_april25?refcode=0419_Email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ake_april25?refcode=0419_Email]
Friend,
Due to politics , [https://www.houstonchronicle.com/politics/article/vouchers-school-choice-20278699.php] Texas schools are being underfunded, which is having adverse impacts on our future. The Voucher bill passed by the Texas House this week is unfortunately another step in the wrong direction. At a time when Houstonians are already facing economic instability and increased costs these reckless actions will cause our community to face even more uncertainty.
Texas public schools have less funding than pre-pandemic levels. And as costs continue to rise for school districts amidst Trump’s trade wars, these actions will divert more funding and leave already underfunded public schools in crisis.
When I am in Congress, I will vote NO on national Voucher bills that leave our schools underfunded.
Onwards,
Amanda K. Edwards
Donate! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ake_april25?refcode=0419_Email]

clean_body: [] Friend, Due to politics , [] Texas schools are being underfunded, which is having adverse impacts on our future. The Voucher bill passed by the Texas House this week is unfortunately another step in the wrong direction. At a time when Houstonians are already facing economic instability and increased costs these reckless actions will cause our community to face even more uncertainty. Texas public schools have less funding than pre-pandemic levels. And as costs continue to rise for school districts amidst Trump’s trade wars, these actions will divert more funding and leave already underfunded public schools in crisis. When I am in Congress, I will vote NO on national Voucher bills that leave our schools underfunded. Onwards, Amanda K. Edwards Donate! [] Amanda K. Edwards has the experience and innovative vision to move Houston forward. To learn more, visit our website. [] Learn More [] Paid for by Amanda Edwards for Congress PO Box 88228, Houston, Texas 77288 info@edwardsforhouston.com [info@edwardsforhouston.com] [] [] []

name: Kristen McDonald Rivet
subject: Here we go, folks...
body:
|
#
Friend, Last week, Republicans in Congress passed a budget framework that, if passed, will gut up to **$880 billion** from Medicaid and slash another **$230 billion** from essential food service programs like SNAP -- all to pay for tax cuts for the ultra-wealthy. I voted NO -- and I would do it again in a heartbeat. I’ve seen firsthand how hard it is for working families to get by, and I refuse to make their lives harder just to give the ultra-rich another handout. **But here’s the thing: now, Republicans are running their same old playbook, airing attack ads against me and lying about their disastrous bill. For example:** [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106122786/540498569/846650059?refcode=em-4.19.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDNmMjA5Mi0yNjFkLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zJTVtNsEOa_mGO-iSqE_OpC9jFu4QMLsgXrzfeFFRD0=) Folks, I’m not surprised the GOP is resorting to dishonest smears, but we can’t let it go unchecked. name: DC Daily Journal
subject: don’t eat: almonds, peanut butter, and spinach (Here's why)
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.
* * *

|
If you've been led to believe that peanut butter, almonds and spinach are good for you, today's email might shock you and is important to read, because these 3 healthy foods could be contributing to health problems in your body.

Let's take a quick look at why...

**1\. Peanut butter**

While peanut butter does contain a small amount of protein and vitamins/minerals, the cons outweigh the pros on this food.

First of all, peanuts contain one of the highest concentrations of aflatoxin, which is a mold toxin that is created in peanuts due to storage in moist conditions.

Peanut butter is also very high in inflammatory omega-6 fats and due to the processing of peanut butter, those omega 6 fats are in a harmful oxidized state.

Most people already get too much omega 6 fats from vegetable oils (soy, corn, canola, etc), and this contributes to insulin resistance, heart disease, brain inflammation, cancer, and lots more health problems, since most people are currently eating 5-10x more omega-6 fats than we should be eating in a healthy diet.

Lastly, peanut butter also contains medium amounts of oxalates, which are plant-based antinutrients that when consumed in excess can contribute to kidney stones, thyroid and gut problems, joint problems and more.

We'll talk more about oxalates in the next food...

**2\. Spinach**

Spinach is promoted as a healthy green, but contains FAR more downsides than good sides. Spinach is one of the highest oxalate foods that's commonly eaten by modern humans (in addition to beet greens, beets, almonds, and other veggies and nuts).

The amount of oxalates in a serving of spinach is extremely high, up to 600 mg in a normal sized bowl.

The "safe" amount of oxalates in a daily diet according to world renowned oxalate expert Sally Norton should be between 100-200 mg per day total to avoid a lot of the health problems caused by high oxalate plants.

So, you can see how concerning spinach is with the extremely high oxalate levels.

As mentioned above, eating too much oxalates too frequently can cause serious issues such as kidney stones, thyroid problems, gut damage, skin issues, and joint pain.

In fact, some people have even gotten "oxalate poisoning" by eating green smoothies too often and had to go to the ER for kidney failure.

**3\. Almonds**

Although almonds and almond milk are marketed as healthy, they also contain many downsides, including all of the negatives mentioned above about too much omega 6 fats and too much oxalates.

They're probably ok in your diet occasionally, but I personally avoid eating almonds too often because of these issues with excess oxalates and omega 6 fats.

Now let's take a look at a fun little quiz below and a few more foods...

**Bananas vs oranges vs apples... (the #1 WORST fruit for your gut & energy)** According to the best-selling author and world-renowned heart surgeon, Dr. Steven Gundry, there's one fruit people over 40 should never eat.

This fruit can **damage your gut and disrupt your hormones**. Both sapping you of energy and **forcing your body to create "sticky" fat cells that can NOT be "burned off" with normal diet and exercise. **

Do you know the fruit I'm talking about? Make sure you do by clicking the one below you think it is, and get the answer from Dr. Gundry himself on the next page:

[>> Bananas

>> Oranges

>> Apples

>> Grapes

](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/045b065f0b5749d59f32104e1189c3f9-aa7182278327483e9bc4ba1d9469e373/63)[](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/045b065f0b5749d59f32104e1189c3f9-aa7182278327483e9bc4ba1d9469e373/63)[
](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/045b065f0b5749d59f32104e1189c3f9-aa7182278327483e9bc4ba1d9469e373/63)

body:
Help counter anti-democracy threats in North Carolina and beyond
|
---

Peter,
_Count every valid vote_ — it’s the very foundation of our democracy. But after the losing candidate requested a disgraceful remedy that would throw out legally cast ballots of overseas voters and selectively target military voters from primarily Democratic counties, the North Carolina Supreme Court recently issued a decision that granted many of these obscene requests:
**“North Carolina’s top court clears path for some ballots to be tossed in contested state supreme court race” —Politico**
And it could allow extremists to steal a seat on the North Carolina Supreme Court:
**“Several thousand voters are still at risk — more than enough to overturn the election.” —The Guardian**
**It’s an appalling attack on our democracy, and it fits into extremists’ sweeping agenda of trying to silence the will of the people — from restricting voting rights to gerrymandering themselves into unearned power.**
**[All On The Line is fighting back for our democracy and rallying North Carolinians against this attempted injustice — will you make a $15 donation and help fight for free and fair elections across the country?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106124576/540503586/-877614143?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_NCRedux_email_20250419-AOTL-Tier1-NCRedux_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250419-AOTL-Tier1-NCRedux_&utm_campaign=NCRedux&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY0M2YyMDkyLTI2MWQtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dm8MbaLawzV3lO9IZNKgDWqazlx29cQuvn13551w4vA=)**

As Attorney General Eric Holder said, _“This is not a complicated case. It should have been resolved quickly to reject the state appeals court’s blatantly partisan and shameful decision in its entirety and re-affirm what multiple recounts, the state Board of Elections, and the trial court all concluded: that Justice Riggs was re-elected in a free and fair election and that all of the more than 65,000 ballots called into question must be counted — just as they would have been in any other election heretofore...This opinion is both a disgrace and legacy defining for those who put their names behind it.”_
**The All On The Line team is fighting back against this attempt to overturn a free and fair election. We cannot allow extremists to continue to threaten the very foundations of our democracy — because if they succeed in North Carolina, they won’t stop in North Carolina.**
[**That’s why we’re asking you to make a $15 to help counter anti-democracy threats in North Carolina and beyond.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106124587/540503599/-877614143?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_NCRedux_email_20250419-AOTL-Tier1-NCRedux_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250419-AOTL-Tier1-NCRedux_&utm_campaign=NCRedux&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY0M2YyMDkyLTI2MWQtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dm8MbaLawzV3lO9IZNKgDWqazlx29cQuvn13551w4vA=)

clean_body: Help counter anti-democracy threats in North Carolina and beyond | Peter, Count every valid vote — it’s the very foundation of our democracy. But after the losing candidate requested a disgraceful remedy that would throw out legally cast ballots of overseas voters and selectively target military voters from primarily Democratic counties, the North Carolina Supreme Court recently issued a decision that granted many of these obscene requests: “North Carolina’s top court clears path for some ballots to be tossed in contested state supreme court race” —Politico And it could allow extremists to steal a seat on the North Carolina Supreme Court: “Several thousand voters are still at risk — more than enough to overturn the election.” —The Guardian It’s an appalling attack on our democracy, and it fits into extremists’ sweeping agenda of trying to silence the will of the people — from restricting voting rights to gerrymandering themselves into unearned power. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = As Attorney General Eric Holder said, “This is not a complicated case. It should have been resolved quickly to reject the state appeals court’s blatantly partisan and shameful decision in its entirety and re-affirm what multiple recounts, the state Board of Elections, and the trial court all concluded: that Justice Riggs was re-elected in a free and fair election and that all of the more than 65,000 ballots called into question must be counted — just as they would have been in any other election heretofore...This opinion is both a disgrace and legacy defining for those who put their names behind it.” The All On The Line team is fighting back against this attempt to overturn a free and fair election. We cannot allow extremists to continue to threaten the very foundations of our democracy — because if they succeed in North Carolina, they won’t stop in North Carolina. = Thank you, The All On The Line Team is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering. Text FAIR to 88228 to receive recurring updates from AOTL by automated text message. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. name: Ken Martin (via Democrats.org)
subject: An update on our organizing work
body:
---
Derek, This is a longer message, but I wanted to share an update with you about our work here at the DNC. And I promise I won't be asking you for money at the end. Since my election as DNC Chair, my philosophy has been to get the DNC out of DC. That means getting into the states to meet with voters, organize Democrats everywhere, and compete in off-year elections. And we’ve already started gaining ground, building momentum, and winning races. As the political landscape continues to shift and the stakes for both families and our democracy grow higher, our organizing program must evolve to meet today’s moment — with new energy, new strategy, and a renewed dedication to the people and communities who make up our coalition. Our new DNC organizing principles will guide every aspect of how we do our work — from how we recruit and train the next generation of organizers, to how we build political power, scale programs, and engage the voters we are asking to stand with us. Shortly after I became DNC Chair, we put many of these principles into practice. We invested early in Wisconsin — one of the earliest electoral investments the DNC has ever made — as well as the congressional special elections in Florida. Look, I believe we organize to win elections to improve lives. We might not win every race today. But if we do our jobs right, if we make bold investments in all parts of the country, we will start turning the tide blue for the long term. We organize to build lasting trust, develop new leadership, and expand the promise of democracy — for everyone, everywhere. So, I’m excited to share that we are officially rolling out our core DNC organizing principles to help us compete everywhere and accomplish two critical goals. First, fight back against the Trump administration. Second, make a compelling case for Democratic candidates up and down the ballot. Here are the principles:
**
1. **We organize early, we organize always, and we organize everywhere**
** **
2. **We build up and support community leaders**
** **
3. **We integrate digital and field organizing as one strategy**
** **
4. **We equip our volunteer army with the best technology and data systems**
** **
5. **We coordinate strategically across the ecosystem**
** **
6. **We invest in people — recruiting, training, and retaining talent**
** **
7. **We use organizing to hold power accountable — not just to win it**
**
Trump and his allies continue to put their interests above the interests of the American people. They’re destroying the economy. They’re trying to hijack the courts like in Wisconsin and North Carolina. They're even threatening to deport American citizens. _We cannot accept this._ So we’re going to speak out, fight back, and organize like our democracy depends on it — because it does. I hope you’ll join us. Thank you for taking the time to read this message, and I’ll have more updates to share soon. Ken Ken Martin
Chair
Democratic National Committee | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250419_3230_fr&refcode2=3230_22930333_s8YVSg&akid=3230%2E22930333%2Es8YVSg)
---

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

Trump says he wants to deport U.S. citizens to notorious overseas prisons. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWMemLlBizY1X95pwPJ6WB7vP3QZvxDWIpMQWRTijHwfazTLTskCP30gWJCuzpPAqf5s2018QCJSxRpUNvXjYQE96W4h_EEHHqOa7lQ0DTdg-h06v-4DFuqMRO9atVNm6apT0ARqKduh3kBfMQezdF-jyt-6FRKmBXjcqeFbn_i9i76AANoXLlijGncHtoBv2hZhJlvIhYn80XP7GsSHG_ZQ/4fs/bO5E2ILNT3idYKG3w0jKgQ/h0/h001.gfqYPzTsk6w_3GdCCUPe6lMjyzgCqff6i5MwJMXRyP0)

Friend, Trump is saying he wants to deport U.S. citizens to El Salvador’s notorious torture prisons. U.S. citizens will not be exempt from Trump’s mass deportation/detention agenda. He’s already saying it out loud. Trump is paying El Salvador’s self-described dictator millions of dollars to house U.S. residents, in violation of their constitutional and human rights. And Trump is planning to spend $45 billion to drastically expand private ICE detention centers across the United States. At the same time, the Trump administration is ramping up the systematic revocation of students’ visas, with the help of Elon Musk’s DOGE. More than 800 students have already had their visas revoked without due process, including more than 70 students in my home state of Michigan. With each illegal deportation and kidnapping—including this week’s abduction of the president of the Columbia University’s Buddhist Club—the Trump administration is ripping away our constitutional rights. **This affects all of us. The time to speak up and resist is now.** [**Sign on to demand your state and federal elected leaders stop the mass kidnappings, detentions, and deportations!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38TprM8-zgydfLp8z7CCTwPqPJkPnYawx87w1WMrJuk1j_yX25-ugDclPBdxN7cJ_7kccuOFpgKBXGfGGXvHa1Z934ei94YNdehuJe0eH6kTNbAbhuPuSz1tkG0JnKOOk9___ezvLQ8Q-fcpi3O-jtjqbNBzbNgDfXqWtYojPXc3iCK7VjtgXnv1tt4Hp1kBMzQSbSdBlRp8acd8UEFi3Q_3dkNjz0RNA6IwC2uM2qf_D003mWFE9wdG4eaIs2B0-skRhhg3QOUbzg7OHSn40y6YblLbGBO8DDqsMkfh_9Gogg2Kc0pKdy0vty0XBLGNAXwTXYMIy4lyFbQx050fceG25v9WKvesTvUxw6zbBFA98_yroem-cEj8jKgIAkYGn4/4fs/bO5E2ILNT3idYKG3w0jKgQ/h1/h001.qcu1VJk5hb5Sr2brp-k5qRD3ZCdBtqr9xwNoDWNneOY) | [SIGN NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38TprM8-zgydfLp8z7CCTwPqPJkPnYawx87w1WMrJuk1j_yX25-ugDclPBdxN7cJ_7kccuOFpgKBXGfGGXvHa1ZLxQfwjMAqmPHIxfRB5-59WpuqlNew2y4wNDA7z4vL-Iv_kmzUUL8k_iFu2udGkhI2WeaAqWLOLRK0rd0fHNJTCictCbJBjADcuCIPgrVlWhW26s9XScKbeD2OEf1w8YDVD5QnJwRDSA3bOPGe2FiEH_jEZTnLoPRUnBOYnzFrNOF4fHUwqW1yLpGuRtlcpcGFImOJukxvvZf8MKv3Wxli8uIxfaLpCFweW4sw9BaQDlNRbzwBX3fycpEzsJChUf3ZNvISnj4N3yI5hDz7EJYy2kQTod1MiBkeE2eg-CDkiE/4fs/bO5E2ILNT3idYKG3w0jKgQ/h2/h001.Om1o_HmIdkLOG_NEewS--psKNVE3IE7sEpiWTaAlEuc)

Rashida

From: **Rashida Tlaib******
Date: Fri, Apr 18, 2025
Subject: Sign: Stop kidnapping and disappearing U.S. residents!
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend,
The Trump administration is drastically escalating its fascist mass detention/deportation agenda.
Trump is defying an order from the Supreme Court to return a Maryland father to his family. Kilmar Abrego Garcia is among hundreds of U.S. residents abducted without due process and sent to El Salvador’s mega-prison, which is notorious for torturing the people trapped there. Most of these U.S. residents haven’t even been charged with a crime.1
**Now, Trump says he wants to deport and jail U.S. citizens overseas.** When meeting El Salvador’s self-described dictator at the White House this week, Trump asked him to build more prisons for “homegrowns.”2
We should take him at his word. This is the time to speak up and resist.
[**Sign on now to tell state and federal elected officials: Stop the kidnapping and disappearing of U.S. residents!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38TprM8-zgydfLp8z7CCTwPqPJkPnYawx87w1WMrJuk1j_yX25-ugDclPBdxN7cJ_7kccuOFpgKBXGfGGXvHa1Zwv7_kPwe9UGlurlZUJpM6XL0w5cvrXF1caVHmvJGRw3bgbSFxpCR7khkmfuLBHjgM-0tBJ_IZZ78Iru1wc_sDGBOpDNQEtVn03oodjUGC-J0IwKBXFLQffpsSykcSe8r83GeJzmS6yTspN0VJq8P5Co4yeILdVFNgCDFql8rCG4zAoc2kDhFnCGa0FiP6GGwjpm9zHiq-O9p4rCoUrl97AViTiU6Ee5ET98cu4uj8C1Fz3EUIBhe4qLqs50F0Mh_brYW4WTXByvD74tyaDS76WAp9kM8L_OC_sTvLWO8AOU/4fs/bO5E2ILNT3idYKG3w0jKgQ/h3/h001._ZerWD5tQuCAVLuJbOwUpogRKS8tFuOou9_Uw7p4XPc)
Unfortunately, the Supreme Court’s conservative majority recently ruled that Trump can use the _Alien Enemies Act_ to send people to El Salvador. This racist policy was used during World II to forcibly displace thousands of U.S. citizens of Japanese descent to internment camps. Trump could weaponize it against any of us.
And now, multiple U.S. citizens who serve as immigration attorneys have gotten emails saying they need to leave the country.
The emails, which mention revoking asylum-seekers’ temporary protected status, are possibly intended for the lawyers’ clients, but they demonstrate “a true recklessness coming from the government,” said one of the email’s recipients.3
Yesterday was a Communities Not Cages National Day of Action, and ongoing action is urgently needed. At ICE field offices and detention centers around the country, people demanded to release folks from immigrant detention, shut down detention centers, and stop deportations.4 We must all join this call and demand our elected leaders listen.
[**Sign to demand federal and state officials stop the kidnappings, detentions, and deportations!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38TprM8-zgydfLp8z7CCTwPqPJkPnYawx87w1WMrJuk1j_yX25-ugDclPBdxN7cJ_7kccuOFpgKBXGfGGXvHa1ZzE7HSXkeByNUAG_nB4egvhiByO4ONaH9LFdMfs6NX-Td9DSuVJhmXZAi5yrsmYGUHiZYQQDY-y4LUUnmUg4T8o8hk0e1PdySMSzEcdByiDBLaXooKxxB4884pHAIlfhn34vC4t_L76TwkJ1wq5l3sDzq-IkqBpKtfg0qZ_lemOnlLbzHDddSWruVi3Cz69QhfODRk4tSqLNWR7FG1we93phzrG4X4U-U7y6Xi8VFaz9Jy3NW5zGb-Mde3Y5u5lJ4-1TA8zjbQIbvxZq66v39Osq2Ka0Rm1INDS3d09H-kek/4fs/bO5E2ILNT3idYKG3w0jKgQ/h4/h001.F5wsYduUnrpivXL38NZ1TWnJZ1J7Jw8SqsjpWpROZXg)
[SIGN ON](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38TprM8-zgydfLp8z7CCTwPqPJkPnYawx87w1WMrJuk1j_yX25-ugDclPBdxN7cJ_7kccuOFpgKBXGfGGXvHa1Zi4AqhbtYr3Dlw-jkC5jS071xiKwARijMF5DT2Ye_XKdCzLre62GFhtDmv1J6T-lDBr-3oUWr8rW2jEDLFdVVfbhPRVeKPs43hhBK1SFn0RE6Ldhv7iT9jfM7fkFfKoC26iIX2CH9Q7DUD09WsvRRuX1THxCH9bUcolOcbY8Jbeo4pW2IvnvyHle29PCDCGj3mk-ex0VIBc0bKDtH97ca9IjqQy4igxXLdbWLtFyS37TcuyDde2NsQesIt6cnTQ0ctjBn5-E-WwSlWTxCiTGxBesWudV7QF9J5ynghcZz9Aw/4fs/bO5E2ILNT3idYKG3w0jKgQ/h5/h001.GxB8B9OdjsMiN6e7iPUvuCrLoWZvcy6gbRtrFI2egYo)

Right now, the Trump administration is continuing to kidnap international students and revoke their visas without notice. They’ve revoked more than 800 students’ visas, which has impacted at least 70 Michigan students so far.5
Among these students are Mahmoud Khalil and Rumeysa Ozturk, who were kidnapped without due process, sent from their Northeast U.S. campuses all the way to Louisiana—where presumably more judges will rule to deport them. Now in separate for-profit detention centers, these students weren’t even accused of a crime.
Even the State Department recommended not to revoke Ozturk’s student visa, with a leaked memo affirming that “Secretary of State Marco Rubio did not have sufficient grounds for revoking Ozturk’s visa.”6
Just this week, legal permanent resident Mohsen Mahdawi, a Columbia University student and president of the Buddhist club, was kidnapped after arriving at an ICE office for what he thought was a citizenship interview.7
This fascist regime is starting with kidnapping advocates for Palestinian human rights, our Latino neighbors, international university students, and some tourists. They won't stop there. They want to drastically increase the number of people locked up in detention centers.
Trump plans to spend $45 billion of our taxpayer dollars to build more private, for-profit, detention facilities.8 A new report from ProPublica shows that just one corporation got a $3.8 billion contract from ICE to operate a detention facility on a U.S. military base in Texas.9 This is yet another way to profit off mass misery.
This taxpayer money should be going to our communities’ needs, like clean drinking water, housing, and healthcare. But the Acting Director of ICE wants to use it for human trafficking. He told a crowd of military and tech corporations that he wants to treat deportation “like a business,” envisioning similarities with Amazon “Prime, but with human beings.”10
And Elon Musk—who keeps trying to steal from the American people even though he’s the richest person in the world by hundreds of billions of dollars—has a DOGE immigration task force embedded in the Department of Homeland Security.11
They’re systematically revoking visas and protected statuses en masse.
[**We must speak up now to defend the constitutional rights we’re all owed. Sign on to demand your elected leaders stop the mass kidnappings and deportations.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38TprM8-zgydfLp8z7CCTwPqPJkPnYawx87w1WMrJuk1j_yX25-ugDclPBdxN7cJ_7kccuOFpgKBXGfGGXvHa1Zml1xwP5xV0a6-ffIkZlLCAzRbQuMeefP7LTj4kz6fvL7ODz-RBYYd_KvjEgCJ3nKEQplCZQ6rC8UFLic7J4b_VlBgU9y3TSNzw_DKJajp4ozUGWTso0SZ7xPBZZT0OQ0HlGsHdDWhou6jEXXvwpiteecldHV1USL3O6OwyR6iRSipgFq0LN8qha7B4DeZFTw-loIKvIkRrO4cPVrbk__aQQcxh7pqvL6IrL-kmfAZGHTF4YqiGu3hJdpqFj1KDtwk-CLv6RF2zWOkK786nIWtpA6L1GnM_Ut51DAI_dUq80/4fs/bO5E2ILNT3idYKG3w0jKgQ/h6/h001.plLWOZ8WL8raEKXNpXdaGbmJg2z8ExOc0nSK0Xp1xf0)
Thank you for taking action. I will continue doing all I can to defend our rights and hold Musk, Trump, and the administration accountable. But this moment requires masses of people taking a stand.
Please keep speaking up about our shared rights and shared humanity. As activist Kelly Hayes writes: “we are going to have to refuse characterizations that deem some of us disposable—because that’s how fascist politics actually function.”12
With you in the fight against fascism,
Rashida
