name: Sharice Davids
subject: A full-scale attack on reproductive care
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
My bill would guarantee annual funding for Title X and protect providers like Planned Parenthood

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106136092/540538803/-240735101?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OWZmNjdjYi0zYjFkLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cJQAQxTkgqO5DyTib87foYv6A8C_BYXV5R2d1Up-AqA=) _**“Family planning clinics face ruin after White House freezes funds”**_ I want to make this as clear as I possibly can: **The Trump Administration has launched a full-scale attack on reproductive health care.** Let me explain: Just a few weeks ago, the Trump Administration froze millions of dollars in Congressionally-appropriated funding for Title X — a program that has provided critical health care services including birth control, cancer screenings, and STI testing for over 50 years. Today, many Planned Parenthood affiliates that rely on Title X funding have lost access to millions of dollars, impacting care for over one million Americans. [_**That’s why I’m taking action. I just introduced the _Expanding Access to Family Planning Act_ to safeguard and increase funding for Title X, but I need your help to get it across the finish line. Will you chip in today to help me show Congress that folks in your community will always stand up for reproductive health care?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106136093/540538807/213558093?refcode=email_041825_Family-planning&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OWZmNjdjYi0zYjFkLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cJQAQxTkgqO5DyTib87foYv6A8C_BYXV5R2d1Up-AqA=) | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106136095/540538808/213558093?refcode=email_041825_Family-planning&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OWZmNjdjYi0zYjFkLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cJQAQxTkgqO5DyTib87foYv6A8C_BYXV5R2d1Up-AqA=)
---
Make no mistake: If the Trump Administration succeeds in permanently gutting Title X, cancers will go undetected, women will lose access to birth control, and families will no longer be able to afford fertility services.
That’s why my bill would guarantee annual funding for Title X, protect providers like Planned Parenthood, and ensure every Kansan, regardless of income, has access to affordable reproductive health care. And listen, I’m not naive. I know getting this bill passed into law won’t be easy. But with so much on the line, falling short is not an option.
But this isn’t a battle I can win on my own. If we want to stop the Trump Administration from playing politics with our health care, we have to make sure every Kansan and every American knows exactly what’s at stake.
[_**Please, will you chip in a donation today to show your support for my bill? With your help, we can prove to this administration that grassroots opposition to their health care scheme runs deep.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106136101/540538809/213558093?refcode=email_041825_Family-planning&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OWZmNjdjYi0zYjFkLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cJQAQxTkgqO5DyTib87foYv6A8C_BYXV5R2d1Up-AqA=)

clean_body: My bill would guarantee annual funding for Title X and protect providers like Planned Parenthood = “Family planning clinics face ruin after White House freezes funds” I want to make this as clear as I possibly can: The Trump Administration has launched a full-scale attack on reproductive health care. Let me explain: Just a few weeks ago, the Trump Administration froze millions of dollars in Congressionally-appropriated funding for Title X — a program that has provided critical health care services including birth control, cancer screenings, and STI testing for over 50 years. Today, many Planned Parenthood affiliates that rely on Title X funding have lost access to millions of dollars, impacting care for over one million Americans. = | | = Make no mistake: If the Trump Administration succeeds in permanently gutting Title X, cancers will go undetected, women will lose access to birth control, and families will no longer be able to afford fertility services. That’s why my bill would guarantee annual funding for Title X, protect providers like Planned Parenthood, and ensure every Kansan, regardless of income, has access to affordable reproductive health care. And listen, I’m not naive. I know getting this bill passed into law won’t be easy. But with so much on the line, falling short is not an option. But this isn’t a battle I can win on my own. If we want to stop the Trump Administration from playing politics with our health care, we have to make sure every Kansan and every American knows exactly what’s at stake. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = With gratitude, -Sharice | This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Jeff Merkley
subject: Disenfranchising millions of voters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
Republicans in the House just rammed through a bill that would disenfranchise millions of voters and make it harder for you to vote.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106136187/540539132/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjU4MDE1ZS0zYzFkLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iYeHMqHY5l4ZKonRXwEQyZh-KJzXOdodn9FNOQaqNnA=&emci=07f8101e-731c-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=b658015e-3c1d-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=7731215)

| | Republicans in the House just rammed through a bill that would disenfranchise millions of voters and make it harder for you to vote. Let's dive into their new voter suppression plan. The SAVE Act is the latest scheme by Republicans to rig the rules and silence voters. It's framed as an initiative to stop voter fraud, but it's spurred by baseless narratives and lies perpetrated by Trump and his MAGA minions. Make no mistake: The SAVE Act demands voters present a birth certificate, U.S. passport, naturalization paperwork, or certain versions of the Real ID to indicate citizenship to cast a ballot. **And here's a key detail they don't want you to know. As many as 69 million women changed their last names after marriage. That means their birth certificates might not match their current IDs — putting their right to vote at risk.** **_This bill is a blatant attempt to prevent people from voting, and it’s un-American._** As it moves forward in the Senate, my Democratic colleagues and I will fight to stop it. We will not allow this bill to become law and suppress the voices of millions of Americans. Onward, _Jeff_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Jeff Merkley instantly:

name: Sarah McBride
subject: Lots of chickens 🐔
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
I introduced the SAVE Our Poultry Act.
#
Delaware’s got a lot of chickens — _**roughly 200 for every single person**_ in our small state. 🐔
But behind that fun fact is a serious truth: Poultry is a cornerstone of our economy. Thousands of Delawareans depend on this industry, and right now, its future is at risk.
When I sat down with Mike, a poultry farmer in Middletown, he shared his real fears about what the next outbreak of the avian flu could mean. Not just for his birds — but for his ability to keep his farm going.
**So I introduced the SAVE Our Poultry Act — a bipartisan bill to invest in the research on the disease so we can protect our farmers and flocks.**
Because defending our food systems and our economy means protecting our communities. And that starts with listening, acting, and delivering results.
We’ve taken the first step. Now, I need your help to build momentum to push this bill forward and continue to push for even more legislation that will benefit working people.
[**If this is the kind of leadership you want to throw your support behind, please pitch in $5 to power our campaign and fuel my work in Congress.** ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250419-1?refcode=em20250419-1915&amount=5&refcode2=1915_21716_T8eTY9&akid=1915%2E21716%2ET8eTY9)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250419-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250419-1915&refcode2=1915_21716_T8eTY9&akid=1915%2E21716%2ET8eTY9)**
Thanks for being in it with me,
Sarah

subject: AP Report: Indivisible and ActBlue preparing to be Trump admin targets
body:
This about destroying the infrastructure of the Democratic party and silencing dissent.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106136428/540539888/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjJjZmY5MzMtM2QxZC1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=CqhHoUMXlW9GfeAKxjYoZH_Ia2mDF9UEU887guRAsyg=&emci=08236a4d-6a1c-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=f2cff933-3d1d-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=14016711)

Peter,
We’ve been sounding the alarm about Trump and MAGA’s plans to take down ActBlue.
Now it’s official:
**According to a new Associated Press report, the Trump administration is preparing to use the full force of the federal government to prosecute both ActBlue and Indivisible—a group that’s organizing large protests against the Trump administration across the country.**
Peter, this is no longer about public pressure or political messaging. It’s about destroying the infrastructure of the Democratic party and silencing dissent.
**[Before we explain what’s happening, we need your help. If you believe in journalism that won’t back down in the face of authoritarian threats, chip in $25 right now to help COURIER report the truth—and reach the people who need to hear it.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106136429/540539889/-1581427288?refcode=20250419_Indivisible_ActBlue&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjJjZmY5MzMtM2QxZC1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=CqhHoUMXlW9GfeAKxjYoZH_Ia2mDF9UEU887guRAsyg=)**

Here’s what we know:
The White House is preparing a formal rescission request to Congress that would trigger criminal investigations into both organizations.
ActBlue has already been forced to turn over documents and send staffers to testify behind closed doors. The group is now preparing for potential FBI and Treasury investigations over allegations that have been repeatedly debunked.
At the same time, Indivisible’s national leadership is working with lawyers to prepare for the possibility that its organizers could face criminal charges simply for organizing peaceful protests.
**According to the AP, this follows Trump’s executive order directing the Justice Department to investigate critics and his claim—made publicly—that those who oppose him may be guilty of “treason.”**
Trump’s far-right influencer army isn't hiding the intent. Charlie Kirk told supporters he believes the FBI will “do something on ActBlue soon.” Matt Schlapp, one of Trump’s closest confidants, said Democrats “need to get burned” so they don’t try to oppose him again.
**Peter, there has never been a more important moment to support independent media that isn’t afraid to expose these authoritarian attacks.**

We are building one of the only grassroots-funded, independent media networks in the country willing to take on the Trump administration with urgency and clarity these times demand.

name: Trump Tank Parade Alert via Our Revolution
subject: Add your name: No Trump Tank Parade
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Reports keep coming in that Donald Trump wants tanks rolling through the
streets of Washington, D.C., for his birthday.

This is the stuff of dictatorships, not democracies—and we need to act
immediately. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25232?source=email-20250419&t=1011&akid=8297%2E5885482%2ERAP9fn ]Add your name to demand Congress stop this ludicrous and
self-aggrandizing misuse of our military!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25232?source=email-20250419&t=1012&akid=8297%2E5885482%2ERAP9fn ]ADD YOUR NAME

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25232?source=email-20250419&t=1013&akid=8297%2E5885482%2ERAP9fn ]Headline Trump Orders Four Mile Military Parade for his 79th Birthday

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25232?source=email-20250419&t=1014&akid=8297%2E5885482%2ERAP9fn ]ADD YOUR NAME

In authoritarian regimes from Russia to North Korea, military parades
aren't celebrations—they're threats. Trump's reported plan would turn
American troops into political props, staging a demonstration of his
personal power.

History shows democracies erode gradually, through symbols, signals, and
unchecked vanity projects like this one. Trump co-opting the 250th
anniversary of the U.S. Army is a dangerous appropriation of our nation's
military symbols for his own glorification.

Plans are reportedly still in the early stages, giving us a critical
window to stop Trump's military parade before it becomes reality. Congress
controls funding, which means they can shut this down. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25232?source=email-20250419&t=1015&akid=8297%2E5885482%2ERAP9fn ]Add your name to
tell Congress: No Tank Parade for Trump's Birthday!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25232?t=1016&akid=8297%2E5885482%2ERAP9fn ]ADD YOUR NAME

For generations, we've proudly honored our troops for their courage,
valor, and sacrifice. Major military parades should celebrate genuine
victories and recognize service—not stroke the ego of one man. Together,
let's protect this proud tradition.

When we organize, we win,

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

establishment by committing to be a 2024 Movement Builder with a

| | Dear Peter,
---
**A poisonous snake in my coffee cup, and a massive python on the trail during my prayer walk — just a few of the surprises that awaited me in Africa!** When you’re expecting God to move, you can expect dangers along the way. Serving God is an adventure — and sometimes, it takes some strange, slithery turns. Hear the stories about my snake encounters below! _**WATCH ⬇︎⬇︎⬇︎**_

clean_body: | | | | | Dear Peter, A poisonous snake in my coffee cup, and a massive python on the trail during my prayer walk — just a few of the surprises that awaited me in Africa! When you’re expecting God to move, you can expect dangers along the way. Serving God is an adventure — and sometimes, it takes some strange, slithery turns. Hear the stories about my snake encounters below! WATCH ⬇︎⬇︎⬇︎ | | | | Till all hear, Sean | | | | INTERNATIONAL DONORS— DONATE Donate by Check or Money Order Sean Feucht Ministries310 Third Street NEWashington, DC 20002 Contributions are tax-deductible. | | Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Let Us Worship

name: Michael Whatley
subject: The House majority is critical
body:
This is a message for you

| Not interested? [Unsubscribe here](https://links.housegopbattlegroundfund.com/unsubscribe?e=fb0901ca2f8dec6e91386ad304a63eb4&utm_source=hdhousegopbattlegroundfund&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=em_780e9bd02dd7fb4ac9be17d94c9&n=1).
---
| | | | | |
---
Peter, as Chairman of the Republican National Committee, I am profoundly grateful for what the American people have accomplished. Together, **we've sent President Trump back to the White House** , **flipped the Senate** , and **maintained our majority** in the House of Representatives.
[NEVER SURRENDER - THE FIGHT ISN'T OVER](https://links.housegopbattlegroundfund.com/r?u=uWbmnyt256r-kCbmRUoNlMA355YHy5i-apw2FVj74bNbqlCbWMH_abp5jC7qVubsBMnTVnD1ky6dHc3Kwj_P91rau1nFComb0sDtc7bB3Up4YlN0nhH5KmxNHXVFd8g4P8FuCe_9lzSbVo5TmC5yNF01SMKzd9Kno18IjLbwkPqT-MopbTQ6H-fSmfjjwRP0DTOR5eq8JLCvpooWENOSgZCans16u_KO2AVSYPdUsAvoM2znlXVamDvtBcBUreFyKY4zh548IOeYZtmABOBDjDygWNXZ3TnWxmGSlFZxtHDR-xCvCfA_xt2XIrNL4ayukP3TtN9eEUlvgd6GLo0bMJlPEelLmDpmmMafklIR-_JlQcLf9DGCJ6B7fwRkiBAeGHXH1-cUv4YKw1KjH1bGw6c2YhVXI4lg7Wr0wzB8P0vXqOVgzOKaQuSq2OumQ6HnAMUECAU3cCcpR20h436mUf7ccCqjHglh--DtIfmTZbbfpUE5gw8_oZWW4dZ7tfBZ&e=fb0901ca2f8dec6e91386ad304a63eb4&utm_source=hdhousegopbattlegroundfund&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=em_780e9bd02dd7fb4ac9be17d94c9&n=2)
**But I hope you know: Our work is far from over.** The radical left is **more determined than ever** to dismantle our achievements and impose their extreme agenda on America. They are mobilizing vast resources to **overturn our House majority** in the upcoming special elections, elections that could flip the House blue, and stop President Trump’s agenda in its tracks. **__[We cannot allow this to happen](https://links.housegopbattlegroundfund.com/r?u=uWbmnyt256r-kCbmRUoNlMA355YHy5i-apw2FVj74bNbqlCbWMH_abp5jC7qVubsBMnTVnD1ky6dHc3Kwj_P91rau1nFComb0sDtc7bB3Up4YlN0nhH5KmxNHXVFd8g4P8FuCe_9lzSbVo5TmC5yNF01SMKzd9Kno18IjLbwkPqT-MopbTQ6H-fSmfjjwRP0DTOR5eq8JLCvpooWENOSgZCans16u_KO2AVSYPdUsAvoM2znlXVamDvtBcBUreFyKY4zh548IOeYZtmABOBDjDygWNXZ3TnWxmGSlFZxtHDR-xCvCfA_xt2XIrNL4ayukP3TtN9eEUlvgd6GLo0bMJlPEelLmDpmmMafklIR-_JlQcLf9DGCJ6B7fwRkiBAeGHXH1-cUv4YKw1KjH1bGw6c2YhVXI4lg7Wr0wzB8P0vXqOVgzOKaQuSq2OumQ6HnAMUECAU3cCcpR20h436mUf7ccCqjHglh--DtIfmTZbbfpUE5gw8_oZWW4dZ7tfBZ&e=fb0901ca2f8dec6e91386ad304a63eb4&utm_source=hdhousegopbattlegroundfund&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=em_780e9bd02dd7fb4ac9be17d94c9&n=3)_._**
[NEVER SURRENDER - THE FIGHT ISN'T OVER](https://links.housegopbattlegroundfund.com/r?u=uWbmnyt256r-kCbmRUoNlMA355YHy5i-apw2FVj74bNbqlCbWMH_abp5jC7qVubsBMnTVnD1ky6dHc3Kwj_P91rau1nFComb0sDtc7bB3Up4YlN0nhH5KmxNHXVFd8g4P8FuCe_9lzSbVo5TmC5yNF01SMKzd9Kno18IjLbwkPqT-MopbTQ6H-fSmfjjwRP0DTOR5eq8JLCvpooWENOSgZCans16u_KO2AVSYPdUsAvoM2znlXVamDvtBcBUreFyKY4zh548IOeYZtmABOBDjDygWNXZ3TnWxmGSlFZxtHDR-xCvCfA_xt2XIrNL4ayukP3TtN9eEUlvgd6GLo0bMJlPEelLmDpmmMafklIR-_JlQcLf9DGCJ6B7fwRkiBAeGHXH1-cUv4YKw1KjH1bGw6c2YhVXI4lg7Wr0wzB8P0vXqOVgzOKaQuSq2OumQ6HnAMUECAU3cCcpR20h436mUf7ccCqjHglh--DtIfmTZbbfpUE5gw8_oZWW4dZ7tfBZ&e=fb0901ca2f8dec6e91386ad304a63eb4&utm_source=hdhousegopbattlegroundfund&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=em_780e9bd02dd7fb4ac9be17d94c9&n=4)
Maintaining our majority in the House is crucial for advancing President Trump's America-First Agenda and enacting policies that reflect our shared values. **As I have emphasized,******** "The RNC will focus solely on raising the money we need to win, getting out the vote, and protecting the ballot to support and advance President Trump’s America-First Agenda."** The stakes have never been higher. We must act swiftly and decisively to protect our majority and prevent the left from undoing all that we've accomplished.
If you’re able, I hope you’ll chip in to our victory fund and help us maintain our majority... The radical left is mobilizing a war chest funded by special interest groups, foreign billionaires, and woke corporations bent on undoing everything we’ve accomplished.
We need to be able to **pay** **court fees** , **pay** **attorneys’ fees** , **put our strategists on the ground** , and **keep our ad buys flowing** , or I’m afraid the left might out pace us, and retake the House. **__[While we’ve been focusing on leading the country, the left has been 100% focused on winning elections, and we are already at a disadvantage. Will you help us maintain the majority](https://links.housegopbattlegroundfund.com/r?u=uWbmnyt256r-kCbmRUoNlMA355YHy5i-apw2FVj74bNbqlCbWMH_abp5jC7qVubsBMnTVnD1ky6dHc3Kwj_P91rau1nFComb0sDtc7bB3Up4YlN0nhH5KmxNHXVFd8g4P8FuCe_9lzSbVo5TmC5yNF01SMKzd9Kno18IjLbwkPqT-MopbTQ6H-fSmfjjwRP0DTOR5eq8JLCvpooWENOSgZCans16u_KO2AVSYPdUsAvoM2znlXVamDvtBcBUreFyKY4zh548IOeYZtmABOBDjDygWNXZ3TnWxmGSlFZxtHDR-xCvCfA_xt2XIrNL4ayukP3TtN9eEUlvgd6GLo0bMJlPEelLmDpmmMafklIR-_JlQcLf9DGCJ6B7fwRkiBAeGHXH1-cUv4YKw1KjH1bGw6c2YhVXI4lg7Wr0wzB8P0vXqOVgzOKaQuSq2OumQ6HnAMUECAU3cCcpR20h436mUf7ccCqjHglh--DtIfmTZbbfpUE5gw8_oZWW4dZ7tfBZ&e=fb0901ca2f8dec6e91386ad304a63eb4&utm_source=hdhousegopbattlegroundfund&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=em_780e9bd02dd7fb4ac9be17d94c9&n=5)_?_**
_Yours,_
**Michael Whatley** Chairman, Republican National Committee
| | [](https://links.housegopbattlegroundfund.com/r?u=uWbmnyt256r-kCbmRUoNlMA355YHy5i-apw2FVj74bNbqlCbWMH_abp5jC7qVubsBMnTVnD1ky6dHc3Kwj_P91rau1nFComb0sDtc7bB3Up4YlN0nhH5KmxNHXVFd8g4P8FuCe_9lzSbVo5TmC5yNF01SMKzd9Kno18IjLbwkPqT-MopbTQ6H-fSmfjjwRP0DTOR5eq8JLCvpooWENOSgZCans16u_KO2AVSYPdUsAvoM2znlXVamDvtBcBUreFyKY4zh548IOeYZtmABOBDjDygWNXZ3TnWxmGSlFZxtHDR-xCvCfA_xt2XIrNL4ayukP3TtN9eEUlvgd6GLo0bMJlPEelLmDpmmMafklIR-_JlQcLf9DGCJ6B7fwRkiBAeGHXH1-cUv4YKw1KjH1bGw6c2YhVXI4lg7Wr0wzB8P0vXqOVgzOKaQuSq2OumQ6HnAMUECAU3cCcpR20h436mUf7ccCqjHglh--DtIfmTZbbfpUE5gw8_oZWW4dZ7tfBZ&e=fb0901ca2f8dec6e91386ad304a63eb4&utm_source=hdhousegopbattlegroundfund&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=em_780e9bd02dd7fb4ac9be17d94c9&n=6)
---
|
---

name: Congresswoman Sarah Elfreth
subject: I’m fighting for the 1 in 3
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elfreth for Maryland
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q1-2025-em?refcode=BLU_EM_SEFC_2025-01-04_1&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q1-2025-em?refcode=BLU_EM_SEFC_2025-01-04_1&amount=25]
A budget is a statement of values, and in the last few months Congressional Republicans have put forward a budget resolution that made their values clear. While my Democratic colleagues and I have been sounding the alarm about rising costs for working families, Congressional Republicans have been working to pass a budget with $880 billion in cuts that would decimate Medicaid. This is unacceptable.
Medicaid is an essential program for families all over the country, and I think it’s important that we get our facts straight:
* Nationally, 1 in 3 Americans is covered by Medicaid
* 60,000 kids in Maryland’s Third Congressional District rely on Medicaid
* 61% of seniors rely on Medicaid for long term care
This also isn’t fiscally responsible. The same budget resolution calls for increasing the debt ceiling by $4 trillion AND adding $14 trillion to the debt over the next decade as they gut a program that millions of Americans rely on.
I believe in protecting Medicaid for the millions of Marylanders who rely on the program. It’s why I’m talking about it every day [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q2-2025-em?refcode=blu_em_sefc_2025-04-19] — both in Washington and at home in our District. Will you stand with me? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q2-2025-em?refcode=blu_em_sefc_2025-04-19]

clean_body: [] A budget is a statement of values, and in the last few months Congressional Republicans have put forward a budget resolution that made their values clear. While my Democratic colleagues and I have been sounding the alarm about rising costs for working families, Congressional Republicans have been working to pass a budget with $880 billion in cuts that would decimate Medicaid. This is unacceptable. Medicaid is an essential program for families all over the country, and I think it’s important that we get our facts straight: Nationally, 1 in 3 Americans is covered by Medicaid 60,000 kids in Maryland’s Third Congressional District rely on Medicaid * 61% of seniors rely on Medicaid for long term care This also isn’t fiscally responsible. The same budget resolution calls for increasing the debt ceiling by $4 trillion AND adding $14 trillion to the debt over the next decade as they gut a program that millions of Americans rely on. I believe in protecting Medicaid for the millions of Marylanders who rely on the program. It’s why I’m talking about it every day [] — both in Washington and at home in our District. Will you stand with me? [] CONTRIBUTE $5 [] CONTRIBUTE $10 [] CONTRIBUTE $25 [] CONTRIBUTE $50 [] OTHER AMOUNT [] Thank you, Sarah Elfreth [] Paid for by Elfreth for Maryland Elfreth for Maryland PO Box 5935 Annapolis, MD 21403 United States

# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39653%2E3422442%2EeNU8Nx)
Dear Derek,
A new poll released this week shows that Katie is the frontrunner among declared candidates to be California’s next governor!
The not so good news: **just under half of voters are undecided.**
That means this race is very much still up in the air. We have a heck of a lot more work to do to communicate with voters.
Katie’s tentative lead shows that her message of bringing down costs and bringing everyone together to solve our biggest challenges resonates with voters when they hear it.
**But, we need to meet these undecided voters where they are and make sure they hear about Katie’s vision for California—and that takes resources.**

name: Josh Gottheimer
subject: I will fight for you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR GOVERNOR
body:
---
| | Team,

Jersey is too damn expensive.

As I visit with people all across our state, that’s the message I hear from corner to corner.

**One of the biggest expenses? Utility bill hikes.**

_**EXHIBIT 1 - JOINT FUNDRAISING NOTICE **_

Team Nunn ("JFC") is a joint fundraising committee composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn ("Campaign"), Call to Service PAC ("LPAC") and NRCC (each, a "Committee," and, collectively, the "Committees"). Any contribution to the JFC permissible under the Federal Election Campaign Act, as amended ("FECA"), from contributors who have not exceeded their applicable federal contribution limits, shall be allocated among the Committees pursuant to FECA and the formula set forth in this Notice.

_**Contributions Made by an Individual or Federal Non-Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Individuals or federal non-multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $322,100. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $7,000, designating up to $3,500 to the primary election and up to $3,500 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3\. NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $44,300 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

_**Contributions Made by a Federal Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $120,000. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $10,000, designating up to $5,000 to the primary election and up to $5,000 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3 .NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $15,000 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5 .NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

Contributions to Team Nunn, or to any participating Committee individually, are not deductible as charitable donations for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, national banks, federal government contractors, foreign nationals without green cards, and other federally impermissible sources are prohibited. The contributor's signature designates his or her contribution to the elections described above. Contributions that exceed a donor's contribution limit to a participating Committee shall be reallocated to the remaining Committees according to this allocation formula to the extent permitted by FECA. name: Tina Kotek
subject: I want to hear from you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
|
#
---
Hi Peter, I’m reaching out to you today because I want to hear from YOU. We’re facing big challenges everywhere, with the chaos coming out of D.C. certainly not helping as we work to stay focused on meeting the needs of Oregonians. When things are tough, we need to stick together and be strategic. And I want you to know that your voice matters in shaping the future of our state. My job is to listen, understand, and take action on what matters most to you. So I’m asking — What are you worried about right now? What do you want me to know? Your concerns are my concerns. I’m committed to making Oregon a better place for everyone, and your input will help me make decisions that reflect what we need as a community.

Please take a moment to share your thoughts with me today. I’m ready to listen and take action. | [SHARE YOUR THOUGHTS](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106139677/540550753/-1305179273?refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20250419_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTAxMWEzMy00NjFkLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RKJO3gbZxKz3eDT8GG2jB7hqtxBkhUBS2dz4qW9iwVI=&emci=6f011a33-461d-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=75011a33-461d-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=15353729)
---
Thank you for being part of this journey. I’m proud to be your governor, and I’m grateful for your continued support.

Look forward to hearing from you,

Tina

| Tina Kotek is working hard to make Oregon a better place to live and work for all Oregonians – and making real progress on issues like housing and homelessness, education and child care, and mental health and addiction services. **Can you chip in any amount now to support her work?** | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106139678/540550754/559856784?refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20250419_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTAxMWEzMy00NjFkLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RKJO3gbZxKz3eDT8GG2jB7hqtxBkhUBS2dz4qW9iwVI=)

# The Nebraska Republican Party Latinos Coalition Will Kickoff its Recruitment Efforts by Walking in the Cinco De Mayo Parade (May 10th) and Staffing a Voter Registration Booth at the Cinco De Mayo Festival (May 9-10) in South Omaha.

|

* **Parade Date & Time: **Saturday, May 10th at 9:30 a.m.
* **Parade Route: **South 24th Street from D to Q in Omaha, Nebraska

---
| [Sign-Up to Walk in Parade](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=f592f95dbe&e=25844e23a8 "Sign-Up to Walk in Parade")

|
#### **Voter Registration Booth:**
* **Friday, May 9th: **5:00 p.m. - 10:30 p.m.
* **Saturday, May 10th:** 10:30 a.m. - 10:30 p.m

---
| [Sign-Up to Staff Voter Registration Booth](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=ed610c8783&e=25844e23a8 "Sign-Up to Staff Voter Registration Booth")

|

|

# What is the Latinos Coalition?
---
| [ ](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=01ef007782&e=25844e23a8)
---
| The purpose of the Nebraska Republican Party Latinos Coalition is to engage and grow Latino**** representation and voter registration in the Nebraska Republican Party. The NEGOP is seeking dedicated and organized individuals to join this coalition and be a part of upholding traditional family values, religious freedom, recognizing the sanctity of innocent human life, promoting Hispanic businesses, and championing economic freedom. ****
---
|
---
| [Join the Latinos Coalition](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=2c5b54903f&e=25844e23a8 "Join the Latinos Coalition")

|
---
|
# Goals of Latinos Coalition
---
| Through the Latinos Coalition, the Nebraska Republican Party will Identify, Register, Inspire, and Mobilize the Latino population in Nebraska.
---
| [ ](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=7582cb6d91&e=25844e23a8)
---
|
---
|
# Latinos Coalition Fights For:
---
| [ ](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=fd91e51eee&e=25844e23a8)
---
| **_FAMILY VALUES:_ **Upholding traditional family values, religious freedom, and recognizing the sanctity of innocent human life. **_PROMOTING HISPANIC BUSINESS:_** Investing in and empowering community leaders who will champion conservative values within communities and ensure business owners have the full authority to live out the American dream here in Nebraska. **_CHAMPIONING ECONOMIC FREEDOM:_** Promoting the free enterprise system that is free of big government control to ensure that every American can reach their full potential in competitive commerce.
---
|
---
| [ ](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=2c1fd39e16&e=25844e23a8)

name: Team Gillibrand
subject: It’s time to BAN stock trading in Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106139981/540551896/1871331724?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2025.04.19_Stocks_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzY1ODBiMS00NzFkLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zJrziPbmYrAHmC77g71VExL6XlIjHKZPgRcZY9RZwGA=&emci=65e67b25-c81b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=176580b1-471d-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=7659029) | | [SIGN YOUR NAME >> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106139982/540551897/1871331724?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2025.04.19_Stocks_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzY1ODBiMS00NzFkLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zJrziPbmYrAHmC77g71VExL6XlIjHKZPgRcZY9RZwGA=&emci=65e67b25-c81b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=176580b1-471d-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=7659029)
---
Seeing that headline can’t feel good.

While Americans are struggling to pay their rent and put food on the table, **Trump tipped off his loyalists to stock market trends in a Truth Social post to help them make a profit.**

Marjorie Taylor Greene even admitted that she bought at least tens of thousands of dollars in stock the day before the market crashed. Trump helped members of Congress like her make money while millions were in a financial panic.

_It’s unacceptable._

That’s why Senator Gillibrand has fought for years to ban members of Congress and senior executive branch officials from buying and trading stocks. It’s one of her top priorities to pass bipartisan legislation to keep representatives focused on serving their constituents instead of lining their pockets.

Marjorie Taylor Greene even admitted that she bought at least tens of thousands of dollars in stock the day before the market crashed. Trump helped members of Congress like her make money while millions were in a financial panic. It’s unacceptable. | | Hi Peter, Have you ever been to the Grand Canyon? I haven't, but it's been on my bucket list ever since I was a kid. That's why I'm personally so excited to announce that we're giving away a glamping trip to the Grand Canyon for [OLCV’s Annual Celebration](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106140054/540552256/-1181493100?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJiNjRhMzFhLTQ4MWQtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=k9i7C1daxH1pM7Gg8jSLEBQOJuOgFXgdLwEVg9O6LLI=&emci=1f1f315d-9c1c-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=bb64a31a-481d-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=2107230) on May 2nd! What could be more magical than sleeping under the stars in the majestic Grand Canyon? This experience includes a 3-night stay at Clear Sky Resort Grand Canyon in a Sky Dome for 2. Enjoy stargazing with telescopes, nightly s’mores and live music! Just 20 minutes from the south entrance to Grand Canyon Park, you’ll experience epic stargazing and witness spectacular sunrises and sunsets. Enjoy a stay in a Grand Canyon Sky Dome with a queen bed, large panoramic view window, A/C, a modern private bathroom with luxurious rain shower, and wifi. It’s an authentic glamping experience offering stunningly beautiful views of the Grand Canyon. Don’t miss your chance to win this once in a lifetime experience! By buying a raffle ticket today, you're not only entering to win a once in a lifetime trip, but you are supporting our work of protecting Oregon's natural legacy, electing pro-environment candidates to office, and holding our elected leaders accountable. You don't have to attend the event to win, but tickets are limited so get yours now!

_**“What’s actually going on here is cheating.”**_
**—A.G. Holder**
_**“There have been Republicans and independent voters targeted as well. And I have had the opportunity to talk to Republican voters — people who didn’t even vote for me — and say to them, ‘Look, you got to make your choice on Election Day. You deserve to have someone on the bench who is willing to say, ‘I don’t care that you didn’t vote for me. I am going to defend to my dying breath your right to have cast your ballot the way you did and to have it counted.”**_
**—Justice Allison Riggs**
[**We’re working to expose the GOP’s attack on democracy — in North Carolina and across the country. You deserve to have someone on the bench who is willing to say, ‘I don’t care that you didn’t vote for me. I am going to defend to my dying breath your right to have cast your ballot the way you did and to have it counted.” —Justice Allison Riggs = Thanks so much — we’ll keep you posted on what happens next. Team NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

Governor Ron DeSantis has officially called on the Secretary of State to schedule TWO special elections on a RAPIDLY accelerated timeline.

And it’s even sadder that his allies in Congress are more focused on scaring me into silence than holding Trump accountable, defending our democracy, and saving our country from a needless recession. That’s why I’m working overtime to end their grip on power and put Democrats back in control — but I need you with me now more than ever. | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. Hey Peter, we know these emails can get annoying. Our inboxes are getting crowded, too — so trust us when we say we understand how frustrating the constant stream of emails can be. But we’re reaching out to you today because these emails are the **best way** to hit our grassroots donor goals. To speak directly to folks like you. Unlike other politicians, Becca doesn’t take money from big corporate donors with a hidden agenda — she relies on support from people like you who pitch in $10 or $5 at a time. We’ll never expect you to chip into every email. body:
With Trump tanking the economy and threatening our democracy with his authoritarian actions, Democrats need to win as many races as possible to combat the right-wing oligarchy taking over our country. | | |
---
| |
---|---
**There are _15 special elections_** **over the next few months**. With Trump tanking the economy and threatening our democracy with his authoritarian actions, Democrats need to win as many races as possible to combat the right-wing oligarchy taking over our country. 10 states have elections that require our immediate attention. Already this year, the MAGA movement has poured millions of dollars into states like Wisconsin and Pennsylvania, and the only way we can keep up is if we have the resources to compete. $3 from youis all we’re asking for to help fund our fight to secure VICTORY in upcoming elections all over the country. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | Together, Team DLCC | Prepared and paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005. Kim’s heading back to Congress soon, and she wants to bring your voice with her. Whether it’s protecting reproductive rights, lowering prescription drug costs, defending our democracy, or something else entirely—**your input shapes her work.**

I've faced some truly **tough** challenges before fellow Conservative, but I think this could be the hardest mountain I'll ever have to climb...

I was legally barred from accepting _any_ campaign donations during Virginia's legislative session. But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, was _**RAKING IN**_ millions and **millions** of dollars! I'm not kidding - _**a Soros-backed group gave Spanberger $500K all in one shot, fellow Conservative!**_

As a devout Christian, I wouldn't lie to you. So, please believe me when I tell you this is a really __**BAD**__ situation! _The truth is, Spanberger has**bottomless** dark money to rely on. _She can run to Soros, the Clintons, and every liberal in Hollywood to fill her campaign coffers to the brim!__

clean_body: | | | | | | | I've faced some truly tough challenges before fellow Conservative, but I think this could be the hardest mountain I'll ever have to climb... I was legally barred from accepting any campaign donations during Virginia's legislative session. But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, was RAKING IN millions and millions of dollars! I'm not kidding - a Soros-backed group gave Spanberger $500K all in one shot, fellow Conservative! As a devout Christian, I wouldn't lie to you. So, please believe me when I tell you this is a really BAD situation! The truth is, Spanberger hasbottomless dark money to rely on. She can run to Soros, the Clintons, and every liberal in Hollywood to fill her campaign coffers to the brim! This is a BAD situation that will only get worse if folks like you don 't step up to the plate! I'm coming to you today with a gracious plea from the bottom of my heart; - I've put everything I've got into winning this race and continuing to log big conservative victories. But I know I simply cannot do this alone, fellow Conservative; it 's going to take all of us, and I really mean all of us , to win. If you are going through a hard time and can't afford to donate even just $19, I completely understand. You read that right - I am only asking that you send in $19 or more to help me catch up with my Democrat opponent 's RIDICULOUS , Soros-backed fundraising! Listen, my race is TIED. The ONLY thing holding me and my team back from winning right now is my liberal opponent's CRAZY cash advantage. I know we can close the gap and win this critical race together, but we have to get to work RIGHT NOW! Thank you so much for being a crucial part of my team, fellow Conservative. I really can't communicate just how much I appreciate your support. -Winsome Earle-Sears Mother Marine Lt. Governor of Virginia | I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, Republican candidate running for Governor of Virginia. I broke records as the first black female Lieutenant Governor in Virginia, but my mission isn't over yet! clean_body: Its deeply insulting that he thinks the millions of Texans who support building the wall are “naive. | I announced my campaign for Senate this week, and I wanted to take a minute to tell you why it's so important to replace John Cornyn. He's been in D.C. for over two decades and what has he accomplished for the America First movement? Absolutely nothing. Cornyn's biggest “achievement” is partnering with CORRUPT Joe Biden to pass the most radical gun control bill in decades. He's fought against all of our conservative priorities and is so out of touch that he called President Trump’s border wall “naive.” Its deeply insulting that he thinks the millions of Texans who support building the wall are “naive.” Cornyn's clearly become far too comfortable in DC, but that’s what makes him a favorite of the lobbyists and insiders. And they’re willing to cut him HUGE checks to keep him in office. Every dollar will count in this battle, so your support means the world. Thank you for joining me in the fight to replace John Cornyn, Ken Paxton | | Paid for by Ken Paxton For Senate

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Don’t Let Lies Win—Sign Wave on April 26th!
body:
Join our Day of Action, get your free guide & resources!
| | | |
---
| | [ ](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794aa92f537/1edb9794aa8a3225)
---
|
---
| Patriot-

---
| **** It's not enough to simply cast a ballot and disengage from civics until the next election. Rather, we need to fight every day in our communities to let the people in our communities know that America still supports Donald Trump's America First agenda. The best way to do that is to **organize a sign-waving event on Saturday, April 26th, as a part of our **[**Make America First: A Day of Action**](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794aa92f537/1edb9794aa8a3227)** events.** Why do we need to sign wave now? Because the left is working overtime to spread lies and manufacture outrage, going so far as to recently claim we are in a "constitutional crisis." They want members of Congress and voters to believe that America First is not just unpopular, but unconstitutional, and therefore abandon the agenda that overwhelmingly won last year. **When you host a **[**sign-waving event ,**](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794aa92f537/1edb9794aa8a3229)** you will send a powerful message to voters in your community and your elected officials that the majority continues to support President Trump and America First.** I know you do not want to let their lies take root, and the way to do that is to publicly support the America First agenda. Also, if you can't hold your event on Saturday, April 26th, feel free to hold it on whatever day works for you! name: Randy Villegas
subject: my announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89161?t=6&akid=19573%2E878179%2Er9QVMU) Hi, this is Randy Villegas.

I’m a son of the Central Valley, a college professor, and the proud child of Mexican immigrants who came to this country with nothing but hope and grit.

**Today, I’m proud to announce that I’m running for Congress in California’s 22nd District -- one of the most competitive races in the country, and one that could make or break the Democratic majority in the House.**

[**If that’s all you need to hear, I’m humbly asking you to chip in $10 between my campaign and Voter Protection Project. Every contribution -- no matter the size -- will help power a grassroots campaign fueled by working people, not corporate PACs.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89161?t=7&akid=19573%2E878179%2Er9QVMU) | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89161?t=8&akid=19573%2E878179%2Er9QVMU)
---
For far too long, our Central Valley home has been left behind by politicians more in love with power than people -- and billionaires who put profits ahead of our communities.

Like most here, I was born into a working-class family.

I went to public schools in the Valley -- Everything I am and everything I have is because of this incredible place I get to call home.

But while our Valley feeds the world, our workers are struggling to feed their families. Wages stay the same while costs keep rising.

Meanwhile, Donald Trump has given the world’s richest man free rein to gut Social Security and Medicaid. They want to strip millions of their health care and take food out of hungry kids’ mouths -- all to pass more tax cuts for billionaires.

**It’s sick, folks, and our representative, David Valadao, should be fighting back. Instead, he’s been silent -- because the same billionaires hurting us are funding his campaign.**

Working people deserve a champion in Congress.

We need a government that works for us -- _not against us._

Our families, our farmers, our veterans, and our kids deserve better.

That’s why I’m running, and I’m not taking a dime of corporate PAC money -- because I want to be part of the solution, not another part of the problem.

[**If you're with me, please chip in $10 right now between my campaign and Voter Protection Project. Help us flip CA-22, retake the majority, and put working people front and center in Washington.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89161?t=9&akid=19573%2E878179%2Er9QVMU)
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Randy Villegas and VPP will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89162?t=10&akid=19573%2E878179%2Er9QVMU)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89163?t=11&akid=19573%2E878179%2Er9QVMU)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89164?t=12&akid=19573%2E878179%2Er9QVMU)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89165?t=13&akid=19573%2E878179%2Er9QVMU)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89161?t=14&akid=19573%2E878179%2Er9QVMU)
Thank you for believing in me -- and in this movement.

More soon,
-Randy
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=19573%2E878179%2Er9QVMU). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=19573%2E878179%2Er9QVMU).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=19573%2E878179%2Er9QVMU) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=15&akid=19573%2E878179%2Er9QVMU). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=19573%2E878179%2Er9QVMU)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=19573%2E878179%2Er9QVMU)

_This guest column originally[ appeared](https://substack.com/redirect/776f3554-7219-41f8-b06d-dec3fe927fd8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) at the Substack of journalist Jonathan Larsen, a veteran of ABC, CNN, and MSNBC, who served as executive producer of Up with Chris Hayes. You can check out and subscribe to Jonathan's Substack [here](https://substack.com/redirect/f0562ff4-0b7f-4be8-84c2-73207906dee0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_
* * *
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/22eddae3-0779-4d24-aa70-7156c6d45447?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
###### Accused Venezuelan gang members sent from the U.S. were transported within the Terrorism Confinement Center in Tecoluca, El Salvador, on March 16, 2025. (Uncredited / El Salvador presidential office [photo](https://substack.com/redirect/c5f69285-58d8-40bc-a2d2-863cf06221bf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).)
On March 15, 2025, the U.S. government shipped 261 people to El Salvador. More have followed.
Pres. Donald Trump is paying the country $6 million annually to imprison people he's ordered forcibly removed from the U.S.
At the time, 137 of those people were [sent](https://substack.com/redirect/8211a90b-6639-48a1-aac4-f3d8fa64f738?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to El Salvador under the provisions of the Alien Enemies Act. Trump is claiming they are Venezuelan gang members deployed to the U.S. to engage in hostile actions against American targets. Many, the Trump administration conceded, had no criminal record in the U.S.
Everyone understands that Trump is lying. But it's worth looking at how we know both that his claims are false and that he knows he's lying.
For one thing, Trump's own intelligence community leaders [know](https://substack.com/redirect/740647ba-85af-4679-971a-ce7557e8c8a3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) there's no truth to it. Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard was asked directly under oath and wouldn't substantiate Trump's claims. CIA Director John Ratcliffe testified they had no assessment to back Trump's claims.
The New York Times [reported](https://substack.com/redirect/1a8fe57b-b71b-4e21-b046-e46f6801b470?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) less than a week after Trump's March 15 invocation of Alien Enemies Act powers that his own intelligence agencies had concluded in February that his premise for it was false. The Washington Post [confirmed](https://substack.com/redirect/740647ba-85af-4679-971a-ce7557e8c8a3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and deepened this reporting this week.
As I [reported](https://substack.com/redirect/4f06d44b-ec91-4164-8531-54f520ee1f7f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) last week, Trump has been getting unofficial intel from a team that includes a former CIA agent who ran for Senate as a Tea Party candidate on a platform of hardline opposition to immigration. The Miami Herald first reported that the "team" consists of former U.S. and Venezuelan officials.
The former CIA agent, Gary Berntsen, is the only team member named by the Herald. He gave a followup [interview](https://substack.com/redirect/4ab13ded-9b11-4358-b22a-6d625b3ea42e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) about a week later to former Bush administration official Bart Marcois. Here's what Berntsen said:
> > "Remember, sabotage includes arson ... Many of these wildfires, industrial fires, the Los Angeles fires, taking advantage of wind and the local conditions, were started by arsonists. How many of them were paid or coerced by TdA or their surrogates?"
(The worst of the Los Angeles fires was [allegedly](https://substack.com/redirect/81b04a61-573b-493d-9c78-b5e663ef78df?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) started by Southern California Edison, a for-profit concern that deemed safety measures for discarded lines too costly.)
Marcois says Berntsen showed him "proof of the close relationships among Tren de Aragua, the Venezuelan military and intelligence apparatus, Cuban intelligence, and the worst of the Latin American narcoterrorists." This proof has yet to be made public.
The administration's best evidence for its wild claims about Kilmar Abrego Garcia -- the sheet-metal worker accused by the White House of being a terrorist drug lord and more -- is previous law-enforcement records which fall well short of criminal convictions. He wore a Chicago Bulls hat, police noted as evidence of his criminal affiliations.
**Blue Amp 's a simple idea: Insiders turned fearless outsiders **_**telling you what others won 't**_**. We 're un-bought; We Need Your Support.**_**Please become a paid subscriber**_
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.NzUeYUOnKJastuXp27G-HnBg1BrAhCkz9MqXNtXbugk?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=161690983)
Gabbard refuses to release additional, ostensible evidence against Abrego Garcia or others. But Trump's own actions -- or lack thereof -- should speak louder than his defamatory White House spokespeople.
The "team" feeding Trump info [told](https://substack.com/redirect/1b53ff7a-9559-4e5e-a7c4-6575b701ff5c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the Miami Herald that the administration has arrested at least 800 Venezuelans based on information the team provided. Three-hundred of them, according to the former CIA officer, had participated in Venezuelan para-military training courses.
They learned how to use weapons, commit sabotage, and even crypto-currencies.
The team gave a presentation to unnamed administration officials, briefing them on how these gang members act as hit squads for the Cartel de los Soles, the drug traffickers said to run the gang.
So why on Earth would Trump ship these captured agents and operatives off to El Salvador? That's _not_ what intelligence or law-enforcement agencies do when they _actually_ have valuable sources in custody!
The administration claims it captured scores of men -- hardened criminals, some with para-military training -- with deep knowledge of an international drug cartel and a covert plan by the regime of Venezuelan President Nicolas Maduro, and Trump almost instantly just... _sent them away._
If the accusations on which Trump is basing his claim for Alien Enemies Act powers were remotely near the truth, the _last_ thing his administration would want would be to let these footsoldiers out of their grasp, _especially_ right away.
If Trump and his top intel leaders really thought these hundreds of mercenary hostiles -- allegedly 5,000 in total -- were _really_ here to wage a covert war against at least 20 locations in the United States, as the unofficial team alleges, the _very first_ thing that law enforcement would try to do would be to determine _where imminent attacks were coming_.
We would have seen the entire national security and law-enforcement apparatus rapidly stand up a multi-agency task force to process these captives. Investigators, researchers, interrogators, lawyers, prosecutors, analysts.
In theory, capturing 800 covert, violent, foreign operatives would be a _phenomenal_ intelligence victory. The FBI -- or if we're going the Bush route, the CIA -- would rapidly begin assessing these sources for their potential intel value, triaging them to determine who to talk to first, and then beginning the complicated process of identifying who's willing to talk and which ones will give up what info. They had, after all, a helluva stick to threaten these people with: Disappearance into an El Salvadoran black hole of human-rights violations.
**Blue Amp 's a simple idea: Insiders turned fearless outsiders **_**telling you what others won 't**_**. We 're un-bought; We Need Your Support.**_**Please become a paid subscriber**_
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.NzUeYUOnKJastuXp27G-HnBg1BrAhCkz9MqXNtXbugk?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=161690983)
If Trump were being remotely honest, it would actually be an intelligence failure of staggering, 9/11 proportions if he had _800_ of these people in hand -- that's 16% of the alleged total enemy force! -- and then just... _gave them up._ Without even _trying_ to determine where the next attack was coming.
Where are the sleeper cells? Who else is joining sheet-metal unions and starting families to conceal their true aims? Which town will follow Aurora, CO, into the gang's clutches?[1](https://substack.com/redirect/1629f221-12f6-4cd1-902a-49ebf8320716?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
And the next "attack" on the U.S. wouldn't be the only item on the law-enforcement or intel agenda.
These gang members included supposed hit men for an international drug cartel. Did the Drug Enforcement Administration get a crack at any of them? A chance for their own investigators to wheedle even a crumb of intel out of these hundreds and hundreds of hardcore cartel players and hit men?
What about the Maduro regime itself? Surely the CIA and NSA would've wanted to know what these _hundreds_ of Maduro operatives knew. Who's running things back in Caracas? How were orders transmitted? Is there a paper trail? Where's the funding funneled from?
And then there would've been parallel efforts to make this motherlode of intel pay off. Justice Department prosecutors surely would've wanted to build cases not just against those in custody, but against those _not_ in custody.
Wouldn't prosecutors and investigators have wanted a chance to develop relationships with these possible sources? Maybe offer them a chance to stay here _legally_ if they'd flip on their _unknown_ compatriots here in the states, the money guys, the front companies, and the "legit" businesses laundering the cash from the drugs and for the invasion?
Finally, there would've been the public-relations campaign. Why wouldn't the Trump administration want a face -- hell, a dozen faces -- willing to go on Fox or Newsmax and tell their gripping inside story as a reluctant warrior for the Maduro war on America?
They didn't want to keep _one_ of these hundreds of people around long enough to shoot for the _insane_ propaganda victory that would've represented? Imagine what _that_ would have done to the current political battle over Abrego Garcia, deportations, and immigration itself.
We're supposed to believe Trump willingly passed on 800 chances to tell Democrats to suck it and mark them for a generation as unwitting dupes for a foreign dictator hellbent on covert attacks against Mom, baseball, and apple pie?
Literally, all they needed was one cooperating witness. But the Trump administration's failure to stage even a Potemkin village of investigative efforts suggests we're just supposed to assume that not a single one of these hardened criminals is willing to give up Maduro and take a life of material comfort in the U.S. over a life sentence in a prison hellhole.
Not one that we know of has flipped on the others. Because no one asked them to. Because everyone knows it's a lie.
Luckily, some Democrats, like Sen. Chris Van Hollen (D-MD), are rejecting the craven centrist advice to ignore this arguably treasonous, definitely impeachable, inhumane power grab.
(Even some conservatives have begun to [wonder](https://substack.com/redirect/16454cac-9c74-4a81-9808-131fd98239d8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) whether maybe it's wrong not to undo _accidentally_ sending a man to prison. Christian radio host Eric Erickson hilariously warned that this obscene violation of due process is bad because it "will be used eventually by the Democrats in a way we can't foresee.")
Trump's prosecution of his fictional war in pursuit of presidential power should be risible on its face. Instead of learning the lessons of Iraq, however, we're still so traumatized by 9/11 that the instinctive American response to years of right-wing fear-mongering about immigrants has been to embrace the fear that Osama bin Laden bequeathed to us.
But polling suggests Trump's horrors are opening eyes. Most Americans [oppose](https://substack.com/redirect/fc925acb-d13f-4cf8-8e6a-d44be9f874bf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) depriving these detainees of due process. And it's good to see Van Hollen and others reject fear and dare to treat even imprisoned accused "enemies" as human beings.
* * *
[1](https://substack.com/redirect/cee871a2-c687-402d-9c6d-35ea9dc107ce?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) I am, of course, being facetious as Aurora, CO, police only know of a dozen Tren de Aragua members there.

body:
Will you please read it, team?

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106144311/540566895/-1080040549?refcode=email-header&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTYxOGE0Ny01OTFkLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9d6swa57vseJR8OMaoVjOIllZT5x8mGWDZuv2B5hijo=) Team — I’ve been traveling around our district to hear directly from Oregon families what they want from their representatives right now. And the message has been loud and clear: _**Fight back harder.**_ And that’s exactly what I plan to do, team. We need to show toughness when it comes to preventing right-wing billionaires like Elon Musk from stealing your health care — so that they can give themselves a giant tax break. We need to show toughness when it comes to making sure people get their Social Security checks on time — not months from now at a government office that takes two hours to get to. And we need to show toughness when it comes to preventing Donald Trump from trampling the rule of law — because he is the president, not the king, no matter how much he wants to pretend otherwise. **So here’s my commitment to you:** I can’t promise that we will win every fight. But I promise that I will always, always have your back. I will fight to put YOUR family, YOUR democracy, and YOUR access to health care before right-wing billionaires. **And I will use the full extent of my power as your representative to stop Donald Trump and Elon Musk from harming our community.** **[So listen, if that’s the kind of representation you would like to see in Washington, I am asking for your support today, because I can’t win these battles on my own. Please pitch in a few dollars today — even just $5 would go such a long way — to help me keep fighting back against Trump and Musk’s attacks on hardworking families.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106144312/540566896/1744899336?amount=5&refcode=email_041925_longrs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTYxOGE0Ny01OTFkLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9d6swa57vseJR8OMaoVjOIllZT5x8mGWDZuv2B5hijo=)** | | [DONATE →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106144314/540566897/1012014768?amount=5&refcode=email_041925_longrs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTYxOGE0Ny01OTFkLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9d6swa57vseJR8OMaoVjOIllZT5x8mGWDZuv2B5hijo=)

name: Chip Roy
subject: I’m not going to lie to you, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chip Roy for Congress
body:
| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/IPO80ygIceo2-zh74sLI6Pdv7EJwM4kDXWqT5o3LMliP9U4_XrLIDl2_5V98TIcTZgRV-z5mazWIxMq0ly2INruvpzrEeuNOAaLG5UF39bZULVboZm7ZSyHW3mPjcRlkwM0tl7SF_gqbsZkJErGe2JtmiV9nItwtfnFNZUKt0iUIrk1acpAmJKjaaTHBpErzcNLBSz5PpBAJnfGfbsyMyMBO0bGFzZ0Y_zW4VrPZbDomOW4ynJ84Tbz8Ob7gPoDB7Rp8yFofJwt5KzSanfFuDiu7IwEYuc5UsNyZcVfm7Ymy7OuRgD4EG8vRzL8lnXiZgU0HUjGVq8PJ4M99uyCelYtg9EptSmeSyuuwUtCObKAL1ijSVTEBQXWtfhfCHZEwyoU1dPSMmLIARHP8pX10wqBPH7_jidBckD1ENIMZUIzTOX2aNU9J2DeSCV9OkWj9CKCJ05tDbxl8rsNTrOJYC9W7jcPZ7m0h00KAigdzrE3AuN1HYu7i75E/DTHKcXzm3sRNH7vBXcsA3BBvjOZjkhD6/8)
---
** ****I’m pissed, Peter.** ** ** You’re bombarded every single day — texts, emails, pop-ups — all begging you to take a survey, sign a petition, or chip in a few bucks to “stop the Democrats.” ** ** And what actually happens, Peter? **NOTHING.**** ** The same RINO cowards fold like cheap suits. The spending gets worse. The lies keep piling up. And you — the one actually footing the bill — are left betrayed and ignored.** ** They take your hard-earned dollars and then turn around and vote for the same damn policies that wrecked your savings, crushed your community, and left you wondering if _anyone_ in D.C. actually gives a damn about you. ** **_**You want the truth?**_** ** When they scam you out of a donation, they pat themselves on the back, head to some fancy cocktail party, and LAUGH at you behind closed doors. **They don’t respect you. They don’t fear you. And they sure as hell don’t represent you.** I’ve had it. With the lies. The games. The sellouts. I know what you're probably thinking right now: _"Who the hell is this guy?"_ My name is Chip Roy.** ** You may have seen me getting trashed by some spineless RINO on Fox News for not “playing for the team.”** ** Well guess what, Peter? ** ****Damn right I’m not a team player.**** ** Because I don’t work for _them_.** ** **[I work for YOU](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/fBctFdWL89898EHFDwcLxBbiDv47TEW-E4S81PH86Eji1_XY4OPJqxLwfEWFB3IponboZVZ_b4Xw0MRrMmvNmOKdgYp675AU4Yzx5T2kARZ8Gj6dK8V6POR-vmFF_060NXgNfXMVz_wBjgeuTYqWGHinxb-mwQKQfFisNhfG-JIg1ZSrThZS-4xKtoW6D_A6CaaZNmi1OJIDycIad8U2pcBHInfdfgTmFN3-1Tj9gGtzSU8nHNJZfbP8COXy5s_ihOgmTzErUBTZHE1P1Aa2DMgu-6BcoYc7CzRuzV6oipK7y_yfK26BMuYH-EJtxG9fKv8n6uuXW7jRTuHI1PngJ7MlfrEyKJx1UviNfl4G50LyjVNKThX0UTMdLQ847yeGtW5tSqUYjAHyquIFNntOup8Hdxs2at69cC6TmxGNKQrHFVyQxuXShAOTjLhvsOZys0niS16jRncdEetH0luJAYw1lCMV_n-u04ARjfq4OGd0WYC1P2cqP5s/EXAVNAQWX0P9wPAOccuCJs9zbzTjg-A0/8).** ** ** I see your posts. I hear your calls. I _feel_ the same betrayal that lights a fire in your gut every time you turn on the news and watch our country circling the drain. ** ** President Trump gave us real hope for real change. But these DC swamp rats — **Republicans and Democrats alike** — are trying to feed him the same old garbage from the last 30 years.** ** So here’s what I’m doing, Peter: **I’m fighting like hell to blow up this broken status quo.** I’m helping elect people who will **stand with Trump** and finally put **YOU first**. It’s not easy. I’ve got the entire **Uniparty** gunning for me. But I’m not backing down — not now, not ever.** ** Now let me be straight with you — no gimmicks, no BS. ** ** I won’t lie and say there’s a 2500% match. I won’t trick you into taking a fake survey just to ask you for money. And I’m not going to pretend I’m Trump or Elon or JD Vance. I’m just a man — a father, a patriot — asking you directly: **[Can you chip in $25, or whatever you can afford, to help me fight back](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/4smE3lZiJJPPcdnkDZ6vZuM2gKznVuvGMz5fF7Q47B_D6-kufbG2BjjsUdiBtk5pMge8ssCMDRxxgCFXoNOKnqdtmaSMuyO_5KTpeOh1Qf6ne_2i1THRfxnBNtinjWKOoo26Ot1xClTre3l8BAzJyQttWMu0QonefU47s36KqqLoDBlFXYn7CpTVzCiSe1RUTG8AqMy0IX7Rb7QadLrn-CZky1aA-Jx1-UsBHB1fkwuXyMVigQH5l6OfJjSfOXv-U2gFJ9Kye1BdzbwR37gbYLWu7qX8R7E1qUVCcwshnREy-wE7-IgL2T-L3qCG09lz3fdJ0YvCOZ6pu8us7FhpJqXjE52B-BViXos2EXCACZEoVi-w3cbM_npSn8WrdN7fPt_fWyaJpHSvv4vax92PTChc3REdspB7hqaxhiWRNGsdOlJvdMw0cibNt1yXkHh8pbAwzjPGNYcR7Y29mkn8Wq8v9XVWFgALnROG65z6yegF78ZumrWtWYY/yc-XFsr9KknDTDGpX6CFuEDkXCaIp8i_/8)?** That’s it. You have my word, Peter:
✔ I will never stop fighting for you.
✔ I will never stop listening to you.
✔ And I will NEVER sell you out — not for a vote, not for a check, not for anything. This is my promise to you. As a man. As a father. As someone who actually gives a damn. **[I would be honored to earn your support today](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/uSCBUddvhP6Vfq8ZUNWsi4XOBiDcJojk1sATJXBhiXh2qpRLmBOrRWAHQUcDJc7GAZM-7GXU-k1zqOjHrgs3Ah6KPf9qwyhAXaabpa76ISrMarNDUFHggDueik88fMjMyTvueUFi-5e16pOMb3qASz0ZIrAkcJgbJZtx7KeFWPtUmH-M0MnR9C2P-DMZBX43_7cXfLF6tBSrfJ0OslAilSEkznKC4qzzKNVqH4uHE6z0qtWAMFk810VODQ2_pJvXGv50WD71-ey1iBCz3JTZn-FjktaXSRHOxNjJk3u5NpUSoqH3Jaao4jCFvzwLxXvunP1uMTISdYs4jeuBjYfjDntd1pq2G_34HYxUwMw6O-AFT93i3Uxce-4Y8wWH_oQA1UBfx1oL4MTDcjWVb22mfa0W3vznSF0943gUr0n79iZsm28DjuIQ1DeudviN6Zd_Yf0-14q0C1sZY9H_z1r5C3fgTpc7rjjpcrb2tGQZPWImvEVyklOYaMU/mqDbSMp-isLvb4ozGW6ZJE2oTIo1n5Yf/8). ** **Together, we can rip the mask off this corrupt system and start winning again — for YOU!** Thank you and God Bless,

clean_body: | | | I’m pissed, Peter. You’re bombarded every single day — texts, emails, pop-ups — all begging you to take a survey, sign a petition, or chip in a few bucks to “stop the Democrats.” And what actually happens, Peter? NOTHING. The same RINO cowards fold like cheap suits. The spending gets worse. The lies keep piling up. And you — the one actually footing the bill — are left betrayed and ignored. They take your hard-earned dollars and then turn around and vote for the same damn policies that wrecked your savings, crushed your community, and left you wondering if anyone in D.C. actually gives a damn about you. You want the truth? When they scam you out of a donation, they pat themselves on the back, head to some fancy cocktail party, and LAUGH at you behind closed doors. They don’t respect you. They don’t fear you. And they sure as hell don’t represent you. I’ve had it. With the lies. The games. The sellouts. I know what you're probably thinking right now: "Who the hell is this guy?" My name is Chip Roy. You may have seen me getting trashed by some spineless RINO on Fox News for not “playing for the team.” Well guess what, Peter? Damn right I’m not a team player. Because I don’t work for them. . I see your posts. I hear your calls. I feel the same betrayal that lights a fire in your gut every time you turn on the news and watch our country circling the drain. President Trump gave us real hope for real change. But these DC swamp rats — Republicans and Democrats alike — are trying to feed him the same old garbage from the last 30 years. So here’s what I’m doing, Peter: I’m fighting like hell to blow up this broken status quo. I’m helping elect people who will stand with Trump and finally put YOU first. It’s not easy. I’ve got the entire Uniparty gunning for me. But I’m not backing down — not now, not ever. Now let me be straight with you — no gimmicks, no BS. I won’t lie and say there’s a 2500% match. I won’t trick you into taking a fake survey just to ask you for money. And I’m not going to pretend I’m Trump or Elon or JD Vance. I’m just a man — a father, a patriot — asking you directly: ? That’s it. You have my word, Peter: ✔ I will never stop fighting for you. ✔ I will never stop listening to you. ✔ And I will NEVER sell you out — not for a vote, not for a check, not for anything. This is my promise to you. As a man. As a father. As someone who actually gives a damn. . Together, we can rip the mask off this corrupt system and start winning again — for YOU! Thank you and God Bless, Chip Roy P.S. If you can’t give today, that’s okay. I’m not going to threaten your “membership” or call you names. That’s not who I am. | | Peter, it’s Austin Davis. Between cuts to education, threats to healthcare, and Trump sowing chaos with his on-again, off-again tariffs, we can’t expect help to come from Washington. But here in Pennsylvania, we are making the change we need to see and standing up for what’s right. I’m standing up for public education. I rallied in support of protections to the Affordable Care Act, and I’m proud to celebrate that win with our State House. Gov. Shapiro and I worked to secure state-wide investments that will revitalize our local economy and create jobs. If we’re going to counter the destruction coming from the federal level, we need to treat our state and local races like the frontline of democracy – _**because Peter, this is where the change will happen. **_ I’ll be on the frontlines protecting Pennsylvania from MAGA extremism in 2025 and beyond, but Pennsylvania is one of the tightest battleground states in the country, and the GOP is going to spend big money to win here next cycle. [**I’m fighting back but I need your support, especially ahead of tonight’s mid-month fundraising deadline. clean_body: Austin Davis is helping continue the progress we've made for Pennsylvanians by ensuring we keep Pennsylvania blue up and down the ballot. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Peter, it’s Austin Davis. Between cuts to education, threats to healthcare, and Trump sowing chaos with his on-again, off-again tariffs, we can’t expect help to come from Washington. But here in Pennsylvania, we are making the change we need to see and standing up for what’s right. I’m standing up for public education. I rallied in support of protections to the Affordable Care Act, and I’m proud to celebrate that win with our State House. Gov. Shapiro and I worked to secure state-wide investments that will revitalize our local economy and create jobs. If we’re going to counter the destruction coming from the federal level, we need to treat our state and local races like the frontline of democracy – because Peter, this is where the change will happen. I’ll be on the frontlines protecting Pennsylvania from MAGA extremism in 2025 and beyond, but Pennsylvania is one of the tightest battleground states in the country, and the GOP is going to spend big money to win here next cycle. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Austin Davis * | | | ---|---|--- | get involved to support austin davis for PA Lieutenant Governor While serving as Lieutenant Governor, Austin Davis helped advance some of the most progressive changes the Commonwealth has seen in decades.
