name: Yadira Caraveo
subject: Hard work
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Caraveo for Congress
body:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106144406/540567281/1561815853?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOGY4N2MxYy01YjFkLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h2-WTEAdtcuZi1G8AOuIWwmZRB--ItlreQoDfRJwn0Y=&emci=1d9152cd-ab1b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=e8f87c1c-5b1d-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=12666102) Peter, I know the power of hard work.

My parents came to Colorado to achieve the American Dream. They instilled determination and perseverance in me at a young age and worked hard to give my siblings and me the opportunity to go to college. I wasn’t going to take their sacrifice for granted, so I poured all of my time and energy into pursuing my dreams to make their hard work worth it.

Then, I continued that effort in Adams County as a pediatrician, where I saw countless families struggling to afford healthcare and make ends meet. I saw that the same American Dream my parents had access to was no longer attainable for too many Americans.

So, I decided to do something about it.

In the state legislature, I worked tirelessly to battle large drug companies, forcing them to lower the cost of prescriptions. I also helped pass a first-in-the-nation cap on the price of insulin. Then in Congress, I continued the fight to make prescription drugs more affordable and protect the fundamental rights of hardworking Coloradans.

But now, I see Gabe Evans representing us in Congress and putting his full support behind the extreme MAGA agenda. He’s driving up costs for working families and giving handouts to billionaires, and I won’t stand for it.

**[Trust me – I know the power of hard work, and I am dedicated to doing everything I can to build a better future for all Coloradans – and that’s why I’m running for Congress. But I need your help to win back this seat, Peter. Will you donate now to help me take back the House and continue pouring my heart and hard work into helping Coloradan families?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106144407/540567282/2033110592?refcode=email_041925_hard-work&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOGY4N2MxYy01YjFkLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h2-WTEAdtcuZi1G8AOuIWwmZRB--ItlreQoDfRJwn0Y=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106144408/540567283/2033110592?refcode=email_041925_hard-work&express_lane=true&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOGY4N2MxYy01YjFkLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h2-WTEAdtcuZi1G8AOuIWwmZRB--ItlreQoDfRJwn0Y=)

clean_body: Peter, I know the power of hard work. My parents came to Colorado to achieve the American Dream. They instilled determination and perseverance in me at a young age and worked hard to give my siblings and me the opportunity to go to college. I wasn’t going to take their sacrifice for granted, so I poured all of my time and energy into pursuing my dreams to make their hard work worth it. Then, I continued that effort in Adams County as a pediatrician, where I saw countless families struggling to afford healthcare and make ends meet. I saw that the same American Dream my parents had access to was no longer attainable for too many Americans. So, I decided to do something about it. In the state legislature, I worked tirelessly to battle large drug companies, forcing them to lower the cost of prescriptions. I also helped pass a first-in-the-nation cap on the price of insulin. Then in Congress, I continued the fight to make prescription drugs more affordable and protect the fundamental rights of hardworking Coloradans. But now, I see Gabe Evans representing us in Congress and putting his full support behind the extreme MAGA agenda. This week, I had the **TIME OF MY LIFE** by getting to have dinner w/**President Trump** and other Pastors at the **White House** to celebrate **Easter**. **Things have changed in America from Easter 2024 to Easter 2025!** I have put together a _play-by-play_ of that night and I share some cool stories of where **POTUS** took us in the **White House** and some things I learned last night that I did not previously know. Watch it here: [https://youtu.be/zglfjLEDjGA ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=20884972.11370.1.94baffc6e59b885023e9f776ee52b3a9) ALSO, let me take a moment to encourage you to **attend church this Sunday**. Nearly 2000 years ago on the first Resurrection Sunday the Tomb was **EMPTY** so that now the churches can be **FULL** this Sunday! You are invited to join the [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=20884972.11371.1.4b4592666766b022b4960ddde9cdc7f7) Family tomorrow for **Resurrection Sunday** if you do not have a home church! **Tulsa** | 10am CT **OKC** | 6pm CT **Watch online** : [https://www.youtube.com/@sheridanchurch](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=20884972.11372.1.b45087d9908d7cae518c0df9ee62e661) Let me take a moment to encourage you to **attend church this Sunday**. Nearly 2000 years ago on the first Resurrection Sunday the Tomb was **EMPTY** so that now the churches can be **FULL** this Sunday! Happy Easter! Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer

name: Team Jayapal
subject: House Republicans just voted to gut Medicaid
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
The GOP just passed a budget that slashes essential programs to fund tax cuts for the rich. We have to fight back.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250419-4965-footer&t=1&akid=4965%2E420207%2Erb3woY)
Peter,
Last week House Republicans passed a dangerous new budget framework – one that opens the door for Donald Trump’s extreme agenda to become law.
Their plan? **Slash Medicaid and other essential programs that working families rely on, just to make room for even more tax cuts for billionaires.**
**This is a budget for the ultra-wealthy – not for the people.**
If we don’t stop them, Trump and his MAGA allies will ram through huge tax giveaways and anti-immigrant policies, gut healthcare access, and deepen the inequality that’s already hurting so many communities.
Pramila is leading the charge to fight back. She’s fighting for a bold, progressive vision of the future – one where the government works for _all_ of us, not just the wealthy and well-connected.
[**But we can’t do it without you, Peter. Will you chip in $3 or whatever you can to help us build power, defend essential programs, and stop Trump’s far-right agenda in its tracks?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250419-1?refcode=em20250419-4965&amount=3&refcode2=4965_420207_rb3woY&akid=4965%2E420207%2Erb3woY)

name: Patriot Polls
subject: Do you still stand with President Trump?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
Can we have a minute of your time?

| | | Peter,

President Trump's powerful joint address to Congress left the Democrats **REELING.** Their behavior was a stark reminder that they are entirely out of touch with the American people.

As President Trump honored American heroes, the Democrats sat in stunned silence, refusing to applaud for the very people they claim to represent. Steelworkers, farmers, grieving mothers, and a young boy battling brain cancer - all ignored by the Democrats.

This shameful display exposed the Democrats' true priorities: **politics over people.**

The contrast between the two parties couldn't be clearer. President Trump and the Republicans lead with competence, sanity, and a pro-American agenda. Meanwhile, the Democrats are descending into chaos, driven by incompetence and irrationality.

Democrats simply cannot admit that President Trump's America First agenda is working, which is why we want YOUR opinion, Peter. [**Please take a minute to complete our Agenda 47 Survey and let us know if you still stand with President Trump:**](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)

subject: This is bigger than me.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by ElectGabeEvans
body:
| | | Peter, I’ve served our country overseas and stood for law and order back home. Now, I’m fighting every day in Congress to deliver results for the people of Colorado. I must have gotten someone’s attention in DC, because, recently I learned the DCCC has officially marked me as a _**Top Target.**_ **_They’re bringing in their biggest guns — AOC, Nancy Pelosi’s California donors, national media talking heads — all with one goal: END our movement._** This isn’t just about me – this assault is much bigger than that. They are trying to stamp out the momentum we’ve built in our **Blue State**. We’re seeing more and more people join us every day. **Their stories are all different, but one thing unites them: The Democrat party sold them a lie and then turned their backs on them. ** There’s also a reason that the Democrats are starting their attacks so early, they think that they can catch us off guard. **_Please, help me prove them wrong._** **[If we don’t fight back now, we risk losing ground we may never get back.](http://links.americabrigade.com/s/c/Jrut4C7YQqLsIdK31esdSpWrYJsd8CE8wrFN0igkifgH-6_vBcgfz3Becmb4sR5rOeZ1ccXUReouLTQ4ksyynuKeoY_O0bTEUpyi9XWmji00TS3ecianftm04OgXPyO_KGVGNZw2MAtmH95rJA5OgZMkIhnJ9poHwoJTOM-MvkYMwNQl_4DZr1c8vxfI83EuSL1LJ-oBX0eJIOEUN1bGuuWut49ovCXbS1zuNwi2xts0AX945iVieLuV6YIqiVnr-2kt8c_ZUpBRi9CwmiSJrkg7_45OlX_RO8VR1fbhFws8BptWxUMss35NtN3RU5J-Aqlc-iwdNwEUyeKWH3TYMKw7V8uDeGyjSXvF0gIAgXjTfbx_e3ZYGKzF0ca4rPyb-C6JKXs_CpPIgotfg6IdX2p7knbMUoJJTXLqVlLsAUxlIHdM1hNXt7LsHsChhidkaXOSYD4XbfIusDAXhM-uKPsLMpbN-4jtEOZ26H20q3I0VtBcIy0/se9RI7RDGqY6oOs_QnWvhZ3bWQZY5DkD/8)**

name: Team Wes Moore
subject: We’re not going to kick the can down the road
body:
This legislative session, Maryland faced two storms: The worst budget crisis since the Great Recession and the Trump administration threatening the livelihood of our state.
But Governor Wes Moore refused to kick the can down the road. He faced crisis with courage, got a budget passed that invests in the future of our state, and 94% of Marylanders will either get a tax cut or see no change in their income taxes.
If that’s all you need to hear, will you pitch in $10 today to continue our fight for Maryland to thrive? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250419-1?refcode=em20250419-1] If not, keep reading.
Contribute » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250419-1?refcode=em20250419-1]
First, we have the economy.
Years of unchecked spending and slow economic growth created the budget problem we faced and we’re turning that around. We turned a $3 billion deficit into a surplus.
We made cuts where we had to and made historic investments in education, childcare, and public safety.
94% of Marylanders received a tax cut or no change at all, ensuring that middle-class Marylanders get a break as prices rise for things like groceries and housing. We now have one of the lowest unemployment rates in the country.
Second, we have the federal government.
Trump is making a mess of Washington, and it’s hurting Maryland. His governance is performative, illegal, and ineffective.
Trump laid off countless public servants , hurting them and their families.
They’re threatening anyone who stands up against injustice. The state of our current federal government is cruel. It is unusual. It is unconstitutional.
Look, there’s no one-size-fits-all solution to our problems. We need to find our power, whether that be through protest or policy.
Wes Moore is doing everything in his power to fight back against the hardships facing our state. Will you help fuel our fight by pitching in $5, $10, or whatever you can today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250419-1?refcode=em20250419-1]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Donate $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250419-1?refcode=em20250419-1-el&express_lane=true&amount=10]
Donate $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250419-1?refcode=em20250419-1-el&express_lane=true&amount=25]
Donate $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250419-1?refcode=em20250419-1-el&express_lane=true&amount=50]
Donate $75 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250419-1?refcode=em20250419-1-el&express_lane=true&amount=75]
Donate $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250419-1?refcode=em20250419-1-el&express_lane=true&amount=100]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250419-1?refcode=em20250419-1-el-other]
Onwards,
Team Wes Moore

body:
I want you to hear the big news directly from me.
| **__A Personal Note from Rep. Elise Stefanik on her New Leadership Position__**
---
Peter,
---
I just received the honor of being appointed to the position of Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership for the 119th Congress!
---
**This position has been used by prior Republican House leadership teams to deliver for the American people in critical moments for our country, such as the 1994 Contract with America and the 2010 Tea Party wave election.**
---
_I look forward to picking up the baton to help guide our House GOP Majority through another such moment as we execute on the mandate from the American people to pass the President’s America First agenda._
---
We’re truly on the brink of ushering in a new “Golden Age” for our country!
---
But at such a critical moment, with the very fate of America on the line, advancing the President’s agenda won’t be my only responsibility...
---
**_...he’s also entrusted me with using this new position in House Republican Leadership to protect our razor-thin majority._**
---
We simply cannot let the Democrats FLIP the House and rob us of this historic opportunity to Make America Great Again!
---
_With the Left preparing to spend BILLIONS against us in the midterms, I have no choice but to do everything in my power to close the gap on their record-breaking war chest as quickly as possible._
---
**That is why, in my capacity as the _NEW_ Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership, I immediately authorized a 500% MATCH on all gifts for the next hour to help us kick off my first 24 hours in this new role with our biggest fundraising surge of the year! **
---
_If (and only if) you’re in the position to do so, I ask that you give any amount you can afford to take advantage of this match._

clean_body: I want you to hear the big news directly from me. | A Personal Note from Rep. Elise Stefanik on her New Leadership Position Peter, I just received the honor of being appointed to the position of Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership for the 119th Congress! This position has been used by prior Republican House leadership teams to deliver for the American people in critical moments for our country, such as the 1994 Contract with America and the 2010 Tea Party wave election. I look forward to picking up the baton to help guide our House GOP Majority through another such moment as we execute on the mandate from the American people to pass the President’s America First agenda. We’re truly on the brink of ushering in a new “Golden Age” for our country! But at such a critical moment, with the very fate of America on the line, advancing the President’s agenda won’t be my only responsibility... ...he’s also entrusted me with using this new position in House Republican Leadership to protect our razor-thin majority. We simply cannot let the Democrats FLIP the House and rob us of this historic opportunity to Make America Great Again! With the Left preparing to spend BILLIONS against us in the midterms, I have no choice but to do everything in my power to close the gap on their record-breaking war chest as quickly as possible. That is why, in my capacity as the NEW Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership, I immediately authorized a 500% MATCH on all gifts for the next hour to help us kick off my first 24 hours in this new role with our biggest fundraising surge of the year! If (and only if) you’re in the position to do so, I ask that you give any amount you can afford to take advantage of this match. Thank you and God Bless, Rep. Elise Stefanik Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC. www.elisestefanik.com PO Box 500 Glens Falls, NY 12801 |

name: Ami Bera for Congress
subject: Disobeying court orders
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bera for Congress
body:
| Hi Peter,

Last week, the Supreme Court unanimously ruled that the Trump administration must facilitate the return of Kilmar Abrego Garcia—a Maryland father wrongly deported to a prison in El Salvador due to what Trump officials initially admitted was an “administrative error.”

But instead of following the Supreme Court’s ruling, the administration is digging in. Officials are now insisting that Abrego Garcia was “the right person sent to the right place” — despite the Court’s clear finding that his deportation was unlawful. Even more disturbing, Attorney General Pam Bondi flatly declared that Abrego Garcia is “not coming back to our country,” openly defying the Court’s authority.

This isn’t just about one man. It’s part of a broader, deeply troubling pattern:**the Trump administration is ignoring court orders it doesn’t like, undermining the rule of law, and paving the way for more dangerous actions from this president.**

Democrats like Ami Bera are working tirelessly in Congress to push back against this disgraceful conduct. As a member of the DCCC leadership team, he’s on the front lines fighting to retake the House majority in 2026 and restore accountability to our government.

name: Tobias Read
subject: My commitment is ironclad
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250419em-ironclad [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250419em-ironclad]
As Oregon Secretary of State, I take my role in defending democracy and voting rights seriously.
That’s why I was disheartened to see President Donald Trump sign an executive order that undermines both of those things — hitting our veterans hardest:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250419em-ironclad [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250419em-ironclad]
My view on this issue is simple:
→ I believe it should be easier, not harder, to participate in our democracy.
→ I believe voting rights should be protected and expanded, not attacked and undermined.
→ And I believe our democracy is too important to be subject to dangerous political games.
Donald Trump clearly disagrees.
But luckily, President Trump isn’t the Secretary of State here in Oregon.
My commitment to our state and the people of Oregon is ironclad: I will do everything in my power to defend our democracy and safeguard voting rights, no matter what Donald Trump and his allies do.
Join me in that fight by chipping in $25, $50, or more right now, and let’s take a stand together in defense of American democracy before it’s too late. >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250419em-ironclad]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250419em-ironclad]
Thank you,
Tobias Read
Oregon Secretary of State
P.S. Don’t forget! The Oregon Political Tax Credit allows you to donate $50 (if you file single) or $100 (if you file joint) to a candidate, PAC, or party, which will be fully credited back as a rebate — so it’s free to donate! For more information, click here. [https://www.oregon.gov/omd/ONG/Documents/SMFS/Personal%20Financial%20Counselor/Political-Tax-Credit.pdf?]

name: Lily Tang Williams
subject: I never got to use a toilet seat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lily4Congress Committee
body:
| | | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=48c654b865a34fd98696045149b3f762&_e=cDTTCOICJjUEsfEAmtcVzbYY14hhdqKPMbgFWL0Z4J1BgScqpw1_fqJzb_gP07LhTqdnrMkoDKgdLm2JxB2AoVGHuPC4zWKqfj8f2zQ5zfbOFGpTlI_GuINf1mywlnKiUX3HFGNEwmGoCIKm4TyZMBGxYjpb74CIcopBf-1tGoZ8R1RJAVmQ1LrsM0jJCkTVsS83CibcSPVYg4NLe_enm5LqX4R7mcM9Lm2BXyW8Sv0ODC9Pnhx9LPBhUb9pL2wkP2H_izB27duWH-O8n-KkOuNTwIfMgPr83FDldRGcx5d8LCjPkIozOh3RQIOYDd1UUR95YvLwVyaeTlRwfqdCGnPEiddtNlHBd_ZgWyXVNMbqz8txIaEZgivO4Pkg2n1K3h4n31vd3o4oQT_N-TQc9A%3D%3D)
---
I never got to use a toilet seat. Instead, we had to share a hole in the ground with 8 other families. I was raised on food rationing coupons in the Sichuan province of China during Mao’s Cultural Revolution. I was only a child, yet I worshiped him like a God. I had no other choice. I was brainwashed. We all were. Eventually, I was able to escape from China and flee to the United States.
---
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=48c654b865a34fd98696045149b3f762&_e=cDTTCOICJjUEsfEAmtcVzbYY14hhdqKPMbgFWL0Z4J1BgScqpw1_fqJzb_gP07LhTqdnrMkoDKgdLm2JxB2AoVGHuPC4zWKqfj8f2zQ5zfbOFGpTlI_GuINf1mywlnKiUX3HFGNEwmGoCIKm4TyZMBGxYjpb74CIcopBf-1tGoZ8R1RJAVmQ1LrsM0jJCkTVsS83CibcSPVYg4NLe_enm5LqX4R7mcM9Lm2BXyW8Sv0ODC9Pnhx9LPBhUb9pL2wkjwxAGNpbYwB4P4SkavlqP7HJLWEPOu1US9tdU8fostTl7leFgK7yhJr6KPTHJI7zj9Ey-yy64ufj81nOpbGAXSL3WvYKiiqWSA9jTGBWMpwxiS8al9w6oUVI1HTjyMVP_Pw3ksGfkWAiqwq8SqlY2A%3D%3D)
---
I spent the next 20 years uninstalling everything Mao’s regime had programmed into my brain, only to discover the very same evil was now being promoted in America and celebrated by the radical left. Then it hit me. I wasn’t just a product of the American Dream - I was also a survivor of Communist rule. **[My name is Lily Tang Williams, and I’m the Republican running for Congress in New Hampshire's 2nd Congressional District.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=48c654b865a34fd98696045149b3f762&_e=cDTTCOICJjUEsfEAmtcVzbYY14hhdqKPMbgFWL0Z4J1BgScqpw1_fqJzb_gP07LhTqdnrMkoDKgdLm2JxB2AoVGHuPC4zWKqfj8f2zQ5zfbOFGpTlI_GuINf1mywlnKiUX3HFGNEwmGoCIKm4TyZMBGxYjpb74CIcopBf-1tGoZ8R1RJAVmQ1LrsM0jJCkTVsS83CibcSPVYg4NLe_enm5LqX4R7mcM9Lm2BXyW8Sv0ODC9Pnhx9LPBhUb9pL2wkNGqRhH09B5_sbbaRRNBHqxe4676MuSheS3RKOfHQnKlK1A9xJ_qHvOWuIceVs0yjrjJ5u-rM8cok_cNk8os5c8J685u3OteqAmW0f6rmmt6cLzrj5uNvpjx4vpeu6g06cH2jO4AjCYWZ9ib3g-zD2g%3D%3D)**
---
[**SUPPORT LILY'S CAMPAIGN**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=48c654b865a34fd98696045149b3f762&_e=cDTTCOICJjUEsfEAmtcVzbYY14hhdqKPMbgFWL0Z4J1BgScqpw1_fqJzb_gP07LhTqdnrMkoDKgdLm2JxB2AoVGHuPC4zWKqfj8f2zQ5zfbOFGpTlI_GuINf1mywlnKiUX3HFGNEwmGoCIKm4TyZMBGxYjpb74CIcopBf-1tGoZ8R1RJAVmQ1LrsM0jJCkTVsS83CibcSPVYg4NLe_enm5LqX4R7mcM9Lm2BXyW8Sv0ODC9Pnhx9LPBhUb9pL2wkv1A5xfarsrF9T9wJTaRL2nGwttam79aTcYknfUX87bkOqAdSn4rltXHpmhEXKxl7xxNLnYUxetNxuT6Il7KwOsYSReAGYL9-avIo-aCRBlnSTyAb0wc7phLBZVz_nDaHkvvYagUYjXK9vXfrTVpuVw%3D%3D)
---
My story, my voice, and my campaign endanger everything the Democrats have built their party on - _I don’t fit their mold_. **[And now they’re preparing to spend millions to browbeat me into silence& end my candidacy.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=48c654b865a34fd98696045149b3f762&_e=cDTTCOICJjUEsfEAmtcVzbYY14hhdqKPMbgFWL0Z4J1BgScqpw1_fqJzb_gP07LhTqdnrMkoDKgdLm2JxB2AoVGHuPC4zWKqfj8f2zQ5zfbOFGpTlI_GuINf1mywlnKiUX3HFGNEwmGoCIKm4TyZMBGxYjpb74CIcopBf-1tGoZ8R1RJAVmQ1LrsM0jJCkTVsS83CibcSPVYg4NLe_enm5LqX4R7mcM9Lm2BXyW8Sv0ODC9Pnhx9LPBhUb9pL2wkZMd5m_VJNzilGzLyVYpvgb-DdMcvSqao4SdtJtLCxUqloSNQUdM8KJqa8UZYdPeRszqXbwGBZRBo8eLY433VTcs955JWEsuGzre9mpB1YJZAzckndTjt6tEySPK-j-pwGtqYfBrfZGVlkSyHAQn5aA%3D%3D)** That’s why I’m humbly asking for your help today. My candidacy & our country truly do depend on it. I hope you’ll do what you can to save both today. Help me make history, Patriot.
---

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suzkhe&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6jyc9gu33m10hx8z0cz7bi8rqih4f41fg9ugqktnxnxciolnzgwn1yenrkp6qtwscwdd9d2unojlu90xe6z0r7ogjocg8brtt1tattzw73o59pziwk2yuplzz0vc39bzaxbnrzoa8zw003j9z3af6&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suzkhe&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suzkhe&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suzkhe&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suzkhe&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6jyc9gu33m10hx8z0cz7bi8rr6u79nfdb1s1gzzb8tkod7m1xwdk7fndk4im3k5hesafxdxk6rxffx4nyle4mfl4a1zz7ypesk8voo5wfre6daxxdllc50l9ibt00cv78jl0erfn8uxbbxyok1p9i&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suzkhe&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suzkhe&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: DNC HQ
subject: 60-second read →
body:
---
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2025?refcode=em_20250419_3210_fr&amount=3&refcode2=3210_22930333_PRV__N&akid=3210%2E22930333%2EPRV__N) Derek — We understand that your inbox can get overwhelming, so we’ll get straight to the point (this shouldn’t take more than 60 seconds, we promise!). Trump is tanking 401(k)s, allowing Elon Musk to dismantle key government agencies, and now he’s floating the idea that he’ll run for a third term. If you’re feeling anxious and frustrated, you’re certainly not alone. **But we are not powerless.** Millions of people cast their votes against Trump. More than one million people showed up at nationwide protests earlier this month. There are millions of us who won’t passively allow Trump and a Republican-controlled Congress to dictate our future unchecked. We have the power to confront Trump’s harmful agenda head-on, which is exactly what the DNC is doing. With the backing of this grassroots team, we are:
* Taking the Trump administration to court to challenge his attempts to control the Federal Election Commission, America’s federal elections watchdog.
* Suing Trump _again_ over his illegal voter suppression executive order.
* Investing in state parties, which helped us secure big wins in Pennsylvania and Wisconsin in the last few weeks alone.
* Organizing People’s Town Halls across the country — including in districts where Republican representatives are hiding from their constituents — to ensure everyone’s voices are heard.

**But this work requires a massive amount of resources. That’s why we need your help today, Derek.** The DNC is the organization best positioned to move resources to where they’re needed most in 2025, 2026, and beyond as we work to elect more Democrats who will check Trump’s power. [**Can you chip in $3 today to help fund our work?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250419_3210_fr&refcode2=3210_22930333_PRV__N&akid=3210%2E22930333%2EPRV__N) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250419_3210_fr&refcode2=3210_22930333_PRV__N&akid=3210%2E22930333%2EPRV__N)**

**By Rudy Giuliani**
The Democrats have sunk to a new low, and that's saying something given their track record. They're tripping over themselves to defend Kilmar Abrego Garcia, a man who is far from the "hardworking American family man" they paint him as. This guy is a threat, tied to the vicious MS-13 gang, with a rap sheet that includes reports of beating his wife and of course coming to the U.S. illegally. Yet, here we are, watching Democrat Senator Chris Van Hollen make a complete ass of himself, jetting off to El Salvador to hold hands with this thug. It's embarrassing, it's disgraceful, and it's a slap in the face to every law-abiding American citizen.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..caiz3_97i5dWRfDV12LQ59iAqwOpzRxrW_aZP3hxmSs?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=161700772)
Let's start with the facts. Back in 2019, Abrego Garcia was arrested in a Home Depot parking lot in Hyattsville, Maryland, meeting with known MS-13 gang members. That's right--MS-13, the transnational terrorist gang responsible for murders, drug trafficking, and human smuggling. The Prince George's County Police didn't just pull his name out of a hat. They had good reason to believe he was part of this crew. Court documents show he was wearing a Chicago Bulls hat and hoodie, clothing often associated with MS-13's "Westerns" clique. And then there's the tattoos. Look at the photos and decide for yourself. The Trump administration, doing its job to keep Americans safe, used these clear identifiers, along with a "past proven and reliable source," to confirm Abrego Garcia's affiliation with this violent gang. This isn't speculation; it's stacks of evidence, plain and simple.
But it gets worse. Court records reveal that Abrego Garcia's own wife, Jennifer Vasquez Sura, told police he beat her, leaving her with a black eye and striking her on multiple occasions. In 2021, she filed for a protective order, alleging physical attacks.
In Vasquez Sura's own handwriting, she alleges Abrego Garcia repeatedly beat her, "At this point, I am afraid to be close to him. I have multiple photos/videos of how violent he can be and all the bruises he [has] left me," she wrote in a court statement.
_**A message from our sponsor (piece continues below)**_

# Apple's Starlink Update Sparks Huge Earning Opportunity
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/df73d517-03e6-4899-9809-8bb469cd04e3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Apple just secretly added Starlink satellite support to iPhones through iOS 18.3.
One of the biggest potential winners? **[Mode Mobile.](https://substack.com/redirect/df73d517-03e6-4899-9809-8bb469cd04e3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
Mode's EarnPhone already reaches +45M users that have earned over $325M, and that's before global satellite coverage. With SpaceX eliminating "dead zones" worldwide, Mode's earning technology can now reach billions more in unbanked and rural populations worldwide.
Their global expansion is perfectly timed, and you still have a chance to **[invest in their pre-IPO offering at just $0.26/share](https://substack.com/redirect/df73d517-03e6-4899-9809-8bb469cd04e3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[.](https://substack.com/redirect/df73d517-03e6-4899-9809-8bb469cd04e3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Mode's recent 32,481% revenue growth and their newly reserved Nasdaq ticker $MODE puts them one step closer to a potential IPO.

[Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/df73d517-03e6-4899-9809-8bb469cd04e3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
_**(Continued)**_
This is the guy Democrats are calling a "Maryland man" and a model citizen? Give me a break. He's not the friendly construction worker they're desperate to prop up. He's an illegal immigrant with a history of alleged violence and gang ties, deported to El Salvador's Terrorism Confinement Center (CECOT) for a reason.
And yet, what do the Democrats do? They double down. Senator Chris Van Hollen, in a display of pure grandstanding, flew to El Salvador to meet with this alleged wife-beater and MS-13 member. He posted photos, passed along "messages of love" to Abrego Garcia's family, and whined about due process. Due process? For a guy who entered our nation illegally, was caught hanging with MS-13 members, sporting gang tattoos, and accused of repeated domestic violence? Van Hollen's trip wasn't about justice; it was a publicity stunt, a pathetic attempt to score points with the open-borders crowd. He's done more to advocate for this illegal immigrant than he's ever done to address the real concerns of his Maryland constituents--like crime, jobs, or the opioid crisis tearing through our communities.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..caiz3_97i5dWRfDV12LQ59iAqwOpzRxrW_aZP3hxmSs?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=161700772)
This is the same crowd that couldn't be bothered to stand and clap for DJ Daniel, a young American hero battling brain cancer who dreams of becoming a police officer. Remember that? At a State of the Union address, when DJ's story was shared, Republicans stood in awe of his courage, while Democrats sat stone-faced, refusing to honor a kid fighting for his life. But for Kilmar Abrego Garcia, they'll move mountains, fly to foreign countries, and cry crocodile tears. It's sick, it's backwards, and it's ridiculous.
The Democrats' obsession with Abrego Garcia isn't just misguided--it's dangerous. MS-13 isn't a social club; it's a terrorist organization that's left a trail of bodies across our country. The Trump administration, God bless them, took a stand, designating MS-13 as a foreign terrorist group and deporting its members to keep our streets safe. Abrego Garcia's deportation wasn't an error as some claim--it was a necessary step to protect Americans. The Supreme Court may have ordered the administration to "facilitate" his return, but let's be clear: bringing this guy back would be a waste of time and resources. We would just deport him again. El Salvador's President Nayib Bukele understands, and fortunately, he sides with Trump on the matter.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..caiz3_97i5dWRfDV12LQ59iAqwOpzRxrW_aZP3hxmSs?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=161700772)
What's truly galling is the Democrats' selective outrage. They'll scream about Abrego Garcia's "rights" while ignoring the victims of MS-13's violence--mothers, fathers, and children brutalized by the gang's reign of terror. They'll champion a man accused of beating his wife but turn a blind eye to the countless women and families suffering at the hands of illegal immigrant crime. Van Hollen and his ilk have shown more concern for this alleged gang member than for the actual American citizens they're sworn to serve. It's a betrayal of everything this country stands for.
Let me be blunt: Kilmar Abrego Garcia is not a victim. He's not a martyr. He's a likely MS-13 affiliate, has a record of domestic violence allegations made by his own wife, and has no legal right to be in our country. The Democrats' defense of him is a shameful display of pandering, putting politics over people. They're embarrassing themselves, and worse, they're endangering Americans. We need leaders who'll stand up for our citizens, not fly halfway across the globe to coddle criminals. The Trump administration had it right: deport the bad guys, protect the good ones. It's time for Democrats to stop the charade and start putting America first.

PLEASE SIGN ON NOW >> | Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23001%2E4449941%2Eii-jMo) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23001%2E4449941%2Eii-jMo) [ **AMAZING NEWS: Mark Pocan’s _ELON MUSK Act_ would SHUT DOWN Elon Musk’s illegal “DOGE” takeover of the government! **](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60584?t=3&akid=23001%2E4449941%2Eii-jMo) [**15,OOO SIGNATURES NEEDED:_Sign now to DEMAND Congress pass the ELON MUSK Act to STOP Elon Musk’s illegal takeover >>_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60584?t=4&akid=23001%2E4449941%2Eii-jMo) []()
| [SIGN NOW: Citizen Co-Sponsor the _ELON MUSK Act_ >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60584?t=5&akid=23001%2E4449941%2Eii-jMo)
---
[**** 15,OOO LOCAL SIGNATURES NEEDED BEFORE 11:59 PM ** **](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60584?t=6&akid=23001%2E4449941%2Eii-jMo)
**[1]** Americans DID NOT VOTE for Elon Musk and he IS NOT part of Donald Trump’s cabinet... he’s illegally firing so many civil servants for no reason!

**[2]** Current and former government employees are doing everything in their power to fight back against Musk’s TYRANNY!

**[3]** **Mark Pocan DROPPED the HAMMER and introduced a new bill that would ban contracts for ‘special government employees’ like Elon Musk – if this passes, we could finally be rid of him!**
[](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60584?t=7&akid=23001%2E4449941%2Eii-jMo)

Elon Musk has:

1\. Spent over $300 MILLION to elect Donald Trump

2\. Become $154 BILLION richer since election day

3\. Attacked government employees and damaged our Democracy
We must do everything in our power to STOP Trump’s unelected billionaires like Elon Musk.
[**_We need 15,OOO signatures before 11:59 PM. Sign NOW to Citizen Co-Sponsor the _ELON MUSK Act_ >> _**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60584?t=8&akid=23001%2E4449941%2Eii-jMo)
[SIGN NOW: Citizen Co-Sponsor the _ELON MUSK Act_ >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60584?t=9&akid=23001%2E4449941%2Eii-jMo)
---
Counting on you,

_Fight for Reform_

FEC_ decision completely changed the landscape of American politics -- it opened the door for billionaires, corporations, and special interests to spend unlimited, untraceable money to influence our elections.

Your support is critical to helping us reject the Big Money status quo in states and cities across the country by electing champions of campaign finance reform and voting rights to state government, and passing reform ballot initiatives.
With your support we can harness the power of our grassroots supporters to influence decision makers and put control back in the hands of the people.

name: DISGUSTED (protectvoting.org)
subject: Trump wants you to pay for his military parade
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Demand Congress defund this NOW >>
| | **BREAKING: Trump Planning $100 Million Military Parade for 79th Birthday**

A military parade is straight out of an authoritarian dictatorship.

**And Trump wants to use OUR taxpayer dollars to fund it!_We’re FUMING!!_**

[**Sign our urgent petition by MIDNIGHT to CANCEL Donald Trump’s disgusting military parade »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/cancel-parade-v2/?source=VPP_20250419_EMPET_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=6&akid=19571%2E878179%2E_g0NYg) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/cancel-parade-v2/?source=VPP_20250419_EMPET_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=19571%2E878179%2E_g0NYg) | [TELL CONGRESS: DEFUND TRUMP’S MILITARY PARADE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/cancel-parade-v2/?source=VPP_20250419_EMPET_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=19571%2E878179%2E_g0NYg)
---
Donald Trump is determined to cut programs like Social Security, Medicaid, and the Department of Education — _yet he wants money for a PARADE?!_

**This is a slap in the face to the American people. We won’t stand for it, so we’re calling on Congress to act IMMEDIATELY.**

[**Join 25,000 Democrats in our virtual protest and add your name NOW to cancel Trump’s military parade!**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/cancel-parade-v2/?source=VPP_20250419_EMPET_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=19571%2E878179%2E_g0NYg)
[TELL CONGRESS: DEFUND TRUMP’S MILITARY PARADE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/cancel-parade-v2/?source=VPP_20250419_EMPET_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=10&akid=19571%2E878179%2E_g0NYg)
---
Thank you for your help,

_The Voter Protection Project_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=19571%2E878179%2E_g0NYg). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=19571%2E878179%2E_g0NYg).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=19571%2E878179%2E_g0NYg) to request fewer emails. subject: Nevadans flooding the streets

body:
